<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="887e5664-911d-4e0f-9a88-b5f1a3cbec2c" data-testid="conversation-turn-2" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">

<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="19">Based on your logs:</p>
<ul data-start="21" data-end="259">
<li data-section-id="1k03sxq" data-start="21" data-end="74">
<p data-start="23" data-end="74">✅&nbsp;<code data-start="25" data-end="45">tnsping PRODCDB_DR</code>&nbsp;works from both PROD nodes</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1aneh2v" data-start="75" data-end="153">
<p data-start="77" data-end="153">✅ You can connect manually using&nbsp;<code data-start="110" data-end="151">sqlplus sys/sys123@PRODCDB_DR as sysdba</code></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="nizm6i" data-start="154" data-end="202">
<p data-start="156" data-end="202">✅ RMAN connects to both target and auxiliary</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="x6s1ur" data-start="203" data-end="259">
<p data-start="205" data-end="259">❌ But during&nbsp;<code data-start="218" data-end="250">DUPLICATE FROM ACTIVE DATABASE</code>&nbsp;you get:</p>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ORA-17627: ORA-12154: TNS:could not resolve the connect identifier specified<br />ORA-17629: Cannot connect to the remote database server</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="403" data-end="406" />
<h1 data-section-id="aercbx" data-start="408" data-end="440">🔎 Root Cause (Very Important)</h1>
<p data-start="442" data-end="474">This is&nbsp;<strong data-start="450" data-end="473">NOT a network issue</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="476" data-end="503">This error happens because:</p>
<blockquote data-start="505" data-end="664">
<p data-start="507" data-end="664">During active duplicate, the&nbsp;<strong data-start="536" data-end="578">SOURCE database server (PROD instance)</strong>&nbsp;tries to connect back to the AUXILIARY using its own ORACLE_HOME / TNS configuration.</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="666" data-end="781">Even though tnsping works from OS level, the&nbsp;<strong data-start="711" data-end="780">database instance background process cannot resolve the TNS alias</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="783" data-end="814">RMAN duplicate works like this:</p>
<ol data-start="816" data-end="944">
<li data-section-id="885oyd" data-start="816" data-end="853">
<p data-start="819" data-end="853">RMAN client connects to both DBs ✔</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="y4pnta" data-start="854" data-end="917">
<p data-start="857" data-end="917">Source database server tries to open remote channel to AUX ❌</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="99g4k4" data-start="918" data-end="944">
<p data-start="921" data-end="944">It fails with ORA-12154</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start="946" data-end="1021">So this is a&nbsp;<strong data-start="959" data-end="1020">server-side TNS resolution issue inside the database home</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="1023" data-end="1026" />
<h1 data-section-id="1o1vu5w" data-start="1028" data-end="1065">🎯 Why It Is Happening In Your Case</h1>
<p data-start="1067" data-end="1084">From your output:</p>
<p data-start="1086" data-end="1097">Node1 uses:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">/oracle/racdb/product/network/admin/PROD_erpproddb1/sqlnet_ifile.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1176" data-end="1187">Node2 uses:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">/oracle/racdb/product/network/admin/PROD_erpproddb2/sqlnet.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1260" data-end="1323">⚠️ That means both nodes are using&nbsp;<strong data-start="1295" data-end="1322">different TNS locations</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="1325" data-end="1376">RMAN background process may be reading a different:</p>
<ul data-start="1378" data-end="1451">
<li data-section-id="1ggalob" data-start="1378" data-end="1408">
<p data-start="1380" data-end="1408"><code data-start="1380" data-end="1408">$ORACLE_HOME/network/admin</code></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="xeqj3f" data-start="1409" data-end="1427">
<p data-start="1411" data-end="1427">or Grid home TNS</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1wguxz1" data-start="1428" data-end="1451">
<p data-start="1430" data-end="1451">or no tnsnames at all</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1453" data-end="1456" />
<h1 data-section-id="1dkr71r" data-start="1458" data-end="1483">✅ 100% Working Solution</h1>
<p data-start="1485" data-end="1501">You must ensure:</p>
<h3 data-section-id="1fgvypz" data-start="1503" data-end="1567">✔ 1️⃣ PRODCDB_DR entry exists in SOURCE database ORACLE_HOME</h3>
<p data-start="1569" data-end="1578">Login to:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<p data-start="1651" data-end="1662">Now verify:</p>

<p data-start="1713" data-end="1742">👉 Ensure this file contains:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">PRODCDB_DR =<br /> (DESCRIPTION =<br /> (ADDRESS = (PROTOCOL = TCP)(HOST = 10.61.185.221)(PORT = 1521))<br /> (CONNECT_DATA =<br /> (SERVER = DEDICATED)<br /> (SERVICE_NAME = PRODCDB_DR)<br /> )<br /> )</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1935" data-end="2010">⚠️ Very important: It must be in&nbsp;<strong data-start="1968" data-end="1989">RDBMS ORACLE_HOME</strong>, not only Grid home.</p>
<hr data-start="2012" data-end="2015" />
<h3 data-section-id="qgdtku" data-start="2017" data-end="2056">✔ 2️⃣ Verify inside database using:</h3>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">sqlplus / as sysdba</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2087" data-end="2092">Then:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">host tnsping PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2127" data-end="2161">If this fails &rarr; problem confirmed.</p>
<hr data-start="2163" data-end="2166" />
<h3 data-section-id="1eznboi" data-start="2168" data-end="2205">✔ 3️⃣ Best Practice (Recommended)</h3>
<p data-start="2207" data-end="2254">Instead of TNS alias, use EASY CONNECT in RMAN:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">rman target sys/sys123@PRODCDB_PROD \<br />auxiliary sys/sys123@10.61.185.221:1521/PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2354" data-end="2392">This avoids TNS resolution completely.</p>
<p data-start="2394" data-end="2447">👉 This method works 99% of time in active duplicate.</p>
<hr data-start="2449" data-end="2452" />
<h3 data-section-id="unx3o3" data-start="2454" data-end="2503">✔ 4️⃣ Also Check This (Very Important in RAC)</h3>
<p data-start="2505" data-end="2522">On PROD database:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">show parameter local_listener<br />show parameter remote_listener</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2594" data-end="2618">Ensure they are correct.</p>
<p data-start="2620" data-end="2632">Also verify:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">srvctl config database -d PRODCDB</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2677" data-end="2727">Make sure service&nbsp;<code data-start="2695" data-end="2707">PRODCDB_DR</code>&nbsp;is not conflicting.</p>
<hr data-start="2729" data-end="2732" />
<h1 data-section-id="ippftb" data-start="2734" data-end="2768">🚨 Most Common Real Issue In RAC</h1>
<p data-start="2770" data-end="2815">In RAC environments, background process uses:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">$TNS_ADMIN</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2837" data-end="2857">Check on PROD nodes:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">echo $TNS_ADMIN</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2884" data-end="2934">If empty &rarr; default is&nbsp;<code data-start="2906" data-end="2934">$ORACLE_HOME/network/admin</code></p>
<p data-start="2936" data-end="2987">If set &rarr; ensure that location has PRODCDB_DR entry.</p>
<hr data-start="2989" data-end="2992" />
<h1 data-section-id="cligwf" data-start="2994" data-end="3018">🔥 Quick Fix (Fastest)</h1>
<p data-start="3020" data-end="3043">On both PROD nodes run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">cp /oracle/racdb/product/network/admin/PROD_erpproddb1/tnsnames.ora \<br /> $ORACLE_HOME/network/admin/</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3155" data-end="3184">(or correct path accordingly)</p>
<p data-start="3186" data-end="3207">Then retry duplicate.</p>
<hr data-start="3209" data-end="3212" />
<h1 data-section-id="63cxhs" data-start="3214" data-end="3262">💡 Why RMAN Initially Connects But Then Fails?</h1>
<p data-start="3264" data-end="3272">Because:</p>
<ul data-start="3274" data-end="3376">
<li data-section-id="gigqev" data-start="3274" data-end="3321">
<p data-start="3276" data-end="3321">Initial RMAN client connection = OS level TNS</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="ohv2ld" data-start="3322" data-end="3376">
<p data-start="3324" data-end="3376">Duplicate backup phase = database server process TNS</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="3378" data-end="3409">Two different resolution paths.</p>
<hr data-start="3411" data-end="3414" />
<h1 data-section-id="16juue0" data-start="3416" data-end="3457">🏁 Final Working Command Recommendation</h1>
<p data-start="3459" data-end="3476">Use Easy Connect:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">rman target sys/sys123@PRODCDB_PROD \<br />auxiliary sys/sys123@10.61.185.221:1521/PRODCDB_DR<br /><br />duplicate target database for standby from active database;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="3637" data-end="3640" />
<p data-start="3642" data-end="3661">If you want, paste:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">echo $ORACLE_HOME<br />echo $TNS_ADMIN<br />ls -l $ORACLE_HOME/network/admin</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3739" data-end="3797" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">from both PROD nodes and I will tell you exact correction.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>

<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="7d5cd6f2-7aae-4849-987d-67ee155cce3a" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="38">Good 👍 &mdash; now network issue is solved.</p>
<p data-start="40" data-end="102">This is a&nbsp;<strong data-start="50" data-end="101">different and very common ASM duplicate problem</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="104" data-end="107" />
<h1 data-section-id="176e0mz" data-start="109" data-end="126">❌ Current Error</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">RMAN-05529: DB_FILE_NAME_CONVERT resulted in invalid ASM names<br />RMAN-05517: tempfile +DATA/SITCDB/... conflicts with file used by target database</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>

<hr data-start="282" data-end="285" />
<h1 data-section-id="130xw0d" data-start="287" data-end="313">🔎 Why This Is Happening</h1>
<p data-start="315" data-end="349">Your source database files are in:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">+DATA/SITCDB/....</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="378" data-end="406">But your standby should use:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/....</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="439" data-end="493">RMAN is trying to reuse original ASM paths, and since:</p>
<ul data-start="495" data-end="613">
<li data-section-id="1ap3ma0" data-start="495" data-end="542">
<p data-start="497" data-end="542">Both DBs are using same ASM diskgroup&nbsp;<code data-start="535" data-end="542">+DATA</code></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1i4d50s" data-start="543" data-end="577">
<p data-start="545" data-end="577">No proper&nbsp;<code data-start="555" data-end="577">DB_FILE_NAME_CONVERT</code></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="byibzi" data-start="578" data-end="613">
<p data-start="580" data-end="613">No proper&nbsp;<code data-start="590" data-end="613">LOG_FILE_NAME_CONVERT</code></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="615" data-end="672">It detects conflict with target database files and stops.</p>
<hr data-start="674" data-end="677" />
<h1 data-section-id="nhi0ya" data-start="679" data-end="694">🎯 Root Cause</h1>
<p data-start="696" data-end="731">Standby controlfile still contains:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">+DATA/SITCDB/...</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="759" data-end="788">But standby database name is:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="810" data-end="854">So file name conversion is wrong or missing.</p>
<hr data-start="856" data-end="859" />
<h1 data-section-id="1ox1krk" data-start="861" data-end="894">✅ Proper Solution (Correct Way)</h1>
<p data-start="896" data-end="961">You must set these parameters on AUXILIARY (DR) before duplicate:</p>
<p data-start="963" data-end="975">Login on DR:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">sqlplus / as sysdba</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1010" data-end="1025">Set parameters:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> db_file_name_convert<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'+DATA/SITCDB'</span>,<span class="ͼc">'+DATA/PRODCDB_DR'</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=</span>spfile;<br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> log_file_name_convert<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'+DATA/SITCDB'</span>,<span class="ͼc">'+DATA/PRODCDB_DR'</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=</span>spfile;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1212" data-end="1246">Then shutdown and startup nomount:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">shutdown <span class="ͼ8">immediate</span>;<br />startup nomount;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1297" data-end="1300" />
<h1 data-section-id="1uhy6d3" data-start="1302" data-end="1342">🔥 Recommended Better Method (Cleaner)</h1>
<p data-start="1344" data-end="1420">Instead of relying on parameters, explicitly tell RMAN where to place files:</p>
<p data-start="1422" data-end="1446">Run duplicate like this:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">duplicate target database<br />for standby<br />from active database<br />spfile<br /> parameter_value_convert 'SITCDB','PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set db_unique_name='PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set db_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set log_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set control_files='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control01.ctl','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control02.ctl'<br />no filenamecheck;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1836" data-end="1903">⚠️&nbsp;<code data-start="1839" data-end="1857">no filenamecheck</code>&nbsp;is required when both DBs use same diskgroup.</p>
<hr data-start="1905" data-end="1908" />
<h1 data-section-id="19pjemk" data-start="1910" data-end="1938">💡 Why RMAN-05529 Appeared</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">DB_FILE_NAME_CONVERT resulted in invalid ASM names; names changed to disk group only</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2034" data-end="2103">This happens when conversion is incorrect or missing slash structure.</p>
<p data-start="2105" data-end="2134">For ASM, always convert like:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">'+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR'</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2179" data-end="2188">NOT like:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">'SITCDB','PRODCDB_DR'</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2221" data-end="2224" />
<h1 data-section-id="chzp1u" data-start="2226" data-end="2258">🚀 What I Recommend You Do Now</h1>
<p data-start="2260" data-end="2367">1️⃣ Shutdown standby<br data-start="2280" data-end="2283" />2️⃣ Startup nomount<br data-start="2302" data-end="2305" />3️⃣ Run duplicate with full parameter block I provided above</p>
<p data-start="2369" data-end="2382">It will work.</p>
<hr data-start="2384" data-end="2387" />
<h1 data-section-id="gme968" data-start="2389" data-end="2412">🧠 Important Question</h1>
<p data-start="2414" data-end="2437">Is your source DB_NAME:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">SITCDB</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2455" data-end="2475">and standby DB_NAME:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">PRODCDB</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2494" data-end="2546">or both are PRODCDB and only DB_UNIQUE_NAME differs?</p>
<p data-start="2548" data-end="2566">Run on both sides:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> db_name;<br />show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> db_unique_name;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2635" data-end="2729">Paste output if unsure &mdash; because incorrect db_name/db_unique_name is very common mistake here.</p>
<hr data-start="2731" data-end="2734" />
<p data-start="2736" data-end="2827" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">You're very close now 👍<br data-start="2760" data-end="2763" />Network issue fixed ✅<br data-start="2784" data-end="2787" />Only ASM file mapping correction needed.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="b675c2d1-e63e-4ede-b772-dda7deae76cd" data-testid="conversation-turn-5" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="user" data-message-id="b675c2d1-e63e-4ede-b772-dda7deae76cd">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden items-end rtl:items-start">
<div class="user-message-bubble-color corner-superellipse/0.98 relative rounded-[22px] px-4 py-2.5 leading-6 max-w-(--user-chat-width,70%)">
<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">[oracle@erpproddb1-dr ~]$ rman target sys/sys123@PRODCDB_PROD auxiliary sys/sys123@10.61.185.221:1521/PRODCDB_DR Recovery Manager: Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production on Tue Feb 17 16:44:11 2026 Version 19.27.0.0.0 Copyright (c) 1982, 2019, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved. connected to target database: PRODCDB (DBID=4104805115) connected to auxiliary database: PRODCDB (DBID=4104805115, not open) RMAN&gt; duplicate target database for standby from active database spfile parameter_value_convert 'SITCDB','PRODCDB_DR' set db_unique_name='PRODCDB_DR' set db_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR' set log_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR' d set control_files='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control01.ctl','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control02.ctl' no filenamecheck;uplicate target database 2&gt; for standby 3&gt; from active database 4&gt; spfile 5&gt; parameter_value_convert 'SITCDB','PRODCDB_DR' 6&gt; set db_unique_name='PRODCDB_DR' 7&gt; set db_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR' 8&gt; set log_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR' 9&gt; set control_files='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control01.ctl','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control02.ctl' 10&gt; no RMAN-00571: =========================================================== RMAN-00569: =============== ERROR MESSAGE STACK FOLLOWS =============== RMAN-00571: =========================================================== RMAN-00558: error encountered while parsing input commands RMAN-01009: syntax error: found "no": expecting one of: "asdecrypted, asencrypted, backup, comment, db_file_name_convert, device, dorecover, force, from, high, logfile, nocheck, nofilenamecheck, noopen, noredo, noresume, open, password, pfile, pluggable, reset, section, set, skip readonly, skip, spfile, tablespace, to restore point, undo, until restore point, until, using, comma, ;" RMAN-01007: at line 10 column 1 file: standard input RMAN Client Diagnostic Trace file : /oracle/app/oracle/diag/clients/user_oracle/RMAN_1631470605_110/trace/ora_rman_66598_0.trc RMAN&gt;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex justify-end">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="0d087d81-454b-49e7-af3c-5fedbcbec2f8" data-testid="conversation-turn-6" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="b7b1405f-d42e-4c93-8cd6-f6b890513607" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="104">Good &mdash; now only&nbsp;<strong data-start="16" data-end="34">syntax mistake</strong>&nbsp;is stopping you 😄<br data-start="53" data-end="56" />Your duplicate command got broken in the middle:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">d set control_files=...<br />no filenamecheck;uplicate target database</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="182" data-end="243">RMAN read&nbsp;<code data-start="192" data-end="196">no</code>&nbsp;as a new command &rarr;&nbsp;<strong data-start="216" data-end="243">RMAN-01009 syntax error</strong></p>
<hr data-start="245" data-end="248" />
<h1 data-section-id="phyn27" data-start="250" data-end="295">✔ Correct RMAN Command (Copy-Paste Exactly)</h1>
<p data-start="297" data-end="349">Exit RMAN and reconnect, then paste&nbsp;<strong data-start="333" data-end="348">in one shot</strong>:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">duplicate target database<br />for standby<br />from active database<br />spfile<br /> parameter_value_convert 'SITCDB','PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set db_unique_name='PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set db_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set log_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set control_files='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control01.ctl','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control02.ctl'<br />nofilenamecheck;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="738" data-end="751">⚠️ Important:</p>
<ul data-start="752" data-end="872">
<li data-section-id="1y3l30i" data-start="752" data-end="793">
<p data-start="754" data-end="793"><code data-start="754" data-end="771">nofilenamecheck</code>&nbsp;must be in same block</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="tv7pv5" data-start="794" data-end="836">
<p data-start="796" data-end="836">Do NOT press enter mid-line accidentally</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="4qtdcz" data-start="837" data-end="872">
<p data-start="839" data-end="872">Best paste from notepad in one go</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="874" data-end="877" />
<h1 data-section-id="4msg5b" data-start="879" data-end="917">🔴 But One More Very Important Thing</h1>
<p data-start="919" data-end="945">From your last connection:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">connected to auxiliary database: PRODCDB (DBID=4104805115, not open)</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1025" data-end="1047">This is&nbsp;<strong data-start="1033" data-end="1046">dangerous</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="1049" data-end="1140">Standby DB already has SAME DBID as primary &rarr; means previous duplicate partially succeeded.</p>
<p data-start="1142" data-end="1265">You MUST clean auxiliary first or duplicate will fail later with:<br /><code data-start="1208" data-end="1243">ORA-01103: database name mismatch</code>&nbsp;or datafile conflicts</p>
<hr data-start="1267" data-end="1270" />
<h1 data-section-id="y06ks4" data-start="1272" data-end="1318">🧹 Clean Standby Before Retrying (Mandatory)</h1>
<p data-start="1320" data-end="1333">On DR server:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">sqlplus / as sysdba</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1368" data-end="1373">Then:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">shutdown abort;<br />startup mount;<br /><span class="ͼ8">drop</span> database;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1433" data-end="1453">If drop fails &rarr; use:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">startup nomount;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1484" data-end="1515">Then remove old files from ASM:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">asmcmd</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1537" data-end="1548">Inside ASM:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">rm -rf +DATA/PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1583" data-end="1620">(Only DR diskgroup path &mdash; NOT SITCDB)</p>
<p data-start="1622" data-end="1634">Exit asmcmd.</p>
<hr data-start="1636" data-end="1639" />
<h1 data-section-id="1szvu9" data-start="1641" data-end="1659">Then Start Again</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">startup nomount;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1690" data-end="1720">Then run RMAN duplicate again.</p>
<hr data-start="1722" data-end="1725" />
<h1 data-section-id="t4i9or" data-start="1727" data-end="1744">💡 Why We Clean</h1>
<p data-start="1746" data-end="1784">Your earlier failed duplicate already:</p>
<ul data-start="1786" data-end="1839">
<li data-section-id="dzzoh5" data-start="1786" data-end="1807">
<p data-start="1788" data-end="1807">Created controlfile</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="qnwyrr" data-start="1808" data-end="1839">
<p data-start="1810" data-end="1839">Assigned DBID same as primary</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1841" data-end="1908">Oracle now thinks standby&nbsp;<strong data-start="1867" data-end="1892">is a clone of primary</strong>, not auxiliary.</p>
<p data-start="1910" data-end="1968">Active duplicate always requires clean auxiliary instance.</p>
<hr data-start="1970" data-end="1973" />
<p data-start="1975" data-end="2054">After this &mdash; your duplicate should start datafile restore phase (long running).</p>
<p data-start="2056" data-end="2094" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Paste next output if anything stops 👍</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="51c2f62e-7d8b-48f1-9936-f553108064cf" data-testid="conversation-turn-7" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">

All rights reserved. connected to target database: PRODCDB (DBID=4104805115) connected to auxiliary database: PRODCDB (DBID=4104805115, not open) RMAN&gt; duplicate target database for standby from active database spfile parameter_value_convert 'SITCDB','PRODCDB_DR' set db_unique_name='PRODCDB_DR' set db_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR' set log_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR' set control_files='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control01.ctl','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control02.ctl' nofilenamecheck;duplicate target database 2&gt; for standby 3&gt; from active database 4&gt; spfile 5&gt; parameter_value_convert 'SITCDB','PRODCDB_DR' 6&gt; set db_unique_name='PRODCDB_DR' 7&gt; set db_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR' 8&gt; set log_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR' 9&gt; set control_files='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control01.ctl','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control02.ctl' 10&gt; nofilenamecheck; Starting Duplicate Db at 17-FEB-26 RMAN-00571: =========================================================== RMAN-00569: =============== ERROR MESSAGE STACK FOLLOWS =============== RMAN-00571: =========================================================== RMAN-03002: failure of Duplicate Db command at 02/17/2026 16:45:24 RMAN-05501: aborting duplication of target database RMAN-05537: DUPLICATE without TARGET connection when auxiliary instance is started with spfile cannot use SPFILE clause RMAN Client Diagnostic Trace file : /oracle/app/oracle/diag/clients/user_oracle/RMAN_1631470605_110/trace/ora_rman_67939_0.trc</div>
