<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="bec0dbf9-b5b6-4a6e-b4a3-a665613fcdde" data-testid="conversation-turn-8" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="bec0dbf9-b5b6-4a6e-b4a3-a665613fcdde" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="38">Great &mdash; now the error is very clear 👇</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">RMAN-05537: DUPLICATE without TARGET connection when auxiliary instance is started with spfile cannot use SPFILE clause</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="169" data-end="190">This happens because:</p>
<blockquote data-start="192" data-end="336">
<p data-start="194" data-end="336">Your&nbsp;<strong data-start="199" data-end="261">auxiliary (DR) instance is already started using an SPFILE</strong><br data-start="261" data-end="264" />and in RMAN duplicate you again used&nbsp;<code data-start="303" data-end="311">SPFILE</code>&nbsp;clause &rarr; Oracle refuses.</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="338" data-end="350">Also notice:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">connected to auxiliary database: PRODCDB (DBID=4104805115, not open)</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="430" data-end="509">⚠️ That means standby is&nbsp;<strong data-start="455" data-end="472">NOT clean yet</strong>&nbsp;(old duplicate remnants still exist)</p>
<p data-start="511" data-end="547">So we must fix in&nbsp;<strong data-start="529" data-end="546">correct order</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="549" data-end="552" />
<h1 data-section-id="19op890" data-start="554" data-end="597">🚨 Step 1 &mdash; CLEAN DR DATABASE (MANDATORY)</h1>
<p data-start="599" data-end="612">On DR server:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">sqlplus / as sysdba</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="647" data-end="663">Try normal drop:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">shutdown <span class="ͼ8">immediate</span>;<br />startup mount;<br /><span class="ͼ8">drop</span> database;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="727" data-end="730" />
<h2 data-section-id="4dykue" data-start="732" data-end="762">If DROP fails (very common)</h2>
<p data-start="764" data-end="786">Then do force cleanup:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">shutdown abort;<br />startup nomount;<br /><span class="ͼ8">exit</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="839" data-end="860">Now remove ASM files:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">asmcmd</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="882" data-end="893">Inside ASM:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ls +DATA</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="913" data-end="926">You will see:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="948" data-end="958">Remove it:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">rm -rf +DATA/PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="993" data-end="1005">Exit asmcmd.</p>
<hr data-start="1007" data-end="1010" />
<h1 data-section-id="1nns7vn" data-start="1012" data-end="1051">🚨 Step 2 &mdash; REMOVE SPFILE (IMPORTANT)</h1>
<p data-start="1053" data-end="1117">Right now instance starts using spfile &mdash; that causes RMAN error.</p>
<p data-start="1119" data-end="1125">Check:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">ls</span> <span class="ͼe">$ORACLE_HOME</span>/dbs | <span class="ͼd">grep</span> spfile</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1174" data-end="1187">You will see:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">spfilePRODCDB.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1216" data-end="1226">Rename it:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">mv</span> spfilePRODCDB.ora spfilePRODCDB.ora.bkp</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1284" data-end="1309">Now create minimal PFILE:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">vi</span> <span class="ͼe">$ORACLE_HOME</span>/dbs/initPRODCDB.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1360" data-end="1374">Put ONLY this:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">db_name=PRODCDB<br />db_unique_name=PRODCDB_DR<br />compatible=19.0.0<br />db_create_file_dest='+DATA'<br />db_create_online_log_dest_1='+DATA'</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1512" data-end="1515" />
<h1 data-section-id="p73vuv" data-start="1517" data-end="1556">🚨 Step 3 &mdash; START AUXILIARY CORRECTLY</h1>

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>

</div>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">startup nomount pfile<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'$ORACLE_HOME/dbs/initPRODCDB.ora'</span>;</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<p data-start="1661" data-end="1668">Verify:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">

</div>

</div>

<h1 data-section-id="1s0h4ua" data-start="1731" data-end="1771">🚨 Step 4 &mdash; RUN RMAN DUPLICATE (FINAL)</h1>
<p data-start="1773" data-end="1781">Now run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">duplicate target database<br />for standby<br />from active database<br />spfile<br /> parameter_value_convert 'SITCDB','PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set db_unique_name='PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set db_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set log_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set control_files='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control01.ctl','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control02.ctl'<br />nofilenamecheck;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2277" data-end="2280" />
<h1 data-section-id="x5dzah" data-start="2282" data-end="2303">🧠 Why This Happens</h1>
<p data-start="2305" data-end="2327">Oracle duplicate flow:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="2329" data-end="2471">
<thead data-start="2329" data-end="2379">
<tr data-start="2329" data-end="2379">
<th class="" data-start="2329" data-end="2354" data-col-size="sm">Auxiliary startup mode</th>
<th class="" data-start="2354" data-end="2379" data-col-size="sm">Allowed SPFILE clause</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="2396" data-end="2471">
<tr data-start="2396" data-end="2435">
<td data-start="2396" data-end="2418" data-col-size="sm">Started with SPFILE</td>
<td data-start="2418" data-end="2435" data-col-size="sm">❌ Not allowed</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="2436" data-end="2471">
<td data-start="2436" data-end="2457" data-col-size="sm">Started with PFILE</td>
<td data-start="2457" data-end="2471" data-col-size="sm">✅ Required</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2473" data-end="2532">You started DR using spfile &rarr; RMAN refused to overwrite it.</p>
<hr data-start="2534" data-end="2537" />

<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="5d3827e5-6eae-4e41-ac64-c9222dd91834" data-testid="conversation-turn-9" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">

<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden items-end rtl:items-start">
<div class="user-message-bubble-color corner-superellipse/0.98 relative rounded-[22px] px-4 py-2.5 leading-6 max-w-(--user-chat-width,70%)">
<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">[oracle@erpproddb1-dr ~]$ rman target sys/sys123@PRODCDB_PROD auxiliary sys/sys123@10.61.185.221:1521/PRODCDB_DR Recovery Manager: Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production on Tue Feb 17 16:58:03 2026 Version 19.27.0.0.0 Copyright (c) 1982, 2019, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved. connected to target database: PRODCDB (DBID=4104805115) connected to auxiliary database: PRODCDB (not mounted) RMAN&gt; duplicate target database for standby from active database spfile d parameter_value_convert 'SITCDB','PRODCDB_DR' set db_unique_name='PRODCDB_DR' set db_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR' set log_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR' set control_files='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control01.ctl','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control02.ctl' nofilenamecheck;uplicate target database 2&gt; for standby 3&gt; from active database 4&gt; spfile 5&gt; parameter_value_convert 'SITCDB','PRODCDB_DR' 6&gt; set db_unique_name='PRODCDB_DR' 7&gt; set db_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR' 8&gt; set log_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR' 9&gt; set control_files='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control01.ctl','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control02.ctl' 10&gt; nofilenamecheck; Starting Duplicate Db at 17-FEB-26 RMAN-00571: =========================================================== RMAN-00569: =============== ERROR MESSAGE STACK FOLLOWS =============== RMAN-00571: =========================================================== RMAN-03002: failure of Duplicate Db command at 02/17/2026 16:58:30 RMAN-05501: aborting duplication of target database RMAN-05537: DUPLICATE without TARGET connection when auxiliary instance is started with spfile cannot use SPFILE clause RMAN Client Diagnostic Trace file : /oracle/app/oracle/diag/clients/user_oracle/RMAN_1631470605_110/trace/ora_rman_77480_0.trc RMAN&gt;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex justify-end">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="5e57730e-9e36-4f49-bc31-2c2a3141050c" data-testid="conversation-turn-10" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="ed22f282-dc94-47d9-9302-daef4ec679f0" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="40">You&rsquo;re still getting the&nbsp;<strong data-start="25" data-end="39">same error</strong>:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">RMAN-05537: DUPLICATE ... auxiliary instance is started with spfile cannot use SPFILE clause</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="144" data-end="174">So RMAN is telling us clearly:</p>
<blockquote data-start="176" data-end="259">
<p data-start="178" data-end="259">The DR database is&nbsp;<strong data-start="197" data-end="231">still starting using an SPFILE</strong>, not the PFILE you created.</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="261" data-end="366">Even though you created initPRODCDB.ora, Oracle is ignoring it and automatically picking spfile from ASM.</p>
<p data-start="368" data-end="449">In RAC + ASM systems this happens because Oracle checks these locations in order:</p>
<ol data-start="451" data-end="604">
<li data-section-id="a6wxgh" data-start="451" data-end="488">
<p data-start="454" data-end="488"><code data-start="454" data-end="488">$ORACLE_HOME/dbs/spfile&lt;SID&gt;.ora</code></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1rrw0ym" data-start="489" data-end="521">
<p data-start="492" data-end="521"><code data-start="492" data-end="521">$ORACLE_HOME/dbs/spfile.ora</code></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="19bb8fq" data-start="522" data-end="590">
<p data-start="525" data-end="590"><code data-start="525" data-end="565">+DATA/&lt;DB_UNIQUE_NAME&gt;/spfile&lt;SID&gt;.ora</code>&nbsp;&larr;&nbsp;<strong data-start="569" data-end="590">this is your case</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="4p36d5" data-start="591" data-end="604">
<p data-start="594" data-end="604">then PFILE</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start="606" data-end="679">So we must force NOMOUNT with pfile and ensure no spfile exists anywhere.</p>
<hr data-start="681" data-end="684" />
<h1 data-section-id="uebtsn" data-start="686" data-end="720">🔴 Step-by-Step FIX (Do Exactly)</h1>
<h2 data-section-id="vi9ke2" data-start="722" data-end="747">1️⃣ Shutdown auxiliary</h2>
<p data-start="748" data-end="754">On DR:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">sqlplus / as sysdba</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">shutdown abort;<br /><span class="ͼ8">exit</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="823" data-end="826" />

<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">db_name=PRODCDB<br />db_unique_name=PRODCDB_DR<br />compatible=19.0.0<br />db_create_file_dest='+DATA'<br />db_create_online_log_dest_1='+DATA'<br />diagnostic_dest='/oracle/app/oracle'</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<h2 data-section-id="1ul5flz" data-start="1959" data-end="1988">6️⃣ Now run RMAN duplicate</h2>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">rman target sys/sys123@PRODCDB_PROD auxiliary sys/sys123@10.61.185.221:1521/PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2090" data-end="2109">Then paste exactly:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">duplicate target database<br />for standby<br />from active database<br />spfile<br /> parameter_value_convert 'SITCDB','PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set db_unique_name='PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set db_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set log_file_name_convert='+DATA/SITCDB','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR'<br /> set control_files='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control01.ctl','+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control02.ctl'<br />nofilenamecheck;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2498" data-end="2501" />
<h1 data-section-id="zem7c7" data-start="2503" data-end="2531">💡 Why this kept repeating</h1>
<p data-start="2533" data-end="2584">Every time RMAN starts, Oracle automatically found:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/spfilePRODCDB.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2630" data-end="2686">So even after shutdown/startup it never used your PFILE.</p>
<p data-start="2688" data-end="2766">This is the&nbsp;<strong data-start="2700" data-end="2765">#1 most common Data Guard duplicate issue in ASM environments</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="2768" data-end="2771" />
<p data-start="2773" data-end="2817">After this, duplicate will enter long phase:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">channel ORA_AUX_DISK_1: using network backup set from service PRODCDB_PROD<br />channel ORA_AUX_DISK_1: restoring datafile 1</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2948" data-end="2967">That means success.</p>
<hr data-start="2969" data-end="2972" />

<p data-start="0" data-end="51">Perfect 👍 &mdash; this output clearly shows the problem.</p>
<p data-start="53" data-end="152">You have&nbsp;<strong data-start="62" data-end="90">SPFILE stored inside ASM</strong>, and Oracle is automatically starting the auxiliary using it.</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">PARAMETERFILE ... SPFILEPRODCDB_DR.ora =&gt; +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PARAMETERFILE/spfile.357.1225039939</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="260" data-end="298">That is exactly why RMAN keeps giving:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<p data-start="419" data-end="483">You should remove&nbsp;<strong data-start="437" data-end="456">ONLY the SPFILE</strong>, NOT the database folders.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="85d4ho" data-start="485" data-end="501">Remove this:</h3>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">

<h1 data-section-id="he6u2p" data-start="923" data-end="961">Now Start DB Using PFILE (Important)</h1>

<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">

<p data-start="0" data-end="120">Perfect &mdash; now your SPFILE is gone 👍<br data-start="36" data-end="39" />What remains is only the&nbsp;<strong data-start="64" data-end="81">password file</strong>, and that is&nbsp;<strong data-start="95" data-end="119">correct and required</strong>.</p>

<h1 data-section-id="9pf8c9" data-start="208" data-end="248">❓ Should you delete the PASSWORD file?</h1>
<p data-start="250" data-end="278">👉&nbsp;<strong data-start="253" data-end="278">NO &mdash; DO NOT DELETE IT</strong></p>
<p data-start="280" data-end="344">This file is needed because RMAN active duplicate connects like:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">target -&gt; primary<br />auxiliary -&gt; standby (remote SYS login)</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<p data-start="478" data-end="515">If you delete it, next error will be:</p>

</div>

sql clone "alter system set db_file_name_convert = ''+DATA/SITCDB'', ''+DATA/PRODCDB_DR'' comment= '''' scope=spfile"; sql clone "alter system set log_file_name_convert = ''+DATA/SITCDB'', ''+DATA/PRODCDB_DR'' comment= '''' scope=spfile"; sql clone "alter system set control_files = ''+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control01.ctl'', ''+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control02.ctl'' comment= '''' scope=spfile"; shutdown clone immediate; startup clone nomount; } executing Memory Script sql statement: alter system set db_unique_name = ''PRODCDB_DR'' comment= '''' scope=spfile sql statement: alter system set db_file_name_convert = ''+DATA/SITCDB'', ''+DATA/PRODCDB_DR'' comment= '''' scope=spfile sql statement: alter system set log_file_name_convert = ''+DATA/SITCDB'', ''+DATA/PRODCDB_DR'' comment= '''' scope=spfile sql statement: alter system set control_files = ''+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control01.ctl'', ''+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/control02.ctl'' comment= '''' scope=spfile Oracle instance shut down connected to auxiliary database (not started) RMAN-00571: =========================================================== RMAN-00569: =============== ERROR MESSAGE STACK FOLLOWS =============== RMAN-00571: =========================================================== RMAN-03002: failure of Duplicate Db command at 02/17/2026 17:20:09 RMAN-05501: aborting duplication of target database RMAN-03015: error occurred in stored script Memory Script RMAN-04014: startup failed: ORA-29760: instance_number parameter not specified RMAN-04017: startup error description: ORA-32004: obsolete or deprecated parameter(s) specified for RDBMS instance RMAN Client Diagnostic Trace file : /oracle/app/oracle/diag/clients/user_oracle/RMAN_1631470605_110/trace/ora_rman_93007_0.trc RMAN&gt;</div>

<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="575865a1-01a1-4506-b019-d408f556acb6" data-testid="conversation-turn-16" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="bc042348-3246-4b8d-9628-41a1e2cb46ca" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="52">Excellent 👍 &mdash; now we are at the&nbsp;<strong data-start="33" data-end="51">real RAC issue</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="54" data-end="90">Your duplicate progressed correctly:</p>
<ul data-start="92" data-end="186">
<li data-section-id="vnecsk" data-start="92" data-end="113">
<p data-start="94" data-end="113">✅ SPFILE restored</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="thjlud" data-start="114" data-end="134">
<p data-start="116" data-end="134">✅ Parameters set</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1240e6k" data-start="135" data-end="158">
<p data-start="137" data-end="158">✅ Instance shutdown</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="e6wpb1" data-start="159" data-end="186">
<p data-start="161" data-end="186">❌ Failed at restart with:</p>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ORA-29760: instance_number parameter not specified</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="260" data-end="263" />
<h1 data-section-id="4r4hme" data-start="265" data-end="287">🎯 Why This Happened</h1>
<p data-start="289" data-end="349">Your DR database is a&nbsp;<strong data-start="311" data-end="327">RAC database</strong>, not single-instance.</p>
<p data-start="351" data-end="396">When RMAN restarts auxiliary, Oracle expects:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">instance_number<br />thread<br />cluster_database</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="459" data-end="535">But in the SPFILE generated by duplicate, these RAC parameters were not set.</p>
<p data-start="537" data-end="595">So Oracle doesn&rsquo;t know which RAC instance number to start.</p>
<hr data-start="597" data-end="600" />
<h1 data-section-id="ue5a0v" data-start="602" data-end="617">🧠 Root Cause</h1>
<p data-start="619" data-end="688">Primary = RAC<br data-start="632" data-end="635" />Standby = also RAC (because you are on erpproddb1-dr)</p>
<p data-start="690" data-end="722">In RAC, each instance must have:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">instance_number=1 (node1)<br />instance_number=2 (node2)</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="797" data-end="821">Without that &rarr; ORA-29760</p>
<hr data-start="823" data-end="826" />
<h1 data-section-id="1qp9a8t" data-start="828" data-end="857">✅ Correct Fix (Very Simple)</h1>
<p data-start="859" data-end="905">We must manually add RAC parameters to SPFILE.</p>
<hr data-start="907" data-end="910" />
<h2 data-section-id="15e9i2y" data-start="912" data-end="971">🔴 Step 1 &mdash; Start Auxiliary in NOMOUNT Using PFILE Again</h2>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">sqlplus / as sysdba</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">startup nomount pfile<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'$ORACLE_HOME/dbs/initPRODCDB.ora'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1076" data-end="1079" />
<h2 data-section-id="roo7uk" data-start="1081" data-end="1123">🔴 Step 2 &mdash; Add RAC Parameters Manually</h2>
<p data-start="1125" data-end="1129">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> cluster_database<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">true</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=</span>spfile;<br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> instance_number<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">1</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=</span>spfile;<br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> thread<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">1</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=</span>spfile;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1285" data-end="1319">⚠️ Since you are on DR node1, use:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">instance_number=1<br />thread=1</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1357" data-end="1405">If configuring second DR node later, it will be:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">instance_number=2<br />thread=2</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1443" data-end="1446" />
<h2 data-section-id="1igasfl" data-start="1448" data-end="1471">🔴 Step 3 &mdash; Shutdown</h2>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">shutdown <span class="ͼ8">immediate</span>;</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>

<hr data-start="1505" data-end="1508" />
<h2 data-section-id="vw4s6w" data-start="1510" data-end="1539">🔴 Step 4 &mdash; Start Normally</h2>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">startup nomount;</div>
</div>

</div>

</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1570" data-end="1581">Now verify:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> instance_number;<br />show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> cluster_database;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1660" data-end="1672">Should show:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<hr data-start="1727" data-end="1730" />
<h1 data-section-id="16llmub" data-start="1732" data-end="1770">🔥 Step 5 &mdash; Run RMAN Duplicate Again</h1>
<p data-start="1772" data-end="1796">Now run duplicate again.</p>
<p data-start="1798" data-end="1847">This time it will go past SPFILE phase and start:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<hr data-start="1941" data-end="1944" />
<h1 data-section-id="16lodsw" data-start="1946" data-end="1985">💡 Why This Is Normal in RAC DG Setup</h1>
<p data-start="1987" data-end="2033">Active duplicate for RAC standby always needs:</p>
<ul data-start="2035" data-end="2085">
<li data-section-id="icvv8z" data-start="2035" data-end="2058">
<p data-start="2037" data-end="2058">cluster_database=true</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="4d8nod" data-start="2059" data-end="2076">
<p data-start="2061" data-end="2076">instance_number</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1l61ts6" data-start="2077" data-end="2085">
<p data-start="2079" data-end="2085">thread</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="2087" data-end="2162">Oracle does not automatically derive these when duplicating to new cluster.</p>
<hr data-start="2164" data-end="2167" />
<h1 data-section-id="1lrvnbq" data-start="2169" data-end="2196">🚀 You Are Very Close Now</h1>

<p data-start="2272" data-end="2315">Next phase will be actual datafile restore.</p>

<p data-start="0" data-end="68">Good 👍 &mdash; this error actually tells us&nbsp;<strong data-start="39" data-end="67">exactly where we are now</strong>:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="152" data-end="160">Meaning:</p>
<blockquote data-start="162" data-end="311">
<p data-start="164" data-end="311">You started the instance using&nbsp;<strong data-start="195" data-end="214">PFILE (correct)</strong><br data-start="214" data-end="217" />But RMAN already created a new&nbsp;<strong data-start="250" data-end="275">SPFILE in ASM earlier</strong><br data-start="275" data-end="278" />Now Oracle is not using it yet.</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="313" data-end="384">We must now&nbsp;<strong data-start="325" data-end="383">create the SPFILE properly and then add RAC parameters</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="386" data-end="415">Right now the flow should be:</p>
<p data-start="417" data-end="481">PFILE ➜ create SPFILE ➜ add RAC params ➜ restart ➜ run duplicate</p>
<hr data-start="483" data-end="486" />
<h1 data-section-id="1p3wru8" data-start="488" data-end="534">🔴 Step 1 &mdash; Create SPFILE From Current PFILE</h1>
<p data-start="536" data-end="576">You are currently in NOMOUNT with PFILE.</p>
<p data-start="578" data-end="582">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">create</span> spfile<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/spfilePRODCDB_DR.ora'</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">from</span> pfile<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'$ORACLE_HOME/dbs/initPRODCDB.ora'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<h1 data-section-id="1ljpkx0" data-start="1402" data-end="1444">🔴 Step 5 &mdash; Now Run RMAN Duplicate Again</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">rman target sys/sys123@PRODCDB_PROD auxiliary sys/sys123@10.61.185.221:1521/PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1546" data-end="1551">Then:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">duplicate target database for standby from active database nofilenamecheck;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1642" data-end="1705">(Notice: now we DO NOT need SPFILE clause &mdash; already configured)</p>
<hr data-start="1707" data-end="1710" />
<h1 data-section-id="s0jomb" data-start="1712" data-end="1732">Why This Fix Works</h1>
<p data-start="1734" data-end="1765">Previously RMAN failed because:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="1767" data-end="1912">
<thead data-start="1767" data-end="1787">
<tr data-start="1767" data-end="1787">
<th class="" data-start="1767" data-end="1777" data-col-size="sm">Problem</th>
<th class="" data-start="1777" data-end="1787" data-col-size="sm">Result</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="1804" data-end="1912">
<tr data-start="1804" data-end="1845">
<td data-start="1804" data-end="1814" data-col-size="sm">No SPFILE</td>
<td data-start="1814" data-end="1845" data-col-size="sm">Cannot store RAC parameters</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1846" data-end="1885">
<td data-start="1846" data-end="1865" data-col-size="sm">No instance_number</td>
<td data-start="1865" data-end="1885" data-col-size="sm">RAC cannot start</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1886" data-end="1912">
<td data-start="1886" data-end="1899" data-col-size="sm">RMAN restart</td>
<td data-start="1899" data-end="1912" data-col-size="sm">ORA-29760</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1914" data-end="1981">Now we manually prepare standby RAC instance before RMAN continues.</p>
<hr data-start="1983" data-end="1986" />
<p data-start="1988" data-end="2017">After startup nomount, paste:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> spfile;<br />show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> instance_number;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2086" data-end="2158" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">That will confirm we are finally ready for full duplicate restore phase.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>

<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">

<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">SQL&gt; create spfile='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/spfilePRODCDB_DR.ora' from pfile='$ORACLE_HOME/dbs/initPRODCDB.ora'; create spfile='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/spfilePRODCDB_DR.ora' from pfile='$ORACLE_HOME/dbs/initPRODCDB.ora' * ERROR at line 1: ORA-01078: failure in processing system parameters LRM-00109: could not open parameter file '/oracle/app/oracle/database/19.3.0/dbhome_1/dbs/initPRODCDB.ora' SQL&gt; SELECT instance_name, status FROM v$instance; INSTANCE_NAME STATUS ---------------- ------------ PRODCDB_DR STARTED SQL&gt;</div>

<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="db368d37-2239-4d80-bd60-34b32d7fd7a5" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="34">Perfect 👍 &mdash; this error is simple.</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">LRM-00109: could not open parameter file<br />'/oracle/app/oracle/database/19.3.0/dbhome_1/dbs/initPRODCDB.ora'</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="152" data-end="173">Oracle is looking in:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">/oracle/app/oracle/database/19.3.0/dbhome_1/dbs/</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="233" data-end="287">But earlier your ORACLE_HOME was different (RAC home).</p>
<p data-start="289" data-end="352">So the PFILE path you provided does&nbsp;<strong data-start="325" data-end="338">not exist</strong>&nbsp;in this home.</p>
<hr data-start="354" data-end="357" />
<h1 data-section-id="1ckfmmq" data-start="359" data-end="397">🔎 First Confirm Current ORACLE_HOME</h1>
<p data-start="399" data-end="408">From SQL:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">host echo $ORACLE_HOME</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="445" data-end="459">Or from shell:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">echo</span> <span class="ͼe">$ORACLE_HOME</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="492" data-end="520">It will show something like:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">/oracle/app/oracle/database/19.3.0/dbhome_1</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="575" data-end="622">That means your correct PFILE location must be:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">$ORACLE_HOME/dbs/initPRODCDB.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="666" data-end="669" />
<h1 data-section-id="h7kttc" data-start="671" data-end="697">🔴 Check If PFILE Exists</h1>
<p data-start="699" data-end="710">From shell:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">ls</span> <span class="ͼe">$ORACLE_HOME</span>/dbs/initPRODCDB.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="761" data-end="809">If file does NOT exist &rarr; that is why error came.</p>
<hr data-start="811" data-end="814" />
<h1 data-section-id="1kbjzw4" data-start="816" data-end="823">✅ Fix</h1>
<p data-start="825" data-end="865">Create PFILE in the correct ORACLE_HOME:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">vi</span> <span class="ͼe">$ORACLE_HOME</span>/dbs/initPRODCDB.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="916" data-end="920">Put:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">db_name=PRODCDB<br />db_unique_name=PRODCDB_DR<br />compatible=19.0.0<br />db_create_file_dest='+DATA'<br />db_create_online_log_dest_1='+DATA'<br />diagnostic_dest='/oracle/app/oracle'<br />cluster_database=true<br />instance_number=1<br />thread=1</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1144" data-end="1149">Save.</p>
<hr data-start="1151" data-end="1154" />
<h1 data-section-id="t61oox" data-start="1156" data-end="1185">🔴 Restart Using That PFILE</h1>

<h1 data-section-id="1347yvt" data-start="1849" data-end="1871">💡 Why This Happened</h1>
<p data-start="1873" data-end="1921">You switched ORACLE_HOME during troubleshooting.</p>
<p data-start="1923" data-end="1966">Oracle tried to read PFILE from wrong home.</p>
<p data-start="1968" data-end="1992">Very common in RAC when:</p>
<ul data-start="1994" data-end="2042">
<li data-section-id="1v9lfvj" data-start="1994" data-end="2005">
<p data-start="1996" data-end="2005">Grid home</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="b3pwf5" data-start="2006" data-end="2015">
<p data-start="2008" data-end="2015">DB home</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1ydo9ek" data-start="2016" data-end="2042">
<p data-start="2018" data-end="2042">Multiple 19c homes exist</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="2044" data-end="2047" />
<p data-start="2049" data-end="2053">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">echo</span> <span class="ͼe">$ORACLE_HOME</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2086" data-end="2146" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">and paste it &mdash; I&rsquo;ll confirm correct path before you proceed.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
