<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">restoring datafile 2<br />restoring datafile 3<br />...</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="677" data-end="682">Then:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Starting media recovery<br />Media recovery complete<br />Finished Duplicate Db</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="763" data-end="766" />
<h1 data-section-id="biyb3l" data-start="768" data-end="798">⚠ If It Pauses for Long Time</h1>
<p data-start="800" data-end="914">For large SYSTEM tablespace, it may look stuck for a few minutes.<br data-start="865" data-end="868" />That is normal &mdash; network restore from primary.</p>
<p data-start="916" data-end="954">You can monitor progress from standby:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">select</span> opname, sofar, totalwork, round(sofar<span class="ͼ8">/</span>totalwork<span class="ͼ8">*</span><span class="ͼb">100</span>,<span class="ͼb">2</span>) pct_done<br /><span class="ͼ8">from</span> v$session_longops<br /><span class="ͼ8">where</span> totalwork <span class="ͼ8">&gt;</span> <span class="ͼb">0</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1083" data-end="1086" />
<h1 data-section-id="4h37gk" data-start="1088" data-end="1106">🚀 At This Point</h1>
<p data-start="1108" data-end="1134">You have officially fixed:</p>
<ul data-start="1136" data-end="1237">
<li data-section-id="118zcjs" data-start="1136" data-end="1147">
<p data-start="1138" data-end="1147">ORA-15173</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="i3fo5j" data-start="1148" data-end="1169">
<p data-start="1150" data-end="1169">ASM directory issue</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="km1mav" data-start="1170" data-end="1195">
<p data-start="1172" data-end="1195">File name convert issue</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1lfilev" data-start="1196" data-end="1214">
<p data-start="1198" data-end="1214">SPFILE confusion</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="yy1o97" data-start="1215" data-end="1237">
<p data-start="1217" data-end="1237">OMF misconfiguration</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1239" data-end="1290">This was the root of the whole duplication failure.</p>
<hr data-start="1292" data-end="1295" />
<p data-start="1297" data-end="1308">Let it run.</p>
<p data-start="1310" data-end="1358">If it fails again, paste only the error section.</p>
<p data-start="1360" data-end="1383">Otherwise once you see:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Finished Duplicate Db</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1416" data-end="1458" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">we move to final standby activation steps.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>

[oracle@racnoden1 dbs] \] su - grid Password: [grid@racnoden1 ~] asmcmd ASMCMD&gt; cd DATA_REP/STDBYDG/ ASMCMD&gt; mkdir PARAMETERFILE ASMCMD&gt; cd PARAMETERFILE ASMCMD&gt; pwd +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE ASMCMD&gt; exit [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ sqlplus "/as sysdba" SQL&gt; create spfile='+DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora' from pfile='initSTDBY1.ora'; File created. SQL&gt; shut immediate; ORA-01109: database not open Database dismounted. exit ORACLE instance shut down. SQL&gt; Disconnected from Oracle Database 19c Enterprise Edition Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production Version 19.3.0.0.0 -&gt; Take backup fo Current SPFILE and Edit SPFILE entry in init file on Both nodes as below. [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ mv initSTDBY1.ora initSTDBY1.ora_BKP [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ cat initSTDBY1.ora spfile='+DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora' [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ [oracle@racnoden2 dbs]$ mv initSTDBY1.ora initSTDBY1.ora_BKP [oracle@racnoden2 dbs]$ cat initSTDBY1.ora spfile='+DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora' [oracle@racnoden2 dbs]$ [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ sqlplus "/as sysdba" SQL&gt; startup mount; ORACLE instance started. SQL&gt; exit Disconnected from Oracle Database 19c Enterprise Edition Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production Version 19.3.0.0.0 18=&gt; Set parameter for Standby database as below to Enable NODE-2 as RAC SQL&gt; alter system set undo_tablespace=UNDOTBS2 sid='STDBY2' scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; alter system set instance_number=1 sid='STDBY1' scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; alter system set instance_number=2 sid='STDBY2' scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; alter system set thread=1 sid='STDBY1' scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; alter system set thread=2 sid='STDBY2' scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; alter system set cluster_database=TRUE scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; alter system set remote_listener='racnode-scan:1521' scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; 19=&gt; Stop database and add the same to CRS as below. [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ SQL&gt; shut immediate; ORA-01109: database not open Database dismounted. ORACLE instance shut down. SQL&gt; exit Disconnected from Oracle Database 19c Enterprise Edition Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production Version 19.3.0.0.0 /ora_home/app/19c/db [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ srvctl add database -db STDBYDG -oraclehome /ora_home/app/19c/db -role physical_standby -startoption mount -spfile +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ srvctl add instance -db STDBYDG -instance STDBY1 -node racnoden1 [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ srvctl add instance -db STDBYDG -instance STDBY2 -node racnoden2 [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ srvctl start database -d STDBYDG [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ srvctl status database -d STDBYDG Instance STDBY1 is running on node racnoden1 Instance STDBY2 is running on node racnoden2 [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ sqlplus "/as sysdba" SQL&gt; select name,open_mode,database_role,cdb from gv$ database; NAME OPEN_MODE DATABASE_ROLE CDB --------- -------------------- ---------------- --- NTNT MOUNTED PHYSICAL STANDBY NO NTNT MOUNTED PHYSICAL STANDBY NO SQL&gt; Disconnected from Oracle Database 19c Enterprise Edition Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production Version 19.3.0.0.0 -&gt; Check CRS status as below. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [oracle@racnoden1 ~]$ 20 =&gt; Adding Passwordfile to ASM for STANDBY database as below. [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ srvctl config database -d STDBYDG Database unique name: STDBYDG Database name: Oracle home: /ora_home/app/19c/db Oracle user: oracle Spfile: +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora Password file: &lt;&lt;&lt; copy passwordfile from $ ORACLE_HOME/dbs to /tmp/orapwSTDBY location and move to ASM as below [oracle@racnoden1 dbs] $ su - grid Password: [grid@racnoden1 ~]$ asmcmd ASMCMD&gt; ls DATA_REP/ FRA_RECO/ OCR/ ASMCMD&gt; pwcopy --dbuniquename STDBYDG /tmp/orapwSTDBY +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PASSWORD/orapwSTDBYDG -f copying /tmp/orapwSTDBY -&gt; +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PASSWORD/orapwSTDBYDG ASMCMD-9453: failed to register password file as a CRS resource ASMCMD&gt; exit -&gt; Add password file to CRS as below [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ srvctl modify database -d STDBYDG -pwfile +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PASSWORD/orapwSTDBYDG -&gt; Get passwordfile info as below [oracle@racnoden1 ~]$ srvctl config database -d STDBYDG Database unique name: STDBYDG Database name: NTNT Oracle home: /ora_home/app/19c/db Oracle user: oracle Spfile: +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora Password file: +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PASSWORD/orapwSTDBYDG Domain: ace2oracle.lab Start options: mount Stop options: immediate Database role: PHYSICAL_STANDBY Management policy: AUTOMATIC Server pools: Disk Groups: DATA_REP,FRA_RECO Mount point paths: Services: Type: RAC Start concurrency: Stop concurrency: OSDBA group: oinstall OSOPER group: oper Database instances: STDBY1,STDBY2 Configured nodes: racnoden1,racnoden2 CSS critical: no CPU count: 0 Memory target: 0 Maximum memory: 0 Default network number for database services: Database is administrator managed -&gt;Move/ Remove orapwSTDBYDG1 and orapwSTDBYDG2 from NODE-1 and NODE-2 of $ ORACLE_HOME/dbs location [oracle@racnoden1 dbs] $ mv orapwSTDBY1 orapwSTDBY1_OLD [oracle@racnoden2 dbs]$ mv orapwSTDBY2 orapwSTDBY2_OLD 21=&gt; Enable MRP as below. [oracle@racnoden1 ~]$ sqlplus "/as sysdba" SQL&gt; alter database recover managed standby database disconnect from session; Database altered. 22=&gt; Check status of logs at Primary and then on Standby as below -&gt; Primary. SQL&gt; select thread#,max(sequence#) from v$archived_log where archived='YES' group by thread#; System altered. SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; THREAD# MAX(SEQUENCE#) ---------- -------------- 1 103 2 105 SQL&gt; -&gt;Standby SQL&gt; select thread#,max(sequence#) from v$archived_log where applied='YES' group by thread#; THREAD# MAX(SEQUENCE#) ---------- -------------- 1 101 2 98 SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SELECT ARCH.THREAD# "Thread", ARCH.SEQUENCE# "Last Sequence Received", APPL.SEQUENCE# "Last Sequence Applied", (ARCH.SEQUENCE# - APPL.SEQUENCE#) "Difference" FROM (SELECT THREAD# ,SEQUENCE# FROM V$ARCHIVED_LOG WHERE (THREAD#,FIRST_TIME ) IN (SELECT THREAD#,MAX(FIRST_TIME) FROM V$ARCHIVED_LOG GROUP BY THREAD#)) ARCH, (SELECT THREAD# ,SEQUENCE# FROM V$LOG_HISTORY WHERE (THREAD#,FIRST_TIME ) IN (SELECT THREAD#,MAX(FIRST_TIME) FROM V$LOG_HISTORY GROUP BY THREAD#)) APPL WHERE ARCH.THREAD# = APPL.THREAD# ORDER BY 1; Thread Last Sequence Received Last Sequence Applied Difference ---------- ---------------------- --------------------- ---------- 1 103 102 1 2 104 104 0 -&gt; Check Stats as below SQL&gt; set linesize 120 col START_TIME format a20 col ITEM format a20 SELECT TO_CHAR(START_TIME, 'DD-MON-RR HH24:MI:SS') START_TIME, ITEM , SOFAR, UNITS FROM V$RECOVERY_PROGRESS WHERE ITEM IN ('Active Apply Rate', 'Average Apply Rate', 'Redo Applied');SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; 2 3 START_TIME ITEM SOFAR UNITS -------------------- -------------------- ---------- -------------------------------- 27-JAN-23 22:42:51 Active Apply Rate 124 KB/sec 27-JAN-23 22:42:51 Average Apply Rate 34 KB/sec 27-JAN-23 22:42:51 Redo Applied 84 Megabytes SQL&gt; col NAME for a13 col VALUE for a13 col UNIT for a30 set LINES 132 SELECT NAME, VALUE, UNIT, TIME_COMPUTED FROM V$DATAGUARD_STATS WHERE NAME IN ('transport lag', 'apply lag');SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; 2 NAME VALUE UNIT TIME_COMPUTED ------------- ------------- ------------------------------ ------------------------------ transport lag +00 00:00:00 day(2) to second(0) interval 01/27/2023 23:25:36 apply lag +00 00:00:00 day(2) to second(0) interval 01/27/2023 23:25:36 SQL&gt; <p data-start="81" data-end="228">Your standby database is now created and RMAN already applied archivelogs<br data-start="154" data-end="157" />(the &ldquo;deleted archived log&rdquo; lines mean recovery was running correctly).</p>
<p data-start="230" data-end="326">Now we DO NOT follow the RAC article exactly ❌<br data-start="276" data-end="279" />Because your DR is&nbsp;<strong data-start="298" data-end="326">single node (node1 only)</strong></p>
<p data-start="328" data-end="415">So we will convert those RAC steps &rarr;&nbsp;<strong data-start="365" data-end="415">Single-Instance Physical Standby configuration</strong></p>
<hr data-start="417" data-end="420" />

<h1 data-section-id="ddexa" data-start="2138" data-end="2179">STEP-7 Configure Auto Start (IMPORTANT)</h1>

<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">srvctl add database <span class="ͼf">-db</span> PRODCDB_DR \<br /> <span class="ͼf">-oraclehome</span> <span class="ͼe">$ORACLE_HOME</span> \<br /> <span class="ͼf">-role</span> physical_standby \<br /> <span class="ͼf">-startoption</span> mount \<br /> <span class="ͼf">-spfile</span> <span class="ͼ8">+</span>DATA/PRODCDB_DR/spfilePRODCDB_DR.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2405" data-end="2418">Add instance:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">srvctl add instance <span class="ͼf">-db</span> PRODCDB_DR <span class="ͼf">-instance</span> PRODCDB_DR <span class="ͼf">-node</span> erpproddb1-dr</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2509" data-end="2523">Start via CRS:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">srvctl <span class="ͼd">start</span> database <span class="ͼf">-d</span> PRODCDB_DR<br />srvctl status database <span class="ͼf">-d</span> PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2611" data-end="2614" />
<h1 data-section-id="1jgyn9e" data-start="2616" data-end="2661">STEP-8 Enable Real-Time Apply (Recommended)</h1>
<p data-start="2663" data-end="2678">Stop MRP first:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> database recover managed standby database cancel;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2748" data-end="2770">Start real-time apply:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> database recover managed standby database <span class="ͼ8">using</span> <span class="ͼ8">current</span> logfile <span class="ͼ8">disconnect</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2866" data-end="2869" />
<h1 data-section-id="1501o9k" data-start="2871" data-end="2913">STEP-9 Final Validation (Very Important)</h1>
<p data-start="2915" data-end="2949">Run this every DR must-have query:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span><br /> process,<br /> client_process,<br /> sequence#,<br /> status<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$managed_standby;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3045" data-end="3058">You must see:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 APPLYING_LOG<br />RFS IDLE/RECEIVING</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="3107" data-end="3110" />
<h1 data-section-id="4jpgw3" data-start="3112" data-end="3120">DONE ✅</h1>
<p data-start="3122" data-end="3149">Your DR is now operational.</p>
<hr data-start="3151" data-end="3154" />
<h2 data-section-id="2pmkx3" data-start="3156" data-end="3181">What You Have Achieved</h2>
<p data-start="3182" data-end="3195">You now have:</p>
<p data-start="3197" data-end="3318">&bull; Active Data Guard standby<br data-start="3224" data-end="3227" />&bull; Continuous redo apply<br data-start="3250" data-end="3253" />&bull; Automatic archivelog shipping<br data-start="3284" data-end="3287" />&bull; Crash-ready failover database</p>
<hr data-start="3320" data-end="3323" />
<p data-start="3325" data-end="3354">Next step after this (later):</p>
<blockquote data-start="3355" data-end="3386">
<p data-start="3357" data-end="3386">Switchover / Failover testing</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="3388" data-end="3473" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Tell me once MRP shows&nbsp;<strong data-start="3411" data-end="3427">APPLYING_LOG</strong>&nbsp;&mdash; then I will give switchover test procedure.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>

<p data-start="0" data-end="61">Perfect 👍<br data-start="10" data-end="13" />This output is&nbsp;<strong data-start="28" data-end="61">exactly what we wanted to see</strong></p>
<p data-start="63" data-end="91">All files are created under:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

</div>
</div>

<p data-start="123" data-end="134">That means:</p>
<p data-start="136" data-end="309">✔ RMAN DUPLICATE mapped storage correctly<br data-start="177" data-end="180" />✔ PDB files also created correctly<br data-start="214" data-end="217" />✔ OMF (Oracle Managed Files) working<br data-start="253" data-end="256" />✔ No missing datafiles<br data-start="278" data-end="281" />✔ Standby structure is VALID</p>
<p data-start="311" data-end="358">So storage side =&nbsp;<strong data-start="329" data-end="358">100% healthy standby copy</strong></p>
<hr data-start="360" data-end="363" />
<h1 data-section-id="4rw3ub" data-start="365" data-end="410">NOW &rarr; Start Redo Apply (Real DR Activation)</h1>
<p data-start="412" data-end="502">Your database is currently only a&nbsp;<strong data-start="446" data-end="464">copied standby</strong><br data-start="464" data-end="467" />It is NOT yet syncing with primary.</p>
<p data-start="504" data-end="553">We now convert it into a real Data Guard standby.</p>
<hr data-start="555" data-end="558" />
<h2 data-section-id="1t7jdrd" data-start="560" data-end="587">1️⃣ Confirm standby role</h2>
<p data-start="588" data-end="592">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">select</span> name, open_mode, database_role <span class="ͼ8">from</span> v$database;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="661" data-end="691">Tell me output &mdash; but expected:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MOUNTED | PHYSICAL STANDBY</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="729" data-end="750">If mounted &rarr; continue</p>
<hr data-start="752" data-end="755" />
<h2 data-section-id="7ex24i" data-start="757" data-end="803">2️⃣ Start Managed Recovery (VERY IMPORTANT)</h2>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">USING</span> <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span> LOGFILE <span class="ͼ8">DISCONNECT</span> <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> <span class="ͼ8">SESSION</span>;</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">

<h2 data-section-id="1cpdjo6" data-start="1128" data-end="1159">4️⃣ Verify Logs Are Reaching</h2>
<p data-start="1161" data-end="1182">Run every 20 seconds:</p>
<h3 data-section-id="rcr93f" data-start="1184" data-end="1198">On PRIMARY</h3>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<h3 data-section-id="wznx80" data-start="1254" data-end="1268">On STANDBY</h3>

<hr data-start="1390" data-end="1393" />
<h1 data-section-id="m50z61" data-start="1395" data-end="1424">After this your DR becomes:</h1>
<p data-start="1425" data-end="1468"><strong data-start="1425" data-end="1468">Real-time synchronized standby database</strong></p>
<p data-start="1470" data-end="1529">Not backup.<br data-start="1481" data-end="1484" />Not clone.<br data-start="1494" data-end="1497" />Actual disaster recovery server.</p>
<hr data-start="1531" data-end="1534" />
<p data-start="1536" data-end="1670" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Run step 1 &amp; 2 and send me&nbsp;<code data-start="1563" data-end="1582">v$managed_standby</code>&nbsp;output &mdash;<br data-start="1591" data-end="1594" />that will confirm whether redo transport is working or network issue exists.</p>

</div>

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

</div>
</div>

</div>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="870c41d4-1ea0-4a2a-aa46-0d3d4ee9c659" data-testid="conversation-turn-41" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">

<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">what about these steps article mentioned why donot require to follow this part of this article https://ace2oracle.com/listing-detail.php?title=creating-an-oracle-19c-physical-standby-rac-database-from-a-primary-rac-database-using-active-duplication&amp;id=113 17=&gt; Copy parameter file to ASM as below. [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ su - grid Password: [grid@racnoden1 ~]$ asmcmd ASMCMD&gt; cd DATA_REP/STDBYDG/ ASMCMD&gt; mkdir PARAMETERFILE ASMCMD&gt; cd PARAMETERFILE ASMCMD&gt; pwd +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE ASMCMD&gt; exit [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ sqlplus "/as sysdba" SQL&gt; create spfile='+DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora' from pfile='initSTDBY1.ora'; File created. SQL&gt; shut immediate; ORA-01109: database not open Database dismounted. exit ORACLE instance shut down. SQL&gt; Disconnected from Oracle Database 19c Enterprise Edition Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production Version 19.3.0.0.0 -&gt; Take backup fo Current SPFILE and Edit SPFILE entry in init file on Both nodes as below. [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ mv initSTDBY1.ora initSTDBY1.ora_BKP [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ cat initSTDBY1.ora spfile='+DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora' [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ [oracle@racnoden2 dbs]$ mv initSTDBY1.ora initSTDBY1.ora_BKP [oracle@racnoden2 dbs]$ cat initSTDBY1.ora spfile='+DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora' [oracle@racnoden2 dbs]$ [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ sqlplus "/as sysdba" SQL&gt; startup mount; ORACLE instance started. Total System Global Area 2751463160 bytes Fixed Size 8900344 bytes Variable Size 570425344 bytes Database Buffers 2164260864 bytes Redo Buffers 7876608 bytes Database mounted. SQL&gt; exit Disconnected from Oracle Database 19c Enterprise Edition Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production Version 19.3.0.0.0</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex justify-end">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="f9149b51-85d9-498a-aa73-a3ceb321fcb3" data-testid="conversation-turn-42" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">

<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="106">Very good question 👌 &mdash; this is exactly where most people get confused when following RAC &rarr; Standby blogs.</p>
<p data-start="108" data-end="121">Short answer:</p>
<p data-start="123" data-end="263">👉&nbsp;<strong data-start="126" data-end="187">You already DID that step automatically during DUPLICATE.</strong><br data-start="187" data-end="190" />That article is written for a slightly different architecture than yours.</p>
<p data-start="265" data-end="329">So you are not skipping it &mdash; it already happened in another way.</p>
<hr data-start="331" data-end="334" />
<h1 data-section-id="w53org" data-start="336" data-end="375">What that article step actually means</h1>
<p data-start="377" data-end="409">That section is doing ONLY this:</p>
<blockquote data-start="411" data-end="500">
<p data-start="413" data-end="500">Move the parameter file (spfile) into ASM and make both RAC nodes read the same spfile.</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="502" data-end="517">Because in RAC:</p>
<ul data-start="518" data-end="599">
<li data-section-id="1ljhp5y" data-start="518" data-end="564">
<p data-start="520" data-end="564">Both nodes MUST use one shared SPFILE in ASM</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1972aed" data-start="565" data-end="599">
<p data-start="567" data-end="599">Otherwise cluster will not start</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="601" data-end="618">They manually do:</p>
<ol data-start="620" data-end="715">
<li data-section-id="xyqw7j" data-start="620" data-end="643">
<p data-start="623" data-end="643">Create ASM directory</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1f8vefw" data-start="644" data-end="671">
<p data-start="647" data-end="671">Create SPFILE inside ASM</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="588hux" data-start="672" data-end="715">
<p data-start="675" data-end="715">Replace local init.ora with pointer file</p>
</li>
</ol>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">initSTDBY1.ora<br />&rarr; contains only:<br />spfile='+DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora'</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="815" data-end="859">So clusterware knows where config is stored.</p>
<hr data-start="861" data-end="864" />
<h1 data-section-id="4smvf9" data-start="866" data-end="896">Why YOU don&rsquo;t need this step</h1>
<p data-start="898" data-end="928">Look at your output carefully:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">SQL&gt; show parameter spfile;<br /><br />+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/spfileprodcdb_dr.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1006" data-end="1020">🚩 This means:</p>
<p data-start="1022" data-end="1072">Oracle is ALREADY booting using SPFILE inside ASM.</p>
<p data-start="1074" data-end="1101">And you created it earlier:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">create spfile='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/spfilePRODCDB_DR.ora'<br />from pfile='$ORACLE_HOME/dbs/initprodcdb_dr.ora';</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1216" data-end="1243">So your system already has:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="1245" data-end="1418">
<thead data-start="1245" data-end="1262">
<tr data-start="1245" data-end="1262">
<th class="" data-start="1245" data-end="1252" data-col-size="sm">Item</th>
<th class="" data-start="1252" data-end="1262" data-col-size="sm">Status</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="1278" data-end="1418">
<tr data-start="1278" data-end="1307">
<td data-start="1278" data-end="1294" data-col-size="sm">SPFILE in ASM</td>
<td data-start="1294" data-end="1307" data-col-size="sm">✅ Already</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1308" data-end="1349">
<td data-start="1308" data-end="1336" data-col-size="sm">Database using ASM SPFILE</td>
<td data-start="1336" data-end="1349" data-col-size="sm">✅ Already</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1350" data-end="1418">
<td data-start="1350" data-end="1374" data-col-size="sm">Need pointer init.ora</td>
<td data-start="1374" data-end="1418" data-col-size="sm">❌ Not required (single instance standby)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1420" data-end="1423" />
<h1 data-section-id="1emddes" data-start="1425" data-end="1475">The real reason &mdash; RAC vs Single Instance Standby</h1>
<p data-start="1477" data-end="1492">The article is:</p>
<blockquote data-start="1494" data-end="1521">
<p data-start="1496" data-end="1521">RAC PRIMARY &rarr; RAC STANDBY</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="1523" data-end="1537">Your setup is:</p>
<blockquote data-start="1539" data-end="1578">
<p data-start="1541" data-end="1578">RAC PRIMARY &rarr; SINGLE INSTANCE STANDBY</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="1580" data-end="1604">This changes everything.</p>
<hr data-start="1606" data-end="1609" />
<h2 data-section-id="1ua80yc" data-start="1611" data-end="1643">In RAC standby (article case)</h2>
<p data-start="1645" data-end="1713">Each node starts using local init file &rarr; must redirect to ASM spfile</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Node1 init.ora<br />Node2 init.ora<br /> &rarr; both must point to shared spfile</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1790" data-end="1812">So they edit init.ora.</p>
<hr data-start="1814" data-end="1817" />
<h2 data-section-id="pbegw4" data-start="1819" data-end="1837">In your standby</h2>
<p data-start="1839" data-end="1890">You are not using srvctl / clusterware to start DB.</p>
<p data-start="1892" data-end="1914">You start DB manually:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">sqlplus / as sysdba<br />startup mount</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1959" data-end="2027">So Oracle reads SPFILE directly from ASM &mdash; no pointer file required.</p>
<hr data-start="2029" data-end="2032" />
<h1 data-section-id="3nf5xc" data-start="2034" data-end="2060">Proof from your database</h1>
<p data-start="2062" data-end="2079">This confirms it:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">DATABASE_ROLE : PHYSICAL STANDBY<br />OPEN_MODE : MOUNTED<br />SPFILE : +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/spfileprodcdb_dr.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2201" data-end="2261">If that article step was missing &mdash; database would NOT start.</p>
<hr data-start="2263" data-end="2266" />
<h1 data-section-id="1kva2fu" data-start="2268" data-end="2300">When would you need that step?</h1>
<p data-start="2302" data-end="2343">Only if you convert standby to RAC later:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Single Instance Standby &rarr; RAC Standby</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2392" data-end="2413">Then you must create:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">$ORACLE_HOME/dbs/initPRODCDB_DR1.ora<br />$ORACLE_HOME/dbs/initPRODCDB_DR2.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2498" data-end="2514">Each containing:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">spfile='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/spfileprodcdb_dr.ora'</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2572" data-end="2575" />
<h1 data-section-id="1r7krwp" data-start="2577" data-end="2595">Final Conclusion</h1>
<p data-start="2597" data-end="2679">You skipped nothing ✔<br data-start="2618" data-end="2621" />You did a&nbsp;<strong data-start="2631" data-end="2679">modern method (correct for Active Duplicate)</strong></p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="2681" data-end="2921">
<thead data-start="2681" data-end="2711">
<tr data-start="2681" data-end="2711">
<th class="" data-start="2681" data-end="2696" data-col-size="sm">Article Step</th>
<th class="" data-start="2696" data-end="2711" data-col-size="sm">Your System</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="2736" data-end="2921">
<tr data-start="2736" data-end="2771">
<td data-start="2736" data-end="2755" data-col-size="sm">Manual SPFILE copy</td>
<td data-start="2755" data-end="2771" data-col-size="sm">Not required</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="2772" data-end="2816">
<td data-start="2772" data-end="2795" data-col-size="sm">ASM directory creation</td>
<td data-start="2795" data-end="2816" data-col-size="sm">RMAN auto-created</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="2817" data-end="2848">
<td data-start="2817" data-end="2834" data-col-size="sm">Pointer init.ora</td>
<td data-start="2834" data-end="2848" data-col-size="sm">Not needed</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="2849" data-end="2899">
<td data-start="2849" data-end="2866" data-col-size="sm">Shutdown/startup</td>
<td data-start="2866" data-end="2899" data-col-size="sm">Already done during duplicate</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="2900" data-end="2921">
<td data-start="2900" data-end="2914" data-col-size="sm">Standby ready</td>
<td data-start="2914" data-end="2921" data-col-size="sm">YES</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2923" data-end="2926" />
<h1 data-section-id="1w07u6q" data-start="2928" data-end="2946">What matters now</h1>
<p data-start="2947" data-end="2995">You are already at&nbsp;<strong data-start="2966" data-end="2994">last phase of Data Guard</strong>:</p>
<p data-start="2997" data-end="3006">Just run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ALTER DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE USING CURRENT LOGFILE DISCONNECT;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3099" data-end="3152">That is the real final step &mdash; not the spfile section.</p>
<hr data-start="3154" data-end="3157" />
<p data-start="3159" data-end="3249" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Send me&nbsp;<code data-start="3167" data-end="3186">v$managed_standby</code>&nbsp;after starting recovery &mdash; we&rsquo;ll confirm redo shipping is live.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="7a5f602a-6c3d-4c6a-b8d6-e4645420c40d" data-testid="conversation-turn-43" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="user" data-message-id="7a5f602a-6c3d-4c6a-b8d6-e4645420c40d">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden items-end rtl:items-start">
<div class="user-message-bubble-color corner-superellipse/0.98 relative rounded-[22px] px-4 py-2.5 leading-6 max-w-(--user-chat-width,70%)">
<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">Then what are these steps do please explain Yes &mdash; since you want to focus only on Node 1 (erpproddb1-dr) for now, here are the exact post-duplication steps adapted for a single node (Node 1 only). These steps are based on the Ace2Oracle guide (steps 16&ndash;22), but simplified to work on one node only (no RAC configuration yet). You can later extend to Node 2 when ready. Important Notes Before Starting Assume duplicate has completed successfully ("Finished Duplicate Db"). Instance name on Node 1: PRODCDB_DR (or PRODCDB_DR1 if you set it). Run all commands as oracle user unless specified (grid for asmcmd). Oracle home: /oracle/app/oracle/database/19.3.0/dbhome_1 ASM diskgroup for data: +DATA PFILE: /oracle/app/oracle/database/19.3.0/dbhome_1/dbs/initprodcdb_dr.ora Steps for Node 1 Only (erpproddb1-dr) Step 16 &ndash; Verify Files on Standby (Node 1) Bashsqlplus / as sysdba SQL-- Datafiles SELECT name FROM v$datafile; -- Redo logs (online + standby redo) SELECT member FROM v$logfile; -- Control files SHOW PARAMETER control_files; Expected: Datafiles in +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/DATAFILE/... Redo logs in +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/ONLINELOG/... or +FRA/... Control files: +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/CONTROLFILE/... If files are missing &rarr; duplicate did not finish properly &rarr; retry duplicate. Step 17 &ndash; Copy pfile to ASM as SPFILE (Node 1) Bashsu - grid asmcmd cd +DATA/PRODCDB_DR mkdir PARAMETERFILE cd PARAMETERFILE pwd -- confirm: +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PARAMETERFILE exit Back as oracle: Bashsqlplus / as sysdba CREATE SPFILE='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PARAMETERFILE/spfileprodcdb_dr.ora' FROM PFILE='/oracle/app/oracle/database/19.3.0/dbhome_1/dbs/initprodcdb_dr.ora'; SHUTDOWN IMMEDIATE; exit Backup &amp; update init file to use SPFILE: Bashcd $ORACLE_HOME/dbs mv initprodcdb_dr.ora initprodcdb_dr.ora.bak echo "spfile='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PARAMETERFILE/spfileprodcdb_dr.ora'" &gt; initprodcdb_dr.ora Step 18 &ndash; Set Parameters (Single Instance &ndash; Node 1 Only) SQLsqlplus / as sysdba SQL-- Single instance settings (Node 1) ALTER SYSTEM SET instance_number=1 SID='*' SCOPE=SPFILE; ALTER SYSTEM SET instance_name='PRODCDB_DR' SID='*' SCOPE=SPFILE; ALTER SYSTEM SET thread=1 SID='*' SCOPE=SPFILE; -- Common standby settings ALTER SYSTEM SET cluster_database=FALSE SCOPE=SPFILE; -- single instance for now ALTER SYSTEM SET standby_file_management='AUTO' SCOPE=BOTH; ALTER SYSTEM SET fal_server='PRODCDB' SCOPE=BOTH; ALTER SYSTEM SET fal_client='PRODCDB_DR' SCOPE=BOTH; ALTER SYSTEM SET remote_listener='erpproddb-scan.pspcl.in:1521' SCOPE=SPFILE; SHUTDOWN IMMEDIATE; STARTUP MOUNT; Verify: SQLSHOW PARAMETER instance_number; SHOW PARAMETER cluster_database; -- FALSE SELECT name, open_mode, database_role FROM v$database; -- MOUNTED, PHYSICAL STANDBY Step 19 &ndash; Register Database with CRS (Node 1 Only &ndash; Single Instance Mode) Bashsrvctl add database -db PRODCDB_DR \ -oraclehome /oracle/app/oracle/database/19.3.0/dbhome_1 \ -role physical_standby \ -startoption mount \ -spfile +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PARAMETERFILE/spfileprodcdb_dr.ora \ -diskgroup DATA,FRA srvctl add instance -db PRODCDB_DR -instance PRODCDB_DR -node erpproddb1-dr srvctl start database -d PRODCDB_DR srvctl status database -d PRODCDB_DR Verify: Bashsrvctl config database -d PRODCDB_DR Step 20 &ndash; Add Password File to ASM &amp; CRS (Node 1) Bashsu - grid asmcmd pwcopy --dbuniquename PRODCDB_DR $ORACLE_HOME/dbs/orapwPRODCDB_DR +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PASSWORD/orapwPRODCDB_DR -f exit Update CRS: Bashsrvctl modify database -d PRODCDB_DR -pwfile +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PASSWORD/orapwPRODCDB_DR srvctl config database -d PRODCDB_DR # verify password file path Remove local password file: Bashmv $ORACLE_HOME/dbs/orapwPRODCDB_DR $ORACLE_HOME/dbs/orapwPRODCDB_DR.old Step 21 &ndash; Enable MRP (Redo Apply) on Node 1 SQLsqlplus / as sysdba ALTER DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE DISCONNECT FROM SESSION; Step 22 &ndash; Verify Sync &amp; Lag (Node 1) SQL-- Applied archive logs SELECT thread#, MAX(sequence#) FROM v$archived_log WHERE applied='YES' GROUP BY thread#; -- Lag SELECT name, value FROM v$dataguard_stats WHERE name IN ('transport lag', 'apply lag'); -- Recovery rate SELECT TO_CHAR(START_TIME, 'DD-MON-RR HH24:MI:SS') START_TIME, ITEM, SOFAR, UNITS FROM v$recovery_progress WHERE ITEM IN ('Active Apply Rate', 'Average Apply Rate', 'Redo Applied'); Summary for Node 1 Only All steps above are executed only on erpproddb1-dr (Node 1). Database is configured as single-instance standby (cluster_database=FALSE). nce finished, verify with srvctl status database -d PRODCDB_DR and redo apply status</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex justify-end">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="22681ee4-8ebf-4674-9bb1-b44b9d6354a5" data-testid="conversation-turn-44" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="22681ee4-8ebf-4674-9bb1-b44b9d6354a5" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="209">Great &mdash; now you are asking the&nbsp;<strong data-start="31" data-end="63">right architectural question</strong>&nbsp;👍<br data-start="66" data-end="69" />You successfully created the standby using&nbsp;<strong data-start="112" data-end="137">RMAN ACTIVE DUPLICATE</strong>, and now you see a long list of &ldquo;post-duplicate&rdquo; steps from that guide.</p>
<p data-start="211" data-end="231">The important thing:</p>
<blockquote data-start="233" data-end="418">
<p data-start="235" data-end="418"><strong data-start="235" data-end="293">Those steps are not for creating the standby database.</strong><br data-start="293" data-end="296" />They are for converting the database into a&nbsp;<em data-start="342" data-end="417">Clusterware-managed Data Guard resource (RAC-style production deployment)</em>.</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="420" data-end="537">Your standby already works at&nbsp;<strong data-start="450" data-end="468">database level</strong><br data-start="468" data-end="471" />The article continues to configure&nbsp;<strong data-start="506" data-end="537">GI/CRS infrastructure level</strong></p>
<p data-start="539" data-end="574">So let&rsquo;s decode every step clearly.</p>
<hr data-start="576" data-end="579" />
<h1 data-section-id="1wlsi49" data-start="581" data-end="611">Big Picture (very important)</h1>
<p data-start="613" data-end="656">There are&nbsp;<strong data-start="623" data-end="635">3 layers</strong>&nbsp;in Oracle Data Guard</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="658" data-end="921">
<thead data-start="658" data-end="705">
<tr data-start="658" data-end="705">
<th class="" data-start="658" data-end="666" data-col-size="sm">Layer</th>
<th class="" data-start="666" data-end="682" data-col-size="sm">What it means</th>
<th class="" data-start="682" data-end="705" data-col-size="sm">Your current status</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="729" data-end="921">
<tr data-start="729" data-end="787">
<td data-start="729" data-end="740" data-col-size="sm">Database</td>
<td data-start="740" data-end="777" data-col-size="sm">Standby database created &amp; mounted</td>
<td data-start="777" data-end="787" data-col-size="sm">✅ DONE</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="788" data-end="840">
<td data-start="788" data-end="801" data-col-size="sm">Data Guard</td>
<td data-start="801" data-end="825" data-col-size="sm">Redo shipping &amp; apply</td>
<td data-start="825" data-end="840" data-col-size="sm">⏳ Next step</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="841" data-end="921">
<td data-start="841" data-end="861" data-col-size="sm">Clusterware (CRS)</td>
<td data-start="861" data-end="897" data-col-size="sm">Auto start/stop, failover, srvctl</td>
<td data-start="897" data-end="921" data-col-size="sm">❌ Not configured yet</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="923" data-end="969">That article =&nbsp;<strong data-start="938" data-end="969">production automation layer</strong></p>
<p data-start="971" data-end="1010">You only completed =&nbsp;<strong data-start="992" data-end="1010">database layer</strong></p>
<hr data-start="1012" data-end="1015" />
<h1 data-section-id="1hw91h4" data-start="1017" data-end="1047">Now explanation step-by-step</h1>
<hr data-start="1049" data-end="1052" />
<h2 data-section-id="1yf54n5" data-start="1054" data-end="1079">Step 16 &ndash; Verify Files</h2>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">SELECT name FROM v$datafile;<br />SELECT member FROM v$logfile;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<h3 data-section-id="z5q4pk" data-start="1148" data-end="1159">Purpose</h3>
<p data-start="1160" data-end="1219">Just confirms RMAN duplicate created correct ASM structure.</p>
<p data-start="1221" data-end="1250"><strong data-start="1221" data-end="1250">It checks mapping worked:</strong></p>
<p data-start="1252" data-end="1259">Primary</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">+DATA/PROD/...</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1284" data-end="1291">Standby</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/...</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1322" data-end="1365">👉 Pure validation step &mdash; no configuration.</p>
<p data-start="1367" data-end="1438">You already indirectly verified because DB mounted as PHYSICAL STANDBY.</p>
<hr data-start="1440" data-end="1443" />
<h2 data-section-id="1umz1xe" data-start="1445" data-end="1485">Step 17 &ndash; Copy PFILE to ASM as SPFILE</h2>
<p data-start="1486" data-end="1507">You already did this:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">SPFILE = +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/spfileprodcdb_dr.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<h3 data-section-id="1l2jhtu" data-start="1565" data-end="1581">Real purpose</h3>
<p data-start="1582" data-end="1597">Not Data Guard.</p>
<p data-start="1599" data-end="1632">It is for&nbsp;<strong data-start="1609" data-end="1632">Clusterware startup</strong></p>
<p data-start="1634" data-end="1660">Clusterware does NOT read:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">sqlplus startup mount</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1692" data-end="1701">It reads:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">srvctl start database</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1733" data-end="1806">For that, SPFILE must be inside ASM so GI can access it before DB mounts.</p>
<p data-start="1808" data-end="1849">So this step = making DB bootable by CRS.</p>
<hr data-start="1851" data-end="1854" />
<h2 data-section-id="k8guhh" data-start="1856" data-end="1883">Step 18 &ndash; Set Parameters</h2>
<p data-start="1884" data-end="1951">These parameters are misunderstood &mdash; they are NOT standby settings.</p>
<p data-start="1953" data-end="1987">They are&nbsp;<strong data-start="1962" data-end="1987">RAC identity settings</strong></p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">instance_number<br />thread<br />instance_name<br />cluster_database<br />remote_listener</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<h3 data-section-id="143oblg" data-start="2068" data-end="2083">Why needed?</h3>
<p data-start="2085" data-end="2145">Because when CRS starts database it needs instance metadata.</p>
<p data-start="2147" data-end="2160">Without this:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">srvctl start database<br />&rarr; fails</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2200" data-end="2226">But sqlplus startup works.</p>
<p data-start="2228" data-end="2260">So again &mdash; infrastructure layer.</p>
<hr data-start="2262" data-end="2265" />
<h2 data-section-id="upgykg" data-start="2267" data-end="2306">Step 19 &ndash; Register Database with CRS</h2>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">srvctl add database<br />srvctl add instance</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2356" data-end="2377">Now database becomes:</p>
<p data-start="2379" data-end="2429">👉 Cluster resource managed by Grid Infrastructure</p>
<p data-start="2431" data-end="2439">Meaning:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="2441" data-end="2627">
<thead data-start="2441" data-end="2467">
<tr data-start="2441" data-end="2467">
<th class="" data-start="2441" data-end="2455" data-col-size="sm">Without CRS</th>
<th class="" data-start="2455" data-end="2467" data-col-size="sm">With CRS</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="2480" data-end="2627">
<tr data-start="2480" data-end="2524">
<td data-start="2480" data-end="2495" data-col-size="sm">Manual startup</td>
<td data-start="2495" data-end="2524" data-col-size="sm">Auto startup after reboot</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="2525" data-end="2558">
<td data-start="2525" data-end="2537" data-col-size="sm">No failover</td>
<td data-start="2537" data-end="2558" data-col-size="sm">HA failover ready</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="2559" data-end="2592">
<td data-start="2559" data-end="2573" data-col-size="sm">No monitoring</td>
<td data-start="2573" data-end="2592" data-col-size="sm">CRS monitors DB</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="2593" data-end="2627">
<td data-start="2593" data-end="2607" data-col-size="sm">DBA dependent</td>
<td data-start="2607" data-end="2627" data-col-size="sm">Production ready</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2629" data-end="2651">So this step converts:</p>
<blockquote data-start="2652" data-end="2692">
<p data-start="2654" data-end="2692">Standby database &rarr; HA standby database</p>
</blockquote>
<hr data-start="2694" data-end="2697" />
<h2 data-section-id="1mtceh3" data-start="2699" data-end="2732">Step 20 &ndash; Password file in ASM</h2>
<p data-start="2733" data-end="2774">This is VERY important in RAC/Data Guard.</p>
<p data-start="2776" data-end="2824">Redo transport uses SYS password authentication.</p>
<p data-start="2826" data-end="2874">Clusterware nodes must share same password file.</p>
<p data-start="2876" data-end="2887">So we move:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">$ORACLE_HOME/dbs/orapwPRODCDB_DR<br />&rarr; +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PASSWORD/</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2959" data-end="2969">Otherwise:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ORA-16191 / ORA-01031 during log shipping</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="3021" data-end="3024" />
<h2 data-section-id="8ie5yh" data-start="3026" data-end="3049">Step 21 &ndash; Enable MRP</h2>

<p data-start="4380" data-end="4467" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Run MRP and send output of&nbsp;<code data-start="4407" data-end="4426">v$managed_standby</code>&nbsp;&mdash;<br data-start="4428" data-end="4431" />then we confirm Data Guard is alive.</p>
