<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="68c12665-43fa-404a-bf8d-e16dd81a7e27" data-testid="conversation-turn-46" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">

<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="172">Perfect &mdash; now we are talking about the&nbsp;<strong data-start="39" data-end="52">real goal</strong>&nbsp;👍<br data-start="55" data-end="58" />You are not just building a standby&hellip;<br data-start="94" data-end="97" />You want a&nbsp;<strong data-start="108" data-end="171">DC &rarr; DR switchover drill (HA production cutover simulation)</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="174" data-end="211">That changes the approach completely.</p>
<p data-start="213" data-end="238">Right now your situation:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="240" data-end="528">
<thead data-start="240" data-end="262">
<tr data-start="240" data-end="262">
<th class="" data-start="240" data-end="252" data-col-size="sm">Component</th>
<th class="" data-start="252" data-end="262" data-col-size="sm">Status</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="281" data-end="528">
<tr data-start="281" data-end="307">
<td data-start="281" data-end="302" data-col-size="sm">Standby DB created</td>
<td data-start="302" data-end="307" data-col-size="sm">✅</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="308" data-end="343">
<td data-start="308" data-end="338" data-col-size="sm">Mounted as Physical Standby</td>
<td data-start="338" data-end="343" data-col-size="sm">✅</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="344" data-end="391">
<td data-start="344" data-end="363" data-col-size="sm">Redo Apply (MRP)</td>
<td data-start="363" data-end="391" data-col-size="sm">⚠️ Must run continuously</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="392" data-end="431">
<td data-start="392" data-end="407" data-col-size="sm">CRS / srvctl</td>
<td data-start="407" data-end="431" data-col-size="sm">❌ Not configured yet</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="432" data-end="470">
<td data-start="432" data-end="465" data-col-size="sm">Automatic startup after reboot</td>
<td data-start="465" data-end="470" data-col-size="sm">❌</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="471" data-end="528">
<td data-start="471" data-end="495" data-col-size="sm">Role transition ready</td>
<td data-start="495" data-end="528" data-col-size="sm">❌ (infrastructure incomplete)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="530" data-end="724">So if today you try switchover &rarr;&nbsp;<strong data-start="563" data-end="609">it will work once, but not production-safe</strong><br data-start="609" data-end="612" />After reboot &rarr; DB won&rsquo;t auto start<br data-start="646" data-end="649" />After failover &rarr; services won&rsquo;t move<br data-start="685" data-end="688" />After drill &rarr; manual repair required</p>
<p data-start="726" data-end="834">Therefore for&nbsp;<strong data-start="740" data-end="752">DR Drill</strong>, we must complete a&nbsp;<em data-start="773" data-end="805">minimum HA-ready configuration</em>, not full RAC expansion yet.</p>
<hr data-start="836" data-end="839" />
<h1 data-section-id="1yv0mgc" data-start="841" data-end="878">What You Actually Need For DR Drill</h1>
<p data-start="879" data-end="955">Not full RAC standby.<br data-start="900" data-end="903" />You need&nbsp;<strong data-start="912" data-end="946">Single-Instance Managed by CRS</strong>&nbsp;standby.</p>
<p data-start="957" data-end="972">This gives you:</p>
<ul data-start="974" data-end="1056">
<li data-section-id="1kbggl0" data-start="974" data-end="991">
<p data-start="976" data-end="991">role transition</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="o4ttnp" data-start="992" data-end="1011">
<p data-start="994" data-end="1011">automatic restart</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="19l3g3c" data-start="1012" data-end="1032">
<p data-start="1014" data-end="1032">service relocation</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1e8ksu5" data-start="1033" data-end="1056">
<p data-start="1035" data-end="1056">clean switchover back</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1058" data-end="1083">This is the missing part.</p>
<hr data-start="1085" data-end="1088" />
<h1 data-section-id="1cx1qsc" data-start="1090" data-end="1131">Correct Order For You (Do EXACTLY This)</h1>
<h2 data-section-id="cl8t2" data-start="1133" data-end="1179">STEP 1 &mdash; Start Redo Apply (Mandatory First)</h2>
<p data-start="1180" data-end="1186">On DR:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">USING</span> <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span> LOGFILE <span class="ͼ8">DISCONNECT</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1282" data-end="1289">Verify:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> process, status, thread#, sequence# <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$managed_standby;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1370" data-end="1383">You must see:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 APPLYING_LOG<br />RFS RECEIVING</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1426" data-end="1465">👉 Without this &rarr; Switchover impossible</p>
<hr data-start="1467" data-end="1470" />
<h2 data-section-id="1fw7tf1" data-start="1472" data-end="1542">STEP 2 &mdash; Configure Standby Redo Logs (Most critical for switchover)</h2>
<p data-start="1543" data-end="1553">Run on DR:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, <span class="ͼ8">group</span>#, bytes<span class="ͼ8">/</span><span class="ͼb">1024</span><span class="ͼ8">/</span><span class="ͼb">1024</span> MB <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$log;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1622" data-end="1665">Create same size SRLs + 1 extra per thread:</p>
<p data-start="1667" data-end="1675">Example:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">11</span> (<span class="ͼc">'+DATA'</span>) <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">1024</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">12</span> (<span class="ͼc">'+DATA'</span>) <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">1024</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">13</span> (<span class="ͼc">'+DATA'</span>) <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">1024</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">14</span> (<span class="ͼc">'+DATA'</span>) <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">1024</span>M;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1988" data-end="1995">Verify:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> <span class="ͼ8">group</span>#, type <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$logfile;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2044" data-end="2056">Without SRL:</p>
<blockquote data-start="2057" data-end="2093">
<p data-start="2059" data-end="2093">Switchover will hang or take hours</p>
</blockquote>
<hr data-start="2095" data-end="2098" />
<h2 data-section-id="18i1giz" data-start="2100" data-end="2146">STEP 3 &mdash; Configure FORCE LOGGING on Primary</h2>
<p data-start="2147" data-end="2153">On DC:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE FORCE LOGGING;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2197" data-end="2231">Required for zero data loss drill.</p>
<hr data-start="2233" data-end="2236" />
<h2 data-section-id="1ev7mll" data-start="2238" data-end="2274">STEP 4 &mdash; Verify Data Guard Health</h2>
<p data-start="2275" data-end="2293">Run on both sides:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> name, database_role, open_mode, switchover_status <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$database;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2381" data-end="2390">You want:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="2392" data-end="2468">
<thead data-start="2392" data-end="2403">
<tr data-start="2392" data-end="2403">
<th class="" data-start="2392" data-end="2397" data-col-size="sm">DC</th>
<th class="" data-start="2397" data-end="2403" data-col-size="sm">DR</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="2414" data-end="2468">
<tr data-start="2414" data-end="2468">
<td data-start="2414" data-end="2435" data-col-size="sm">PRIMARY / TO STANDBY</td>
<td data-start="2435" data-end="2468" data-col-size="sm">PHYSICAL STANDBY / TO PRIMARY</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2470" data-end="2494">Only then drill allowed.</p>
<hr data-start="2496" data-end="2499" />
<h2 data-section-id="znl98l" data-start="2501" data-end="2556">STEP 5 &mdash; NOW Prepare HA Control (CRS minimal config)</h2>
<p data-start="2557" data-end="2630">You DO need this &mdash; otherwise after role change DB may not start properly.</p>
<p data-start="2632" data-end="2650">On DR (grid user):</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">srvctl add database -db PRODCDB_DR \<br /> -oraclehome /oracle/app/oracle/database/19.3.0/dbhome_1 \<br /> -role physical_standby \<br /> -startoption mount \<br /> -spfile +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/spfileprodcdb_dr.ora \<br /> -diskgroup DATA<br /><br />srvctl add instance -db PRODCDB_DR -instance PRODCDB_DR -node erpproddb1-dr</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2948" data-end="2962">Start via CRS:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">srvctl start database -d PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3008" data-end="3041">Now DR becomes&nbsp;<strong data-start="3023" data-end="3041">failover ready</strong></p>
<hr data-start="3043" data-end="3046" />
<h1 data-section-id="xsa7do" data-start="3048" data-end="3080">Now You Are Ready For DR Drill</h1>
<hr data-start="3082" data-end="3085" />
<h1 data-section-id="ihofyt" data-start="3087" data-end="3119">Switchover Procedure (DC &rarr; DR)</h1>
<h2 data-section-id="sucl1t" data-start="3121" data-end="3145">1 &mdash; Stop Applications</h2>
<p data-start="3146" data-end="3180">(very important for clean cutover)</p>
<hr data-start="3182" data-end="3185" />
<h2 data-section-id="1nf8qtk" data-start="3187" data-end="3209">2 &mdash; On Primary (DC)</h2>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">COMMIT</span> <span class="ͼ8">TO</span> SWITCHOVER <span class="ͼ8">TO</span> PHYSICAL STANDBY <span class="ͼ8">WITH</span> <span class="ͼ8">SESSION</span> SHUTDOWN;<br />SHUTDOWN <span class="ͼ8">IMMEDIATE</span>;<br />STARTUP MOUNT;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="3336" data-end="3339" />
<h2 data-section-id="1m9btyt" data-start="3341" data-end="3353">3 &mdash; On DR</h2>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">COMMIT</span> <span class="ͼ8">TO</span> SWITCHOVER <span class="ͼ8">TO</span> <span class="ͼ8">PRIMARY</span>;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">OPEN</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3435" data-end="3458">DR is now production 🎯</p>
<hr data-start="3460" data-end="3463" />
<h2 data-section-id="181lq23" data-start="3465" data-end="3523">4 &mdash; Start Redo Apply Back (Old Primary becomes standby)</h2>
<p data-start="3524" data-end="3534">On old DC:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">USING</span> <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span> LOGFILE <span class="ͼ8">DISCONNECT</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="3630" data-end="3633" />
<h1 data-section-id="wk9rt8" data-start="3635" data-end="3655">What This Achieves</h1>
<p data-start="3657" data-end="3680">You have now simulated:</p>
<p data-start="3682" data-end="3785">✔ DC site failure<br data-start="3699" data-end="3702" />✔ DR site takeover<br data-start="3720" data-end="3723" />✔ Production running from DR<br data-start="3751" data-end="3754" />✔ Reverse replication working</p>
<p data-start="3787" data-end="3807">That = Real DR Drill</p>
<hr data-start="3809" data-end="3812" />
<h1 data-section-id="1itl52g" data-start="3814" data-end="3834">Most Important Tip</h1>
<p data-start="3836" data-end="3863">Do NOT test failover first.</p>
<p data-start="3865" data-end="3877">Always test:</p>
<blockquote data-start="3879" data-end="3904">
<p data-start="3881" data-end="3904">Switchover &rarr; Switchback</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="3906" data-end="3935">Failover is last resort only.</p>
<hr data-start="3937" data-end="3940" />
<h1 data-section-id="91dq6h" data-start="3942" data-end="3955">Tell Me Now</h1>
<p data-start="3956" data-end="3960">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">SELECT process, status, thread#, sequence# FROM v$managed_standby;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="4038" data-end="4041">and</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">SELECT name, database_role, switchover_status FROM v$database;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="4115" data-end="4186" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Send outputs &mdash;<br data-start="4129" data-end="4132" />I will confirm if you are drill-ready or still unsafe.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="0d736203-101c-4328-ac32-057982b2d862" data-testid="conversation-turn-47" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">

Started,STABLE 2 ONLINE OFFLINE STABLE 3 OFFLINE OFFLINE STABLE ora.asmnet1.asmnetwork(ora.asmgroup) 1 ONLINE ONLINE erpproddb1-dr STABLE 2 ONLINE OFFLINE STABLE 3 OFFLINE OFFLINE STABLE ora.cvu 1 erpproddb1-dr STABLE ora.scan2.vip 1 ONLINE ONLINE erpproddb1-dr STABLE ora.scan3.vip 1 ONLINE ONLINE erpproddb1-dr STABLE parameter file to ASM as below. [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ su - grid Password: [grid@racnoden1 ~]$ asmcmd ASMCMD&gt; cd DATA_REP/STDBYDG/ ASMCMD&gt; mkdir PARAMETERFILE ASMCMD&gt; cd PARAMETERFILE ASMCMD&gt; pwd +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE ASMCMD&gt; exit [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ sqlplus "/as sysdba" SQL&gt; create spfile='+DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora' from pfile='initSTDBY1.ora'; File created. SQL&gt; shut immediate; ORA-01109: database not open Database dismounted. exit ORACLE instance shut down. SQL&gt; Disconnected from Oracle Database 19c Enterprise Edition Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production Version 19.3.0.0.0 -&gt; Take backup fo Current SPFILE and Edit SPFILE entry in init file on Both nodes as below. [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ mv initSTDBY1.ora initSTDBY1.ora_BKP [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ cat initSTDBY1.ora spfile='+DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora' [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ [oracle@racnoden2 dbs]$ mv initSTDBY1.ora initSTDBY1.ora_BKP [oracle@racnoden2 dbs]$ cat initSTDBY1.ora spfile='+DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora' [oracle@racnoden2 dbs]$ [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ sqlplus "/as sysdba" SQL&gt; startup mount; ORACLE instance started. Total System Global Area 2751463160 bytes Fixed Size 8900344 bytes Variable Size 570425344 bytes Database Buffers 2164260864 bytes Redo Buffers 7876608 bytes Database mounted. SQL&gt; exit Disconnected from Oracle Database 19c Enterprise Edition Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production Version 19.3.0.0.0 18=&gt; Set parameter for Standby database as below to Enable NODE-2 as RAC SQL&gt; alter system set undo_tablespace=UNDOTBS2 sid='STDBY2' scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; alter system set instance_number=1 sid='STDBY1' scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; alter system set instance_number=2 sid='STDBY2' scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; alter system set instance_name='STDBY1' sid='STDBY1' scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; alter system set instance_name='STDBY2' sid='STDBY2' scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; alter system set thread=1 sid='STDBY1' scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; alter system set thread=2 sid='STDBY2' scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; alter system set cluster_database=TRUE scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; alter system set remote_listener='racnode-scan:1521' scope=spfile; System altered. SQL&gt; 19=&gt; Stop database and add the same to CRS as below. [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ SQL&gt; shut immediate; ORA-01109: database not open Database dismounted. ORACLE instance shut down. SQL&gt; exit Disconnected from Oracle Database 19c Enterprise Edition Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production Version 19.3.0.0.0 /ora_home/app/19c/db [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ srvctl add database -db STDBYDG -oraclehome /ora_home/app/19c/db -role physical_standby -startoption mount -spfile +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ srvctl add instance -db STDBYDG -instance STDBY1 -node racnoden1 [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ srvctl add instance -db STDBYDG -instance STDBY2 -node racnoden2 [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ srvctl start database -d STDBYDG [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ srvctl status database -d STDBYDG Instance STDBY1 is running on node racnoden1 Instance STDBY2 is running on node racnoden2 [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ sqlplus "/as sysdba" SQL&gt; select name,open_mode,database_role,cdb from gv$database; NAME OPEN_MODE DATABASE_ROLE CDB --------- -------------------- ---------------- --- NTNT MOUNTED PHYSICAL STANDBY NO NTNT MOUNTED PHYSICAL STANDBY NO SQL&gt; Disconnected from Oracle Database 19c Enterprise Edition Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production Version 19.3.0.0.0 -&gt; Check CRS status as below. [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [oracle@racnoden1 ~]$ /grid_home/app/19c/grid/bin/crsctl stat res -t -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Name Target State Server State details -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Local Resources -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ora.LISTENER.lsnr ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE ONLINE ONLINE racnoden2 STABLE ora.chad ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE ONLINE ONLINE racnoden2 STABLE ora.net1.network ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE ONLINE ONLINE racnoden2 STABLE ora.ons ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE ONLINE ONLINE racnoden2 STABLE ora.proxy_advm OFFLINE OFFLINE racnoden1 STABLE OFFLINE OFFLINE racnoden2 STABLE -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Cluster Resources -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ora.ASMNET1LSNR_ASM.lsnr(ora.asmgroup) 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE 2 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden2 STABLE 3 ONLINE OFFLINE STABLE ora.DATA_REP.dg(ora.asmgroup) 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE 2 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden2 STABLE 3 OFFLINE OFFLINE STABLE ora.FRA_RECO.dg(ora.asmgroup) 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE 2 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden2 STABLE 3 OFFLINE OFFLINE STABLE ora.LISTENER_SCAN1.lsnr 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden2 STABLE ora.LISTENER_SCAN2.lsnr 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE ora.LISTENER_SCAN3.lsnr 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE ora.OCR.dg(ora.asmgroup) 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE 2 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden2 STABLE 3 OFFLINE OFFLINE STABLE ora.asm(ora.asmgroup) 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 Started,STABLE 2 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden2 Started,STABLE 3 OFFLINE OFFLINE STABLE ora.asmnet1.asmnetwork(ora.asmgroup) 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE 2 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden2 STABLE 3 OFFLINE OFFLINE STABLE ora.cvu 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE ora.qosmserver 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE ora.racnoden1.vip 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE ora.racnoden2.vip 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden2 STABLE ora.scan1.vip 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden2 STABLE ora.scan2.vip 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE ora.scan3.vip 1 ONLINE ONLINE racnoden1 STABLE ora.stdbydg.db 1 ONLINE INTERMEDIATE racnoden1 Mounted (Closed),HOME=/ora_home/app/19c/db,STABLE 2 ONLINE INTERMEDIATE racnoden2 Mounted (Closed),HOME=/ora_home/app/19c/db,STABLE -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [oracle@racnoden1 ~]$ 20 =&gt; Adding Passwordfile to ASM for STANDBY database as below. [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ srvctl config database -d STDBYDG Database unique name: STDBYDG Database name: Oracle home: /ora_home/app/19c/db Oracle user: oracle Spfile: +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora Password file: &lt;&lt;&lt; NO INFO AVAILABLE Domain: ace2oracle.lab Start options: mount Stop options: immediate Database role: PHYSICAL_STANDBY Management policy: AUTOMATIC Server pools: Disk Groups: DATA_REP,FRA_RECO Mount point paths: Services: Type: RAC Start concurrency: Stop concurrency: OSDBA group: oinstall OSOPER group: oper Database instances: STDBY1,STDBY2 Configured nodes: racnoden1,racnoden2 CSS critical: no CPU count: 0 Memory target: 0 Maximum memory: 0 Default network number for database services: Database is administrator managed -&gt; copy passwordfile from $ORACLE_HOME/dbs to /tmp/orapwSTDBY location and move to ASM as below [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ su - grid Password: [grid@racnoden1 ~]$ asmcmd ASMCMD&gt; ls DATA_REP/ FRA_RECO/ OCR/ ASMCMD&gt; pwcopy --dbuniquename STDBYDG /tmp/orapwSTDBY +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PASSWORD/orapwSTDBYDG -f copying /tmp/orapwSTDBY -&gt; +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PASSWORD/orapwSTDBYDG ASMCMD-9453: failed to register password file as a CRS resource ASMCMD&gt; exit -&gt; Add password file to CRS as below [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ srvctl modify database -d STDBYDG -pwfile +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PASSWORD/orapwSTDBYDG -&gt; Get passwordfile info as below [oracle@racnoden1 ~]$ srvctl config database -d STDBYDG Database unique name: STDBYDG Database name: NTNT Oracle home: /ora_home/app/19c/db Oracle user: oracle Spfile: +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PARAMETERFILE/spfilestdby.ora Password file: +DATA_REP/STDBYDG/PASSWORD/orapwSTDBYDG Domain: ace2oracle.lab Start options: mount Stop options: immediate Database role: PHYSICAL_STANDBY Management policy: AUTOMATIC Server pools: Disk Groups: DATA_REP,FRA_RECO Mount point paths: Services: Type: RAC Start concurrency: Stop concurrency: OSDBA group: oinstall OSOPER group: oper Database instances: STDBY1,STDBY2 Configured nodes: racnoden1,racnoden2 CSS critical: no CPU count: 0 Memory target: 0 Maximum memory: 0 Default network number for database services: Database is administrator managed -&gt;Move/ Remove orapwSTDBYDG1 and orapwSTDBYDG2 from NODE-1 and NODE-2 of $ORACLE_HOME/dbs location [oracle@racnoden1 dbs]$ mv orapwSTDBY1 orapwSTDBY1_OLD [oracle@racnoden2 dbs]$ mv orapwSTDBY2 orapwSTDBY2_OLD 21=&gt; Enable MRP as below. [oracle@racnoden1 ~]$ sqlplus "/as sysdba" SQL&gt; alter database recover managed standby database disconnect from session; Database altered. 22=&gt; Check status of logs at Primary and then on Standby as below -&gt; Primary. SQL&gt; select thread#,max(sequence#) from v$archived_log where archived='YES' group by thread#; System altered. SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; THREAD# MAX(SEQUENCE#) ---------- -------------- 1 103 2 105 SQL&gt; -&gt;Standby SQL&gt; select thread#,max(sequence#) from v$archived_log where applied='YES' group by thread#; THREAD# MAX(SEQUENCE#) ---------- -------------- 1 101 2 98 SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SELECT ARCH.THREAD# "Thread", ARCH.SEQUENCE# "Last Sequence Received", APPL.SEQUENCE# "Last Sequence Applied", (ARCH.SEQUENCE# - APPL.SEQUENCE#) "Difference" FROM (SELECT THREAD# ,SEQUENCE# FROM V$ARCHIVED_LOG WHERE (THREAD#,FIRST_TIME ) IN (SELECT THREAD#,MAX(FIRST_TIME) FROM V$ARCHIVED_LOG GROUP BY THREAD#)) ARCH, (SELECT THREAD# ,SEQUENCE# FROM V$LOG_HISTORY WHERE (THREAD#,FIRST_TIME ) IN (SELECT THREAD#,MAX(FIRST_TIME) FROM V$LOG_HISTORY GROUP BY THREAD#)) APPL WHERE ARCH.THREAD# = APPL.THREAD# ORDER BY 1; Thread Last Sequence Received Last Sequence Applied Difference ---------- ---------------------- --------------------- ---------- 1 103 102 1 2 104 104 0 -&gt; Check Stats as below SQL&gt; set linesize 120 col START_TIME format a20 col ITEM format a20 SELECT TO_CHAR(START_TIME, 'DD-MON-RR HH24:MI:SS') START_TIME, ITEM , SOFAR, UNITS FROM V$RECOVERY_PROGRESS WHERE ITEM IN ('Active Apply Rate', 'Average Apply Rate', 'Redo Applied');SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; 2 3 START_TIME ITEM SOFAR UNITS -------------------- -------------------- ---------- -------------------------------- 27-JAN-23 22:42:51 Active Apply Rate 124 KB/sec 27-JAN-23 22:42:51 Average Apply Rate 34 KB/sec 27-JAN-23 22:42:51 Redo Applied 84 Megabytes SQL&gt; col NAME for a13 col VALUE for a13 col UNIT for a30 set LINES 132 SELECT NAME, VALUE, UNIT, TIME_COMPUTED FROM V$DATAGUARD_STATS WHERE NAME IN ('transport lag', 'apply lag');SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; SQL&gt; 2 NAME VALUE UNIT TIME_COMPUTED ------------- ------------- ------------------------------ ------------------------------ transport lag +00 00:00:00 day(2) to second(0) interval 01/27/2023 23:25:36 apply lag +00 00:00:00 day(2) to second(0) interval 01/27/2023 23:25:36 SQL&gt;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex justify-end">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="dde7a0c6-ea29-441a-b40c-a589c93d5d11" data-testid="conversation-turn-48" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="849092ed-a603-46e9-be8e-8ec06044a186" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="77">Good &mdash; now I fully understand 👍<br data-start="32" data-end="35" />You are&nbsp;<strong data-start="43" data-end="76">NOT building a simple standby</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="79" data-end="106">You want this architecture:</p>
<blockquote data-start="108" data-end="192">
<p data-start="110" data-end="192">RAC at DC &rarr; RAC-ready DR &rarr; Perform DC-DR Drill &rarr; Future automatic failover capable</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="194" data-end="208">But currently:</p>
<blockquote data-start="210" data-end="355">
<p data-start="212" data-end="355">DR cluster exists (3-node GI)<br data-start="241" data-end="244" />Only&nbsp;<strong data-start="251" data-end="297">one node physically available / running DB</strong><br data-start="297" data-end="300" />Yet you want configuration compatible with future RAC</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="357" data-end="511">So you must configure the standby as&nbsp;<strong data-start="394" data-end="447">RAC-capable standby (even with 1 active instance)</strong><br data-start="447" data-end="450" />That is exactly why the article performs those &ldquo;extra&rdquo; steps.</p>
<p data-start="513" data-end="549">Your CRS output already proves this:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ora.prodcdb_dr.db ONLINE INTERMEDIATE ... Mounted<br />ASM, SCAN, VIP, GI &rarr; working<br />But database resource not fully configured</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="683" data-end="781">So the guide is correct &mdash; and YES you must follow it &mdash;<br data-start="737" data-end="740" />but&nbsp;<strong data-start="744" data-end="781">adapted to 1-node active RAC mode</strong></p>
<hr data-start="783" data-end="786" />
<h1 data-section-id="17i1684" data-start="788" data-end="833">What Those Steps Actually Do (Real Meaning)</h1>
<p data-start="835" data-end="972">Many people think those are optional &mdash;<br data-start="873" data-end="876" />they are not.<br data-start="889" data-end="892" />They convert the standby from&nbsp;<strong data-start="922" data-end="941">manual database</strong>&nbsp;&rarr;&nbsp;<strong data-start="944" data-end="972">cluster-managed database</strong></p>
<p data-start="974" data-end="987">Without them:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="989" data-end="1200">
<thead data-start="989" data-end="1011">
<tr data-start="989" data-end="1011">
<th class="" data-start="989" data-end="1001" data-col-size="sm">Operation</th>
<th class="" data-start="1001" data-end="1011" data-col-size="sm">Result</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="1029" data-end="1200">
<tr data-start="1029" data-end="1054">
<td data-start="1029" data-end="1040" data-col-size="sm">Switchover</td>
<td data-start="1040" data-end="1054" data-col-size="sm">Works once</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1055" data-end="1078">
<td data-start="1055" data-end="1067" data-col-size="sm">Node reboot</td>
<td data-start="1067" data-end="1078" data-col-size="sm">DB down</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1079" data-end="1101">
<td data-start="1079" data-end="1092" data-col-size="sm">SCAN connect</td>
<td data-start="1092" data-end="1101" data-col-size="sm">fails</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1102" data-end="1129">
<td data-start="1102" data-end="1120" data-col-size="sm">Services relocate</td>
<td data-start="1120" data-end="1129" data-col-size="sm">fails</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1130" data-end="1164">
<td data-start="1130" data-end="1150" data-col-size="sm">Future RAC node add</td>
<td data-start="1150" data-end="1164" data-col-size="sm">impossible</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1165" data-end="1200">
<td data-start="1165" data-end="1186" data-col-size="sm">FSFO (auto failover)</td>
<td data-start="1186" data-end="1200" data-col-size="sm">impossible</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1202" data-end="1280">So the article is preparing&nbsp;<strong data-start="1230" data-end="1258">Cluster-Aware Data Guard</strong>, not just standby DB.</p>
<hr data-start="1282" data-end="1285" />
<h1 data-section-id="xhajdb" data-start="1287" data-end="1336">Now I&rsquo;ll Translate Each Step Into Plain English</h1>
<hr data-start="1338" data-end="1341" />
<h2 data-section-id="1szsqbv" data-start="1343" data-end="1395">STEP 17 &mdash; SPFILE into ASM (Cluster shared config)</h2>
<p data-start="1396" data-end="1470">You already have spfile in ASM, but not in&nbsp;<strong data-start="1439" data-end="1470">correct cluster-shared path</strong></p>
<p data-start="1472" data-end="1485">Why required?</p>
<p data-start="1487" data-end="1494">In RAC:</p>
<ul data-start="1495" data-end="1577">
<li data-section-id="a7aq9u" data-start="1495" data-end="1536">
<p data-start="1497" data-end="1536">All nodes must read SAME parameter file</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="dk53kb" data-start="1537" data-end="1577">
<p data-start="1539" data-end="1577">Stored in ASM so any node can start DB</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1579" data-end="1589">Right now:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/spfileprodcdb_dr.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1637" data-end="1673">But CRS expects structured location:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PARAMETERFILE/spfilePRODCDB_DR.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1736" data-end="1779">Otherwise srvctl cannot manage it reliably.</p>
<p data-start="1781" data-end="1832">👉 This step makes database bootable by clusterware</p>
<hr data-start="1834" data-end="1837" />
<h2 data-section-id="1pqxg7e" data-start="1839" data-end="1900">STEP 18 &mdash; instance_number / thread / cluster_database=TRUE</h2>
<p data-start="1902" data-end="1938">This is the MOST misunderstood step.</p>
<p data-start="1940" data-end="1959">You currently have:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">cluster_database = FALSE</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1995" data-end="2003">Meaning:</p>
<blockquote data-start="2004" data-end="2030">
<p data-start="2006" data-end="2030">Single instance database</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="2032" data-end="2056">But your PRIMARY is RAC.</p>
<p data-start="2058" data-end="2127">If DR is single-instance &rarr; switchover breaks services &amp; redo threads.</p>
<p data-start="2129" data-end="2218">So we prepare standby to understand multiple redo threads even if only one node runs now.</p>
<p data-start="2220" data-end="2294">You are not enabling node2 &mdash;<br data-start="2248" data-end="2251" />You are enabling&nbsp;<strong data-start="2268" data-end="2294">multi-thread awareness</strong></p>
<p data-start="2296" data-end="2341">So redo from DC thread 2 will apply properly.</p>
<p data-start="2343" data-end="2375">Without this &rarr; switchover hangs.</p>
<hr data-start="2377" data-end="2380" />
<h2 data-section-id="xt3osj" data-start="2382" data-end="2414">STEP 19 &mdash; srvctl add database</h2>
<p data-start="2415" data-end="2445">This is CRITICAL for DR Drill.</p>
<p data-start="2447" data-end="2480">Right now DB is started manually.</p>
<p data-start="2482" data-end="2523">After switchover Oracle Clusterware must:</p>
<ul data-start="2525" data-end="2617">
<li data-section-id="m8yus" data-start="2525" data-end="2544">
<p data-start="2527" data-end="2544">stop standby role</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1299gzz" data-start="2545" data-end="2567">
<p data-start="2547" data-end="2567">mount former primary</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1dfkowb" data-start="2568" data-end="2586">
<p data-start="2570" data-end="2586">open new primary</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="leovt0" data-start="2587" data-end="2617">
<p data-start="2589" data-end="2617">start services automatically</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="2619" data-end="2654">Only srvctl managed DB can do that.</p>
<p data-start="2656" data-end="2675">This step converts:</p>
<blockquote data-start="2677" data-end="2708">
<p data-start="2679" data-end="2708">Oracle Database &rarr; HA Resource</p>
</blockquote>
<hr data-start="2710" data-end="2713" />
<h2 data-section-id="znvkd7" data-start="2715" data-end="2750">STEP 20 &mdash; Password file into ASM</h2>
<p data-start="2751" data-end="2764">Required for:</p>
<ul data-start="2766" data-end="2829">
<li data-section-id="wll1ww" data-start="2766" data-end="2797">
<p data-start="2768" data-end="2797">redo transport authentication</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1kbggl0" data-start="2798" data-end="2815">
<p data-start="2800" data-end="2815">role transition</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1o7jjau" data-start="2816" data-end="2829">
<p data-start="2818" data-end="2829">future FSFO</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="2831" data-end="2890">If not in ASM:<br />After role change &rarr; nodes reject connections</p>
<hr data-start="2892" data-end="2895" />
<h2 data-section-id="o3w1ym" data-start="2897" data-end="2920">STEP 21 &mdash; Enable MRP</h2>
<p data-start="2921" data-end="2981">Starts continuous apply<br data-start="2944" data-end="2947" />Mandatory for switchover readiness</p>
<hr data-start="2983" data-end="2986" />
<h2 data-section-id="1eb772o" data-start="2988" data-end="3017">STEP 22 &mdash; Lag verification</h2>
<p data-start="3018" data-end="3051">This confirms DR drill readiness.</p>
<hr data-start="3053" data-end="3056" />
<h1 data-section-id="x71itb" data-start="3058" data-end="3090">IMPORTANT FOR YOUR ENVIRONMENT</h1>
<p data-start="3092" data-end="3127">You are&nbsp;<strong data-start="3100" data-end="3127">RAC to RAC architecture</strong></p>
<p data-start="3129" data-end="3183">Even with 1 standby node running<br data-start="3161" data-end="3164" />YOU MUST configure:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">cluster_database=TRUE<br />threads for both nodes<br />srvctl database<br />password in ASM<br />SCAN listener usage</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3291" data-end="3338">Otherwise switchover from RAC &rarr; non-RAC causes:</p>
<blockquote data-start="3340" data-end="3401">
<p data-start="3342" data-end="3401">ORA-16475 / ORA-16766 / stuck switchover / services failure</p>
</blockquote>
<hr data-start="3403" data-end="3406" />
<h1 data-section-id="2sswsw" data-start="3408" data-end="3451">What I Suggest For You (Correct Approach)</h1>
<p data-start="3453" data-end="3479">Do NOT skip article steps.</p>
<p data-start="3481" data-end="3508">Instead do this adaptation:</p>
<h3 data-section-id="r73gkn" data-start="3510" data-end="3523">On DR now</h3>
<p data-start="3524" data-end="3555">Configure as 2-node RAC standby</p>
<p data-start="3557" data-end="3583">BUT start only 1 instance.</p>
<p data-start="3585" data-end="3629">That is perfectly valid Oracle architecture.</p>
<hr data-start="3631" data-end="3634" />
<h1 data-section-id="17gzncb" data-start="3636" data-end="3688">After This Your DR Drill Will Work Like Production</h1>
<p data-start="3690" data-end="3718">Switchover flow will become:</p>
<p data-start="3720" data-end="3775">DC RAC &rarr; DR single active node RAC &rarr; switchback &rarr; clean</p>
<p data-start="3777" data-end="3799">Without manual repair.</p>
<hr data-start="3801" data-end="3804" />
<h1 data-section-id="v80raj" data-start="3806" data-end="3825">Next Step For You</h1>
<p data-start="3826" data-end="3859">Before we proceed &mdash; confirm this:</p>
<p data-start="3861" data-end="3876">Run on PRIMARY:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, instance_name <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> gv$instance;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3938" data-end="3950">Send output.</p>
<p data-start="3952" data-end="4075" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">I need to confirm how many redo threads DC RAC actually has<br data-start="4011" data-end="4014" />so I give exact parameter values for your standby RAC config.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="dd7a4652-99a0-4e3b-88c0-c992062aaec1" data-testid="conversation-turn-50" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="dd7a4652-99a0-4e3b-88c0-c992062aaec1" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="64">Perfect 👍 &mdash; we will&nbsp;<strong data-start="21" data-end="43">not block progress</strong>&nbsp;waiting for DC team.</p>
<p data-start="66" data-end="143">We will prepare DR in a&nbsp;<strong data-start="90" data-end="116">RAC-ready standby mode</strong>&nbsp;that will work for either:</p>
<ul data-start="144" data-end="211">
<li data-section-id="7e664i" data-start="144" data-end="178">
<p data-start="146" data-end="178">2-node primary RAC (most common)</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1ofyord" data-start="179" data-end="211">
<p data-start="181" data-end="211">3-node RAC (your cluster size)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="213" data-end="279">Later we will only adjust&nbsp;<code data-start="239" data-end="247">thread</code>&nbsp;numbers &mdash; no re-build required.</p>
<p data-start="281" data-end="314">So continue configuration safely.</p>
<hr data-start="316" data-end="319" />
<h1 data-section-id="1dryn6s" data-start="321" data-end="354">CURRENT STATUS (Very Important)</h1>
<p data-start="355" data-end="369">From your CRS:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ora.prodcdb_dr.db &rarr; INTERMEDIATE / Mounted<br />GI + ASM + SCAN &rarr; OK<br />Database role &rarr; PHYSICAL STANDBY<br />Only 1 node running</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="497" data-end="505">Meaning:</p>
<blockquote data-start="506" data-end="586">
<p data-start="508" data-end="586">Database exists but NOT cluster-managed yet<br data-start="551" data-end="554" />Switchover WILL FAIL currently</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="588" data-end="642">Now we convert it into&nbsp;<strong data-start="611" data-end="642">Cluster Managed RAC Standby</strong></p>
<hr data-start="644" data-end="647" />
<h1 data-section-id="1vwhl2" data-start="649" data-end="694">STEP A &mdash; Move SPFILE to Proper ASM Location</h1>
<p data-start="695" data-end="724">(Required for srvctl control)</p>
<h3 data-section-id="16tilp8" data-start="726" data-end="763">1) Create PARAMETERFILE directory</h3>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">su</span> <span class="ͼf">-</span> grid<br />asmcmd<br /><span class="ͼd">cd</span> <span class="ͼ8">+</span>DATA/PRODCDB_DR<br /><span class="ͼd">mkdir</span> PARAMETERFILE<br /><span class="ͼ8">exit</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="839" data-end="842" />
<h3 data-section-id="og1vfk" data-start="844" data-end="884">2) Create new SPFILE in cluster path</h3>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">sqlplus / as sysdba<br /><br />CREATE <span class="ͼe">SPFILE</span><span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PARAMETERFILE/spfilePRODCDB_DR.ora'</span><br />FROM SPFILE;<br />SHUTDOWN IMMEDIATE;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1020" data-end="1023" />
<h3 data-section-id="e31v2l" data-start="1025" data-end="1061">3) Point init file to ASM spfile</h3>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">cd</span> <span class="ͼe">$ORACLE_HOME</span>/dbs<br /><span class="ͼd">mv</span> initprodcdb_dr.ora initprodcdb_dr.ora.bkp<br /><br /><span class="ͼd">echo</span> <span class="ͼc">"spfile='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PARAMETERFILE/spfilePRODCDB_DR.ora'"</span> &gt; initprodcdb_dr.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">sqlplus / as sysdba<br />startup mount;</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>

<hr data-start="1305" data-end="1308" />
<h1 data-section-id="1875apq" data-start="1310" data-end="1362">STEP B &mdash; Convert Standby Into RAC-Capable Database</h1>
<p data-start="1363" data-end="1411">We prepare for&nbsp;<strong data-start="1378" data-end="1396">2 redo threads</strong>&nbsp;(safe default)</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> cluster_database<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">TRUE</span> SCOPE<span class="ͼ8">=</span>SPFILE SID<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> instance_number<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">1</span> SID<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'PRODCDB_DR1'</span> SCOPE<span class="ͼ8">=</span>SPFILE;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> instance_number<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">2</span> SID<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'PRODCDB_DR2'</span> SCOPE<span class="ͼ8">=</span>SPFILE;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> thread<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">1</span> SID<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'PRODCDB_DR1'</span> SCOPE<span class="ͼ8">=</span>SPFILE;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> thread<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">2</span> SID<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'PRODCDB_DR2'</span> SCOPE<span class="ͼ8">=</span>SPFILE;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> undo_tablespace<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'UNDOTBS1'</span> SID<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'PRODCDB_DR1'</span> SCOPE<span class="ͼ8">=</span>SPFILE;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> undo_tablespace<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'UNDOTBS2'</span> SID<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'PRODCDB_DR2'</span> SCOPE<span class="ͼ8">=</span>SPFILE;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> remote_listener<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'&lt;YOUR_SCAN_NAME&gt;:1521'</span> SCOPE<span class="ͼ8">=</span>SPFILE;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1963" data-end="1976">Then restart:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">shutdown <span class="ͼ8">immediate</span>;<br />startup mount;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2025" data-end="2074">⚠️ Only instance 1 will start &mdash; that is expected.</p>
<hr data-start="2076" data-end="2079" />
<h1 data-section-id="xg47fl" data-start="2081" data-end="2141">STEP C &mdash; Register Database in Clusterware (MOST IMPORTANT)</h1>
<p data-start="2143" data-end="2194">Currently cluster sees DB but not fully configured.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="16d0vdf" data-start="2196" data-end="2237">Remove old incomplete resource (safe)</h3>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">srvctl remove database <span class="ͼf">-d</span> PRODCDB_DR <span class="ͼf">-force</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>

<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">srvctl add database <span class="ͼf">-db</span> PRODCDB_DR \<br /><span class="ͼf">-oraclehome</span> /oracle/app/oracle/database/19.3.0/dbhome_1 \<br /><span class="ͼf">-role</span> physical_standby \<br /><span class="ͼf">-startoption</span> mount \<br /><span class="ͼf">-spfile</span> <span class="ͼ8">+</span>DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PARAMETERFILE/spfilePRODCDB_DR.ora \<br /><span class="ͼf">-diskgroup</span> DATA</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<h1 data-section-id="1q1bqgu" data-start="2876" data-end="2909">STEP D &mdash; Password File into ASM</h1>
<p data-start="2910" data-end="2948">Required for switchover authentication</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">su</span> <span class="ͼf">-</span> grid<br />asmcmd<br />pwcopy <span class="ͼf">--dbuniquename</span> PRODCDB_DR \<br /><span class="ͼe">$ORACLE_HOME</span>/dbs/orapwPRODCDB_DR \<br /><span class="ͼ8">+</span>DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PASSWORD/orapwPRODCDB_DR <span class="ͼf">-f</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">exit</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3100" data-end="3112">Register it:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">srvctl modify database <span class="ͼf">-d</span> PRODCDB_DR \<br /><span class="ͼf">-pwfile</span> <span class="ͼ8">+</span>DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PASSWORD/orapwPRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="">

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

</div>

<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
