<h1 data-section-id="u0ugr7" data-start="3464" data-end="3496">STEP F &mdash; Verify DR Drill Ready</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> name, open_mode, database_role <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$database;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> process, status <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$managed_standby;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> name, <span class="ͼ8">value</span> <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$dataguard_stats<br /><span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> name <span class="ͼ8">IN</span> (<span class="ͼc">'transport lag'</span>,<span class="ͼc">'apply lag'</span>);</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="3700" data-end="3703" />
<h1 data-section-id="fhbe42" data-start="3705" data-end="3734">What Will Happen After This</h1>
<p data-start="3735" data-end="3753">You will now have:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="3755" data-end="3933">
<thead data-start="3755" data-end="3775">
<tr data-start="3755" data-end="3775">
<th class="" data-start="3755" data-end="3765" data-col-size="sm">Feature</th>
<th class="" data-start="3765" data-end="3775" data-col-size="sm">Status</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="3792" data-end="3933">
<tr data-start="3792" data-end="3823">
<td data-start="3792" data-end="3816" data-col-size="sm">Cluster managed standby</td>
<td data-start="3816" data-end="3823" data-col-size="sm">YES</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="3824" data-end="3848">
<td data-start="3824" data-end="3841" data-col-size="sm">Switchover ready</td>
<td data-start="3841" data-end="3848" data-col-size="sm">YES</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="3849" data-end="3876">
<td data-start="3849" data-end="3869" data-col-size="sm">Future RAC node add</td>
<td data-start="3869" data-end="3876" data-col-size="sm">YES</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="3877" data-end="3904">
<td data-start="3877" data-end="3897" data-col-size="sm">Auto failover ready</td>
<td data-start="3897" data-end="3904" data-col-size="sm">YES</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="3905" data-end="3933">
<td data-start="3905" data-end="3926" data-col-size="sm">DC-DR Drill possible</td>
<td data-start="3926" data-end="3933" data-col-size="sm">YES</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="3935" data-end="3938" />
<p data-start="3940" data-end="4033">When DC team sends thread info &rarr;<br data-start="3972" data-end="3975" />we only adjust&nbsp;<code data-start="3990" data-end="3998">thread</code>&nbsp;count (2 or 3). No rebuild needed.</p>
<hr data-start="4035" data-end="4038" />
<p data-start="4040" data-end="4097">👉 After you finish STEP-C (srvctl start database), send:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">srvctl status database -d PRODCDB_DR<br />crsctl stat res -t | grep prodcdb</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="4179" data-end="4230" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">That output will confirm your DR is now HA-capable.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="27b91816-66e7-44da-a44c-ff123d974422" data-testid="conversation-turn-51" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">

<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">

<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">This is the current state of asmcmd ASMCMD&gt; ls -lht Type Redund Striped Time Sys Name N TEMPFILE/ N PASSWORD/ Y PARAMETERFILE/ N ONLINELOG/ N FRA/ N DATAFILE/ N CONTROLFILE/ Y ARCHIVELOG/ Y 3B4E2A5C6120029EE06385053D0A3FD8/ Y 28182BC4CF6C4887E053B340D20A8B55/ PARAMETERFILE UNPROT COARSE FEB 17 18:00:00 N spfilePRODCDB_DR.ora =&gt; +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PARAMETERFILE/spfile.357.1225477299 CONTROLFILE UNPROT FINE FEB 17 18:00:00 N control02.ctl =&gt; +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/CONTROLFILE/current.354.1225478087 CONTROLFILE UNPROT FINE FEB 17 18:00:00 N control01.ctl =&gt; +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/CONTROLFILE/current.352.1225478085 PASSWORD UNPROT COARSE JAN 07 19:00:00 N orapwprodcdb =&gt; +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PASSWORD/pwdprodcdb_dr.261.1221940211 ASMCMD&gt; PARAMETER forlder is already there with spfile.357.1225477299</div>
</div>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="e5f2ed0e-4b9e-4742-9be2-e68c3c08146f" data-testid="conversation-turn-52" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="bdcbd452-3b72-494c-aaf3-e93dfe909cf4" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="157">Good 👍 &mdash; this output is&nbsp;<strong data-start="25" data-end="40">very useful</strong>.<br data-start="41" data-end="44" />It tells us your&nbsp;<strong data-start="61" data-end="114">Standby RAC database is partially created already</strong>&nbsp;(controlfile + spfile exist), which means:</p>
<p data-start="159" data-end="296">👉&nbsp;<strong data-start="162" data-end="236">RMAN duplicate has already initialized the standby DB structure in ASM</strong><br data-start="236" data-end="239" />but database is&nbsp;<strong data-start="255" data-end="295">NOT yet mounted/recovered/configured</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="298" data-end="396">So while DC team sends redo thread details, we can safely complete&nbsp;<strong data-start="365" data-end="395">80% of standby preparation</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="398" data-end="401" />
<h1 data-section-id="dcar2r" data-start="403" data-end="441">Current DR ASM State (What it Means)</h1>
<p data-start="443" data-end="470">From your&nbsp;<code data-start="453" data-end="469">asmcmd ls -lht</code>:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="472" data-end="856">
<thead data-start="472" data-end="499">
<tr data-start="472" data-end="499">
<th class="" data-start="472" data-end="479" data-col-size="sm">Item</th>
<th class="" data-start="479" data-end="488" data-col-size="sm">Status</th>
<th class="" data-start="488" data-end="499" data-col-size="sm">Meaning</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="523" data-end="856">
<tr data-start="523" data-end="584">
<td data-start="523" data-end="548" data-col-size="sm"><code data-start="525" data-end="547">spfilePRODCDB_DR.ora</code></td>
<td data-start="548" data-end="558" data-col-size="sm">Present</td>
<td data-start="558" data-end="584" data-col-size="sm">Standby DB initialized</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="585" data-end="650">
<td data-start="585" data-end="606" data-col-size="sm"><code data-start="587" data-end="605">control01/02.ctl</code></td>
<td data-start="606" data-end="616" data-col-size="sm">Present</td>
<td data-start="616" data-end="650" data-col-size="sm">Duplicate started successfully</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="651" data-end="698">
<td data-start="651" data-end="665" data-col-size="sm"><code data-start="653" data-end="664">DATAFILE/</code></td>
<td data-start="665" data-end="673" data-col-size="sm">Empty</td>
<td data-start="673" data-end="698" data-col-size="sm">Restore not completed</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="699" data-end="759">
<td data-start="699" data-end="714" data-col-size="sm"><code data-start="701" data-end="713">ONLINELOG/</code></td>
<td data-start="714" data-end="722" data-col-size="sm">Empty</td>
<td data-start="722" data-end="759" data-col-size="sm">Standby redo logs not created yet</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="760" data-end="808">
<td data-start="760" data-end="776" data-col-size="sm"><code data-start="762" data-end="775">ARCHIVELOG/</code></td>
<td data-start="776" data-end="786" data-col-size="sm">Present</td>
<td data-start="786" data-end="808" data-col-size="sm">Ready for recovery</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="809" data-end="856">
<td data-start="809" data-end="822" data-col-size="sm"><code data-start="811" data-end="821">PASSWORD</code></td>
<td data-start="822" data-end="832" data-col-size="sm">Present</td>
<td data-start="832" data-end="856" data-col-size="sm">Authentication ready</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="858" data-end="918">👉 So database exists in&nbsp;<strong data-start="883" data-end="918">NOMOUNT/partial duplicate state</strong></p>
<p data-start="920" data-end="1005">We now prepare it so that once thread count arrives &rarr; only redo log creation remains.</p>
<hr data-start="1007" data-end="1010" />
<h1 data-section-id="w8fgec" data-start="1012" data-end="1056">STEP 1 &mdash; Start Standby Instance in NOMOUNT</h1>
<p data-start="1057" data-end="1070">On DR node 1:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">export</span> <span class="ͼe">ORACLE_SID</span><span class="ͼ8">=</span>PRODCDB1<br />sqlplus / as sysdba</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">startup nomount;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1161" data-end="1198">If fails &rarr; show me error (important).</p>
<hr data-start="1200" data-end="1203" />
<h1 data-section-id="jyktm4" data-start="1205" data-end="1267">STEP 2 &mdash; Verify SPFILE Parameters (Critical for RAC Standby)</h1>
<p data-start="1269" data-end="1273">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> db_name<br />show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> db_unique_name<br />show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> instance_number<br />show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> cluster_database</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1403" data-end="1412">Expected:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="1414" data-end="1541">
<thead data-start="1414" data-end="1435">
<tr data-start="1414" data-end="1435">
<th class="" data-start="1414" data-end="1426" data-col-size="sm">Parameter</th>
<th class="" data-start="1426" data-end="1435" data-col-size="sm">Value</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="1452" data-end="1541">
<tr data-start="1452" data-end="1481">
<td data-start="1452" data-end="1462" data-col-size="sm">db_name</td>
<td data-start="1462" data-end="1481" data-col-size="sm">SAME as primary</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1482" data-end="1513">
<td data-start="1482" data-end="1499" data-col-size="sm">db_unique_name</td>
<td data-start="1499" data-end="1513" data-col-size="sm">PRODCDB_DR</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1514" data-end="1541">
<td data-start="1514" data-end="1533" data-col-size="sm">cluster_database</td>
<td data-start="1533" data-end="1541" data-col-size="sm">TRUE</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1543" data-end="1546" />
<h1 data-section-id="1nfhix4" data-start="1548" data-end="1609">STEP 3 &mdash; Add Mandatory DataGuard Parameters (We can do now)</h1>
<p data-start="1611" data-end="1626">Run in standby:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> log_archive_config<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'DG_CONFIG=(PRODCDB,PRODCDB_DR)'</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> log_archive_dest_1<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'LOCATION=USE_DB_RECOVERY_FILE_DEST VALID_FOR=(ALL_LOGFILES,ALL_ROLES) DB_UNIQUE_NAME=PRODCDB_DR'</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> log_archive_dest_2<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'SERVICE=PRODCDB ASYNC VALID_FOR=(ONLINE_LOGFILES,PRIMARY_ROLE) DB_UNIQUE_NAME=PRODCDB'</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> fal_server<span class="ͼ8">=</span>PRODCDB scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> fal_client<span class="ͼ8">=</span>PRODCDB_DR scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> standby_file_management<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'AUTO'</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2214" data-end="2217" />
<h1 data-section-id="vem26f" data-start="2219" data-end="2273">STEP 4 &mdash; Create Standby Redo Logs (Wait for DC Team)</h1>
<p data-start="2274" data-end="2316">⚠️ DO NOT RUN YET &mdash; depends on this query:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">SELECT thread#, instance_name FROM gv$instance;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2375" data-end="2406">Because RAC standby redo logs =</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">(#online logs per thread + 1) &times; threads</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2457" data-end="2465">Example:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="2467" data-end="2591">
<thead data-start="2467" data-end="2495">
<tr data-start="2467" data-end="2495">
<th class="" data-start="2467" data-end="2481" data-col-size="sm">Primary RAC</th>
<th class="" data-start="2481" data-end="2495" data-col-size="sm">Needed SRL</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="2512" data-end="2591">
<tr data-start="2512" data-end="2541">
<td data-start="2512" data-end="2522" data-col-size="sm">2 nodes</td>
<td data-start="2522" data-end="2541" data-col-size="sm">per thread logs</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="2542" data-end="2567">
<td data-start="2542" data-end="2552" data-col-size="sm">3 nodes</td>
<td data-start="2552" data-end="2567" data-col-size="sm">more groups</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="2568" data-end="2591">
<td data-start="2568" data-end="2578" data-col-size="sm">4 nodes</td>
<td data-start="2578" data-end="2591" data-col-size="sm">even more</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2593" data-end="2618">So we wait for DC output.</p>
<hr data-start="2620" data-end="2623" />
<h1 data-section-id="11ulecr" data-start="2625" data-end="2677">STEP 5 &mdash; Prepare TNS Connectivity (You can do now)</h1>
<p data-start="2679" data-end="2703">On DR both nodes &mdash; edit:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">$ORACLE_HOME/network/admin/tnsnames.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2754" data-end="2766">Add PRIMARY:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">PRODCDB =<br /> (DESCRIPTION =<br /> (ADDRESS = (PROTOCOL = TCP)(HOST = &lt;PRIMARY_SCAN_IP&gt;)(PORT = 1521))<br /> (CONNECT_DATA =<br /> (SERVER = DEDICATED)<br /> (SERVICE_NAME = PRODCDB)<br /> )<br /> )</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2957" data-end="2962">Test:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">tnsping PRODCDB</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>

<hr data-start="2993" data-end="2996" />
<h1 data-section-id="1amw0ks" data-start="2998" data-end="3033">STEP 6 &mdash; Password File Copy Check</h1>
<p data-start="3034" data-end="3049">Already exists:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3100" data-end="3136">Now ensure PRIMARY password matches:</p>
<p data-start="3138" data-end="3149">On Primary:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">scp $ORACLE_HOME/dbs/orapwPRODCDB oracle@drnode:/tmp/</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3214" data-end="3220">On DR:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">asmcmd<br />pwcopy /tmp/orapwPRODCDB +DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PASSWORD/orapwprodcdb</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="fa473033-2cd2-41d7-80fc-91f71cd7c709" data-testid="conversation-turn-54" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="fa473033-2cd2-41d7-80fc-91f71cd7c709" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="48">Perfect 👌 &mdash; this screenshot changes everything.</p>
<blockquote data-start="50" data-end="132">
<p data-start="52" data-end="132"><strong data-start="52" data-end="93">RMAN Duplicate COMPLETED successfully</strong><br /><code data-start="96" data-end="132">Finished Duplicate Db at 19-FEB-26</code></p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="134" data-end="161">And now we can clearly see:</p>
<p data-start="163" data-end="353">✔ Controlfile created<br data-start="184" data-end="187" />✔ SPFILE created<br data-start="203" data-end="206" />✔ Datafiles restored (~1.2 TB)<br data-start="236" data-end="239" />✔ Archivelogs generated<br data-start="262" data-end="265" />❌ Standby Redo Logs not created<br data-start="296" data-end="299" />❌ Recovery not started<br data-start="321" data-end="324" />❌ Not yet a DataGuard standby</p>
<p data-start="355" data-end="396">So your standby database is currently in:</p>
<blockquote data-start="398" data-end="500">
<p data-start="400" data-end="500">🟡&nbsp;<strong data-start="403" data-end="442">RESTORED but NOT SYNCHRONIZED state</strong><br data-start="442" data-end="445" />(technically:&nbsp;<em data-start="459" data-end="499">mounted clone, not yet managed standby</em>)</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="502" data-end="646">We no longer wait for DC team to continue &mdash; we only need thread count for final SRL creation.<br data-start="595" data-end="598" />But we can safely configure everything else now.</p>
<hr data-start="648" data-end="651" />
<h1 data-section-id="1y4mr9x" data-start="653" data-end="703">STEP 1 &mdash; Start the Standby Database (Mount Mode)</h1>
<p data-start="705" data-end="718">On DR Node 1:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>

<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">export</span> <span class="ͼe">ORACLE_SID</span><span class="ͼ8">=</span>PRODCDB1<br />sqlplus / as sysdba</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

</div>

<hr data-start="844" data-end="847" />
<h1 data-section-id="qz2vej" data-start="849" data-end="897">STEP 2 &mdash; Fix Standby Identity (VERY IMPORTANT)</h1>
<p data-start="899" data-end="903">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> db_name;<br />show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> db_unique_name;<br />show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> cluster_database;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1005" data-end="1014">Expected:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">

</div>

<hr data-start="1192" data-end="1195" />
<h1 data-section-id="aaau7o" data-start="1197" data-end="1238">STEP 3 &mdash; Configure DataGuard Parameters</h1>
<p data-start="1240" data-end="1252">Run exactly:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> log_archive_config<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'DG_CONFIG=(PRODCDB,PRODCDB_DR)'</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> log_archive_dest_1<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'LOCATION=USE_DB_RECOVERY_FILE_DEST VALID_FOR=(ALL_LOGFILES,ALL_ROLES) DB_UNIQUE_NAME=PRODCDB_DR'</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> log_archive_dest_2<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'SERVICE=PRODCDB ASYNC NOAFFIRM VALID_FOR=(ONLINE_LOGFILES,PRIMARY_ROLE) DB_UNIQUE_NAME=PRODCDB'</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> fal_server<span class="ͼ8">=</span>PRODCDB scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> fal_client<span class="ͼ8">=</span>PRODCDB_DR scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> standby_file_management<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'AUTO'</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1849" data-end="1852" />

<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">recover managed standby database <span class="ͼ8">disconnect</span> <span class="ͼ8">from</span> <span class="ͼ8">session</span>;</div>

<div class="">

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<h1 data-section-id="1bi79gw" data-start="2254" data-end="2303">STEP 5 &mdash; TNS Connectivity (Most Common Failure)</h1>
<p data-start="2305" data-end="2313">From DR:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2374" data-end="2414">If this fails &rarr; standby will never sync.</p>

<h1 data-section-id="1343q0y" data-start="2421" data-end="2459">STEP 6 &mdash; What We Are Waiting From DC</h1>
<p data-start="2461" data-end="2471">Only this:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, instance_name <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> gv$instance;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2533" data-end="2556">Because we must create:</p>
<blockquote data-start="2558" data-end="2588">
<p data-start="2560" data-end="2588">Standby Redo Logs PER THREAD</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="2590" data-end="2598">Formula:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">SRL groups = online redo groups per thread + 1</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2656" data-end="2689">After we get it &rarr; final commands:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">1) Add SRL<br />2) Cancel recovery<br />3) Enable real-time apply<br />4) Standby becomes ACTIVE DATAGUARD</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<hr data-start="2792" data-end="2795" />
<h1 data-section-id="4t1nkt" data-start="2797" data-end="2810">Do This Now</h1>
<p data-start="2811" data-end="2839">Please run and paste output:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<p data-start="242" data-end="359">So now your DR database is&nbsp;<strong data-start="269" data-end="302">officially a standby database</strong><br data-start="302" data-end="305" />➡️ Next step = start log shipping + apply (Data Guard)</p>

<hr data-start="424" data-end="427" />
<h1 data-section-id="175lcn8" data-start="429" data-end="471">Now We Make It a Real Data Guard Standby</h1>
<h2 data-section-id="9h98ws" data-start="473" data-end="506">1️⃣ Verify Required Parameters</h2>
<p data-start="507" data-end="511">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> db_unique_name;<br />show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> log_archive_config;<br />show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> fal_server;<br />show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> fal_client;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="645" data-end="694">Paste output (important before starting recovery)</p>
<hr data-start="696" data-end="699" />
<h2 data-section-id="1grymp7" data-start="701" data-end="747">2️⃣ Configure Standby Data Guard Parameters</h2>
<p data-start="748" data-end="763">(Execute on DR)</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> log_archive_config<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'DG_CONFIG=(PRODCDB,PRODCDB_DR)'</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> log_archive_dest_1<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'LOCATION=USE_DB_RECOVERY_FILE_DEST VALID_FOR=(ALL_LOGFILES,ALL_ROLES) DB_UNIQUE_NAME=PRODCDB_DR'</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> log_archive_dest_2<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'SERVICE=PRODCDB ASYNC NOAFFIRM VALID_FOR=(ONLINE_LOGFILES,PRIMARY_ROLE) DB_UNIQUE_NAME=PRODCDB'</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> fal_server<span class="ͼ8">=</span>PRODCDB scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> fal_client<span class="ͼ8">=</span>PRODCDB_DR scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">alter</span> system <span class="ͼ8">set</span> standby_file_management<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'AUTO'</span> scope<span class="ͼ8">=both</span> sid<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
