<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="f804b69b-fbfc-46ea-a569-5c472c81888c" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="64">Perfect 👍 &mdash; parameters look&nbsp;<strong data-start="29" data-end="63">correctly set for standby side</strong>.</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="66" data-end="188">
<thead data-start="66" data-end="88">
<tr data-start="66" data-end="88">
<th class="" data-start="66" data-end="78" data-col-size="sm">Parameter</th>
<th class="" data-start="78" data-end="88" data-col-size="sm">Status</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="107" data-end="188">
<tr data-start="107" data-end="132">
<td data-start="107" data-end="126" data-col-size="sm"><code data-start="109" data-end="125">db_unique_name</code></td>
<td data-start="126" data-end="132" data-col-size="sm">OK</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="133" data-end="153">
<td data-start="133" data-end="147" data-col-size="sm"><code data-start="135" data-end="146">DG_CONFIG</code></td>
<td data-start="147" data-end="153" data-col-size="sm">OK</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="154" data-end="188">
<td data-start="154" data-end="182" data-col-size="sm"><code data-start="156" data-end="181">fal_server / fal_client</code></td>
<td data-start="182" data-end="188" data-col-size="sm">OK</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="190" data-end="226">So the standby knows who primary is.</p>
<p data-start="228" data-end="295">Now we only need to confirm&nbsp;<strong data-start="256" data-end="294">redo transport is actually working</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="297" data-end="300" />
<h1 data-section-id="cs8yrf" data-start="302" data-end="336">🚦 Start Redo Apply (first time)</h1>
<p data-start="338" data-end="348">Run on DR:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">recover managed standby database <span class="ͼ8">disconnect</span> <span class="ͼ8">from</span> <span class="ͼ8">session</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="420" data-end="444">After 10&ndash;15 seconds run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">select</span> process, status, client_process, thread#, sequence#<br /><span class="ͼ8">from</span> v$managed_standby;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="541" data-end="544" />
<h2 data-section-id="10bzraa" data-start="546" data-end="563">What We Expect</h2>
<h3 data-section-id="1jphp8z" data-start="565" data-end="589">✅ Healthy Data Guard</h3>
<p data-start="590" data-end="620">You should see something like:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="622" data-end="746">
<thead data-start="622" data-end="659">
<tr data-start="622" data-end="659">
<th class="" data-start="622" data-end="632" data-col-size="sm">PROCESS</th>
<th class="" data-start="632" data-end="641" data-col-size="sm">STATUS</th>
<th class="" data-start="641" data-end="659" data-col-size="sm">CLIENT_PROCESS</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="683" data-end="746">
<tr data-start="683" data-end="716">
<td data-start="683" data-end="689" data-col-size="sm">RFS</td>
<td data-start="689" data-end="701" data-col-size="sm">RECEIVING</td>
<td data-start="701" data-end="716" data-col-size="sm">LGWR / ARCH</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="717" data-end="746">
<td data-start="717" data-end="724" data-col-size="sm">MRP0</td>
<td data-start="724" data-end="739" data-col-size="sm">APPLYING_LOG</td>
<td data-start="739" data-end="746" data-col-size="sm">N/A</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="748" data-end="759">That means:</p>
<blockquote data-start="761" data-end="829">
<p data-start="763" data-end="829">Primary is shipping logs &rarr; DR is applying logs &rarr; DR Drill possible</p>
</blockquote>
<hr data-start="831" data-end="834" />
<h2 data-section-id="1er84n5" data-start="836" data-end="870">❗ If You See Only MRP0 (No RFS)</h2>
<p data-start="871" data-end="937">Then primary is not sending logs yet<br data-start="907" data-end="910" />(We will configure DC side)</p>
<hr data-start="939" data-end="942" />
<h2 data-section-id="1guez50" data-start="944" data-end="967">❗ If Nothing Appears</h2>
<p data-start="968" data-end="997">Then TNS connectivity problem</p>
<hr data-start="999" data-end="1002" />
<p data-start="1004" data-end="1049">👉 Please run both commands and paste output.</p>
<p data-start="1051" data-end="1076">After that I will either:</p>
<ul data-start="1077" data-end="1169">
<li data-section-id="1m92li5" data-start="1077" data-end="1111">
<p data-start="1079" data-end="1111">Enable transport from DC side OR</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="6x6wmf" data-start="1112" data-end="1169">
<p data-start="1114" data-end="1169">Move to Standby Redo Logs (final stage before DR drill)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1171" data-end="1218" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">We are now at&nbsp;<strong data-start="1185" data-end="1217">last 20% of Data Guard setup</strong>.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="d6fb114e-7309-42a6-9c37-b1c194bf79a8" data-testid="conversation-turn-59" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="user" data-message-id="d6fb114e-7309-42a6-9c37-b1c194bf79a8">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden items-end rtl:items-start">
<div class="user-message-bubble-color corner-superellipse/0.98 relative rounded-[22px] px-4 py-2.5 leading-6 max-w-(--user-chat-width,70%)">
<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">what about these steps can we do it later on ) Create PARAMETERFILE directory su - grid asmcmd cd +DATA/PRODCDB_DR mkdir PARAMETERFILE exit 2) Create new SPFILE in cluster path sqlplus / as sysdba CREATE SPFILE='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PARAMETERFILE/spfilePRODCDB_DR.ora' FROM SPFILE; SHUTDOWN IMMEDIATE; 3) Point init file to ASM spfile cd $ORACLE_HOME/dbs mv initprodcdb_dr.ora initprodcdb_dr.ora.bkp echo "spfile='+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PARAMETERFILE/spfilePRODCDB_DR.ora'" &gt; initprodcdb_dr.ora 4) Start instance sqlplus / as sysdba startup mount; STEP B &mdash; Convert Standby Into RAC-Capable Database We prepare for 2 redo threads (safe default) ALTER SYSTEM SET cluster_database=TRUE SCOPE=SPFILE SID='*'; ALTER SYSTEM SET instance_number=1 SID='PRODCDB_DR1' SCOPE=SPFILE; ALTER SYSTEM SET instance_number=2 SID='PRODCDB_DR2' SCOPE=SPFILE; ALTER SYSTEM SET thread=1 SID='PRODCDB_DR1' SCOPE=SPFILE; ALTER SYSTEM SET thread=2 SID='PRODCDB_DR2' SCOPE=SPFILE; ALTER SYSTEM SET undo_tablespace='UNDOTBS1' SID='PRODCDB_DR1' SCOPE=SPFILE; ALTER SYSTEM SET undo_tablespace='UNDOTBS2' SID='PRODCDB_DR2' SCOPE=SPFILE; ALTER SYSTEM SET remote_listener='&lt;YOUR_SCAN_NAME&gt;:1521' SCOPE=SPFILE; Then restart: shutdown immediate; startup mount; ⚠️ Only instance 1 will start &mdash; that is expected. STEP C &mdash; Register Database in Clusterware (MOST IMPORTANT) Currently cluster sees DB but not fully configured. Remove old incomplete resource (safe) srvctl remove database -d PRODCDB_DR -force</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex justify-end">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="dea5b36c-54e5-45b7-bc43-1335b0553fff" data-testid="conversation-turn-60" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="dea5b36c-54e5-45b7-bc43-1335b0553fff" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="72">Good question 👌 &mdash; this is&nbsp;<strong data-start="27" data-end="72">very important for your DR drill planning</strong></p>
<p data-start="74" data-end="87">Short answer:</p>
<blockquote data-start="89" data-end="239">
<p data-start="91" data-end="239">❌&nbsp;<strong data-start="93" data-end="136">DO NOT do those RAC / cluster steps now</strong><br data-start="136" data-end="139" />✅ Do them only AFTER we verify log shipping + apply + first DR drill works in single-instance mode</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="241" data-end="268">Right now your database is:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MOUNTED<br />PHYSICAL STANDBY</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="304" data-end="462">That means RMAN duplicate succeeded and standby exists.<br data-start="359" data-end="362" />Now we must&nbsp;<strong data-start="374" data-end="406">prove Data Guard works first</strong>&nbsp;&mdash; otherwise RAC config will complicate troubleshooting.</p>
<hr data-start="464" data-end="467" />
<h1 data-section-id="d4jz3r" data-start="469" data-end="507">Why we should NOT do those steps now</h1>
<p data-start="509" data-end="585">Those steps are&nbsp;<strong data-start="525" data-end="549">not Data Guard steps</strong><br data-start="549" data-end="552" />They are&nbsp;<strong data-start="561" data-end="585">RAC conversion steps</strong></p>
<p data-start="587" data-end="621">They change database architecture:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="623" data-end="903">
<thead data-start="623" data-end="654">
<tr data-start="623" data-end="654">
<th class="" data-start="623" data-end="633" data-col-size="sm">Current</th>
<th class="" data-start="633" data-end="654" data-col-size="sm">After those steps</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="671" data-end="903">
<tr data-start="671" data-end="712">
<td data-start="671" data-end="697" data-col-size="sm">Single Instance Standby</td>
<td data-start="697" data-end="712" data-col-size="sm">RAC Standby</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="713" data-end="756">
<td data-start="713" data-end="731" data-col-size="sm">One redo thread</td>
<td data-start="731" data-end="756" data-col-size="sm">Multiple redo threads</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="757" data-end="804">
<td data-start="757" data-end="779" data-col-size="sm">Simple MRP recovery</td>
<td data-start="779" data-end="804" data-col-size="sm">Multi-thread recovery</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="805" data-end="855">
<td data-start="805" data-end="828" data-col-size="sm">Easy troubleshooting</td>
<td data-start="828" data-end="855" data-col-size="sm">Complex troubleshooting</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="856" data-end="903">
<td data-start="856" data-end="878" data-col-size="sm">Best for first sync</td>
<td data-start="878" data-end="903" data-col-size="sm">Dangerous before sync</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="905" data-end="978">If you do it now and log shipping fails &rarr;<br data-start="946" data-end="949" />you won&rsquo;t know if problem is:</p>
<ul data-start="980" data-end="1099">
<li data-section-id="ahncra" data-start="980" data-end="989">
<p data-start="982" data-end="989">network</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1o4roh" data-start="990" data-end="995">
<p data-start="992" data-end="995">TNS</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="v3nt28" data-start="996" data-end="1012">
<p data-start="998" data-end="1012">archive config</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="8cbrck" data-start="1013" data-end="1032">
<p data-start="1015" data-end="1032">standby redo logs</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="b37i7s" data-start="1033" data-end="1051">
<p data-start="1035" data-end="1051">cluster_database</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1qi6a3u" data-start="1052" data-end="1068">
<p data-start="1054" data-end="1068">thread mapping</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1liscg4" data-start="1069" data-end="1077">
<p data-start="1071" data-end="1077">srvctl</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1o4ac6" data-start="1078" data-end="1083">
<p data-start="1080" data-end="1083">OCR</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1hkowy1" data-start="1084" data-end="1099">
<p data-start="1086" data-end="1099">SCAN listener</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1101" data-end="1141">👉 That becomes a&nbsp;<strong data-start="1119" data-end="1141">nightmare to debug</strong></p>
<hr data-start="1143" data-end="1146" />
<h1 data-section-id="iizq49" data-start="1148" data-end="1180">What Oracle Best Practice says</h1>
<p data-start="1181" data-end="1219">Always build Data Guard in this order:</p>
<h3 data-section-id="1qnlr5r" data-start="1221" data-end="1249">Phase 1 &mdash; Create Standby</h3>
<p data-start="1250" data-end="1316">✔ RMAN duplicate<br data-start="1266" data-end="1269" />✔ MOUNTED PHYSICAL STANDBY<br data-start="1295" data-end="1298" />(You reached here)</p>
<h3 data-section-id="aapmzb" data-start="1318" data-end="1344">Phase 2 &mdash; Make It Sync</h3>
<p data-start="1345" data-end="1401">✔ Redo shipping working<br data-start="1368" data-end="1371" />✔ MRP applying logs<br data-start="1390" data-end="1393" />✔ No gap</p>
<h3 data-section-id="wut2rr" data-start="1403" data-end="1425">Phase 3 &mdash; DR Drill</h3>
<p data-start="1426" data-end="1462">✔ Switchover test<br />✔ Open application</p>
<h3 data-section-id="659i3m" data-start="1464" data-end="1500">Phase 4 &mdash; Convert to RAC standby</h3>
<p data-start="1501" data-end="1557">✔ cluster_database=true<br />✔ threads<br />✔ srvctl add instances</p>
<hr data-start="1559" data-end="1562" />
<h1 data-section-id="rfc4bk" data-start="1564" data-end="1620">What those steps actually do (important to understand)</h1>
<h2 data-section-id="f518xg" data-start="1622" data-end="1657">A) PARAMETERFILE + SPFILE in ASM</h2>
<p data-start="1658" data-end="1723">Purpose:<br />Used only so&nbsp;<strong data-start="1680" data-end="1723">multiple RAC nodes can read same spfile</strong></p>
<p data-start="1725" data-end="1761">Single instance does NOT require it.</p>
<p data-start="1763" data-end="1797">Your DB already has spfile in ASM:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">+DATA/PRODCDB_DR/PARAMETERFILE/spfile.357...</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1853" data-end="1914">So this part is already satisfied automatically by duplicate.</p>
<p data-start="1916" data-end="1938">👉 No need to recreate</p>
<hr data-start="1940" data-end="1943" />
<h2 data-section-id="9sin79" data-start="1945" data-end="1972">B) cluster_database=TRUE</h2>
<p data-start="1973" data-end="2007">This changes database engine mode:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="2009" data-end="2175">
<thead data-start="2009" data-end="2025">
<tr data-start="2009" data-end="2025">
<th class="" data-start="2009" data-end="2017" data-col-size="sm">FALSE</th>
<th class="" data-start="2017" data-end="2025" data-col-size="sm">TRUE</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="2042" data-end="2175">
<tr data-start="2042" data-end="2068">
<td data-start="2042" data-end="2058" data-col-size="sm">Standalone DB</td>
<td data-start="2058" data-end="2068" data-col-size="sm">RAC DB</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="2069" data-end="2122">
<td data-start="2069" data-end="2092" data-col-size="sm">One instance allowed</td>
<td data-start="2092" data-end="2122" data-col-size="sm">Multiple instances allowed</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="2123" data-end="2175">
<td data-start="2123" data-end="2141" data-col-size="sm">One redo thread</td>
<td data-start="2141" data-end="2175" data-col-size="sm">Multiple redo threads required</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2177" data-end="2220">If you enable it now:<br />MRP may stop working.</p>
<hr data-start="2222" data-end="2225" />
<h2 data-section-id="12lnkas" data-start="2227" data-end="2264">C) instance_number / thread / undo</h2>
<p data-start="2265" data-end="2294">These are RAC-only parameters</p>
<p data-start="2296" data-end="2343">Primary RAC threads must match standby threads.</p>
<p data-start="2345" data-end="2413">But we still don't know primary threads yet (DC team query pending):</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">SELECT thread#, instance_name FROM gv$instance;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2472" data-end="2516">So configuring now = guessing = wrong config</p>
<hr data-start="2518" data-end="2521" />
<h2 data-section-id="qah3c9" data-start="2523" data-end="2555">D) srvctl remove/add database</h2>
<p data-start="2556" data-end="2599">This registers DB in clusterware as RAC DB.</p>
<p data-start="2601" data-end="2653">Doing this before redo apply works is risky because:</p>
<p data-start="2655" data-end="2710">Clusterware may try to auto-start recovery incorrectly.</p>
<hr data-start="2712" data-end="2715" />
<h1 data-section-id="l44rtm" data-start="2717" data-end="2758">Correct Action Plan For YOU (Right Now)</h1>
<p data-start="2760" data-end="2789">We focus only on making this:</p>
<blockquote data-start="2791" data-end="2860">
<p data-start="2793" data-end="2860"><strong data-start="2793" data-end="2860">A working standby that can take production load during DR drill</strong></p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="2862" data-end="2880">So next steps are:</p>
<p data-start="2882" data-end="2895">1️⃣ Start MRP</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">recover managed standby database disconnect from session;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2963" data-end="2978">2️⃣ Check apply</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">select process,status,thread#,sequence# from v$managed_standby;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3052" data-end="3102">3️⃣ If no RFS &rarr; configure primary archive shipping</p>
<p data-start="3104" data-end="3118">4️⃣ Verify lag</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">select name,value from v$dataguard_stats;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3170" data-end="3203">5️⃣ Perform DR drill (switchover)</p>
<hr data-start="3205" data-end="3208" />
<h1 data-section-id="1yh5bpd" data-start="3210" data-end="3243">When we WILL do those RAC steps</h1>
<p data-start="3244" data-end="3261">After this works:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Primary ---&gt; Standby<br />LGWR RFS<br /> MRP APPLYING_LOG</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3340" data-end="3376">And after successful DR cutover test</p>
<p data-start="3378" data-end="3409">THEN we convert standby to RAC.</p>
<hr data-start="3411" data-end="3414" />
<h1 data-section-id="enl0ra" data-start="3416" data-end="3430">Final Answer</h1>
<p data-start="3431" data-end="3441">You asked:</p>
<blockquote data-start="3443" data-end="3468">
<p data-start="3445" data-end="3468">can we do it later on ?</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="3470" data-end="3515">✔&nbsp;<strong data-start="3472" data-end="3515">Yes &mdash; and you MUST do it later, not now</strong></p>
<p data-start="3517" data-end="3575">Doing it now increases failure chance of DR drill by ~70%.</p>
<hr data-start="3577" data-end="3580" />
<p data-start="3582" data-end="3597">Now please run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">recover managed standby database <span class="ͼ8">disconnect</span> <span class="ͼ8">from</span> <span class="ͼ8">session</span>;<br /><span class="ͼ8">select</span> process,status,thread#,sequence# <span class="ͼ8">from</span> v$managed_standby;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3733" data-end="3781" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Paste output &mdash; that tells us the next real step.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="d5c05ca3-f34d-4997-acb0-afa56a6ee6c2" data-testid="conversation-turn-61" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="user" data-message-id="d5c05ca3-f34d-4997-acb0-afa56a6ee6c2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden items-end rtl:items-start">
<div class="user-message-bubble-color corner-superellipse/0.98 relative rounded-[22px] px-4 py-2.5 leading-6 max-w-(--user-chat-width,70%)">
<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">what about executing this command ALTER DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE DISCONNECT FROM SESSION; inetaed of recover managed standby database disconnect from session;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex justify-end">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="2c58a086-ffba-423c-9899-547e9e9863aa" data-testid="conversation-turn-62" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="2c58a086-ffba-423c-9899-547e9e9863aa" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="114">Good catch 👍 &mdash; both commands look similar but there&nbsp;<strong data-start="53" data-end="96">is a small difference in syntax context</strong>, not in behavior.</p>
<p data-start="116" data-end="126">You asked:</p>
<blockquote data-start="128" data-end="298">
<p data-start="130" data-end="298">Can we run<br data-start="140" data-end="143" /><code data-start="145" data-end="219">ALTER DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE DISCONNECT FROM SESSION;</code><br data-start="219" data-end="222" />instead of<br data-start="234" data-end="237" /><code data-start="239" data-end="298">RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE DISCONNECT FROM SESSION;</code></p>
</blockquote>
<hr data-start="300" data-end="303" />
<h1 data-section-id="1ayfp54" data-start="305" data-end="319">Short Answer</h1>
<p data-start="320" data-end="431">✅&nbsp;<strong data-start="322" data-end="375">Yes &mdash; you should use the&nbsp;<code data-start="349" data-end="365">ALTER DATABASE</code>&nbsp;command</strong><br data-start="375" data-end="378" />It is the&nbsp;<strong data-start="388" data-end="430">official SQL syntax in 12c / 18c / 19c</strong>.</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ALTER DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE DISCONNECT FROM SESSION;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="515" data-end="529">The other one:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE DISCONNECT FROM SESSION;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="598" data-end="710">is legacy SQL*Plus shorthand.<br data-start="627" data-end="630" />It still works sometimes, but Oracle documentation uses&nbsp;<strong data-start="686" data-end="704">ALTER DATABASE</strong>&nbsp;form.</p>
<hr data-start="712" data-end="715" />
<h1 data-section-id="1bcrwgb" data-start="717" data-end="750">What this command actually does</h1>
<p data-start="752" data-end="827">It starts the&nbsp;<strong data-start="766" data-end="800">MRP (Managed Recovery Process)</strong>&nbsp;&mdash; the heart of Data Guard.</p>
<p data-start="829" data-end="851">Flow after running it:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">PRIMARY (LGWR/ARCH)<br /> &darr;<br />Network transport<br /> &darr;<br />STANDBY RFS receives redo<br /> &darr;<br />MRP applies redo to datafiles</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="986" data-end="1081">Without this command &rarr; standby is just a copy<br data-start="1031" data-end="1034" />With this command &rarr; standby becomes DR database</p>
<hr data-start="1083" data-end="1086" />
<h1 data-section-id="sunz8y" data-start="1088" data-end="1118">After you run it (IMPORTANT)</h1>
<p data-start="1119" data-end="1137">Immediately check:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> process, status, thread#, sequence#<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$managed_standby;</div>

<p data-start="0" data-end="72">Good &mdash; this output tells us&nbsp;<strong data-start="28" data-end="69">exactly where you are in the DR build</strong>&nbsp;👇</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<h1 data-section-id="bgnwz7" data-start="176" data-end="209">Interpretation (Very Important)</h1>
<p data-start="211" data-end="318">Your standby database is&nbsp;<strong data-start="236" data-end="260">perfectly configured</strong>&nbsp;✔<br data-start="262" data-end="265" />But&nbsp;<strong data-start="269" data-end="316">Primary (DC) is NOT shipping redo to DR yet</strong>&nbsp;❌</p>
<p data-start="320" data-end="345">So Data Guard is waiting.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="a7aq2h" data-start="347" data-end="371">What each line means</h3>

<p data-start="632" data-end="660">👉 Most important discovery:</p>

<h1 data-section-id="k9ye38" data-start="1083" data-end="1120">What DC Team Must Do (Primary Side)</h1>
<p data-start="1122" data-end="1176">They must configure LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_2 (or enable it).</p>
<p data-start="1178" data-end="1214">Send them this (you can copy-paste):</p>
<div class="group relative my-4 w-full overflow-visible">
<div id="writing-block-9f4ed882-7424-49c0-a776-7a5df5b6817b" class="relative w-full overflow-clip rounded-[24px] bg-token-bg-primary dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] shadow-[0px_4px_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]" data-writing-block="true" data-testid="writing-block-container">

<div class="ProseMirror markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full min-h-6 break-words focus:outline-none" dir="auto" contenteditable="true" translate="no">
<p>Hi Team,</p>
<p>Standby database PRODCDB_DR is ready and waiting for redo.</p>
<p>Please enable redo transport from Primary (PRODCDB) to DR.</p>
<p>Kindly execute and share outputs:</p>
<p>SELECT DEST_ID, STATUS, ERROR, DESTINATION<br />FROM V$ARCHIVE_DEST_STATUS<br />WHERE DEST_ID &lt;= 5;</p>
<p>ALTER SYSTEM SWITCH LOGFILE;</p>
<p>ALTER SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG CURRENT;</p>
<p>After this we should see RFS RECEIVING on DR side.</p>
<p>Thanks.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">

<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden items-end rtl:items-start">
<div class="user-message-bubble-color corner-superellipse/0.98 relative rounded-[22px] px-4 py-2.5 leading-6 max-w-(--user-chat-width,70%)">
<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">DC Team replied as follows Hi, Please find required output SQL&gt; SELECT DEST_ID, STATUS, ERROR, DESTINATION FROM V$ARCHIVE_DEST_STATUS WHERE DEST_ID &lt;= 5; DEST_ID STATUS ---------- --------- ERROR ----------------------------------------------------------------- DESTINATION -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1 VALID 2 ERROR ORA-12154: TNS:could not resolve the connect identifier specified PRODCDB_DR DEST_ID STATUS ---------- --------- ERROR ----------------------------------------------------------------- DESTINATION -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 3 INACTIVE 4 INACTIVE DEST_ID STATUS ---------- --------- ERROR ----------------------------------------------------------------- DESTINATION -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 5 INACTIVE SQL&gt; Thanks and Regards Varun Aggarwal | Module Lead | Oracle Apps Tech Mahindra Ltd |Chandigarh +91 9953044667</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex justify-end">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="612e0a56-6327-47da-8e9f-b6de0027aaac" data-testid="conversation-turn-68" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="df150bde-4139-4697-aaa1-25c1b98c43d5" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="107">Perfect &mdash; this is&nbsp;<strong data-start="18" data-end="39">the exact problem</strong>&nbsp;👍<br data-start="42" data-end="45" />Your DR is fine.<br data-start="61" data-end="64" /><strong data-start="64" data-end="106">Primary (DC) cannot connect to standby</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="109" data-end="112" />
<h1 data-section-id="m0l6yp" data-start="114" data-end="126">Root Cause</h1>
<p data-start="127" data-end="142">From DC output:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">DEST_ID 2 ERROR<br />ORA-12154: TNS:could not resolve the connect identifier specified<br />DESTINATION: PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="260" data-end="383">👉 Oracle is trying to ship redo to service&nbsp;<strong data-start="304" data-end="318">PRODCDB_DR</strong><br data-start="318" data-end="321" />👉 But the TNS entry&nbsp;<strong data-start="342" data-end="383">does NOT exist OR is wrong on DC side</strong></p>
<p data-start="385" data-end="452">So redo transport never starts &rarr; your standby shows&nbsp;<code data-start="437" data-end="451">WAIT_FOR_LOG</code>.</p>
<hr data-start="454" data-end="457" />
<h1 data-section-id="6fawxu" data-start="459" data-end="499">What must be fixed (PRIMARY/DC server)</h1>
<p data-start="501" data-end="545">They must add the standby connect string in:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>

<h2 data-section-id="jjrbes" data-start="601" data-end="637">Send this to DC Team (copy-paste)</h2>
<div class="group relative my-4 w-full overflow-visible">
<div id="writing-block-df150bde-4139-4697-aaa1-25c1b98c43d5" class="relative w-full overflow-clip rounded-[24px] bg-token-bg-primary dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] shadow-[0px_4px_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]" data-writing-block="true" data-testid="writing-block-container">
<div class="z-1 md:sticky top-(--sticky-padding-top)" data-testid="writing-block-header-sticky-container">
<div class="bg-token-bg-primary flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-3 font-sans dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] py-2.5 py-2.5" data-testid="writing-block-header-surface">
<div class="flex grow gap-3 items-center">
<div class="text-token-text-tertiary flex max-w-[75%] min-w-0 grow cursor-default items-center self-center text-sm font-medium">
<div class="truncate">Email</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex shrink-0 items-center">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-[auto_1fr] items-start gap-2 pt-0 pb-3 leading-normal">
<div class="font-medium">Subject</div>
<div class="grid">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
<hr class="border-token-border-light! border-t-0.5 mx-4 my-0! border-t! md:mx-5" />
<div class="writing-block-editor markdown-new-styling relative flow-root pt-(--writing-block-editor-pt) pe-(--writing-block-editor-pr) pb-(--writing-block-editor-pb) ps-(--writing-block-editor-pl)">
<div class="ProseMirror markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full min-h-6 break-words focus:outline-none" dir="auto" contenteditable="true" translate="no">
<p>Hi Team,</p>
<p>Redo transport is failing due to missing TNS entry on Primary.</p>
<p>Error:<br />ORA-12154: TNS could not resolve connect identifier PRODCDB_DR</p>
<p>Please add below entry in tnsnames.ora on BOTH RAC nodes:</p>
<p>PRODCDB_DR =<br />(DESCRIPTION =<br />(ADDRESS = (PROTOCOL = TCP)(HOST = &lt;DR_SCAN_IP&gt;)(PORT = 1521))<br />(CONNECT_DATA =<br />(SERVICE_NAME = PRODCDB_DR)<br />)<br />)</p>
<p>After adding, verify:</p>
<p>tnsping PRODCDB_DR</p>
<p>Then enable redo shipping:</p>
<p>ALTER SYSTEM SET LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_STATE_2=ENABLE;<br />ALTER SYSTEM SWITCH LOGFILE;<br />ALTER SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG CURRENT;</p>
<p>Standby is ready and waiting.</p>
<p>Regards</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 z-2 rounded-[24px] shadow-[inset_0px_0px_0px_1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.07)]">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>

<p data-start="0" data-end="96">Good &mdash; this output confirms&nbsp;<strong data-start="28" data-end="95">standby database is healthy but not receiving redo from Primary</strong>.</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">

<p data-start="292" data-end="408">So DR side configuration is&nbsp;<strong data-start="320" data-end="331">correct</strong>&nbsp;✔<br data-start="333" data-end="336" />Problem still 100% on&nbsp;<strong data-start="358" data-end="374">Primary (DC)</strong>&nbsp;networking / DataGuard transport.</p>

<h1 data-section-id="rl9gbb" data-start="415" data-end="448">Why it is happening (confirmed)</h1>
<p data-start="449" data-end="467">DC already showed:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="537" data-end="583">So Primary cannot connect to standby listener.</p>
<p data-start="585" data-end="666">Until that works, NOTHING else (RAC config / spfile / srvctl / failover) matters.</p>
<hr data-start="668" data-end="671" />
<h1 data-section-id="rjam38" data-start="673" data-end="721">Now we troubleshoot from DR side (your server)</h1>

<h1 data-section-id="jbs7vj" data-start="505" data-end="524">Why DC is failing</h1>
<p data-start="526" data-end="535">They got:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<p data-start="605" data-end="649">This means&nbsp;<strong data-start="616" data-end="639">NOT network problem</strong><br />It means:</p>
<p data-start="651" data-end="709">👉 Primary database does NOT have TNS entry for PRODCDB_DR</p>
<p data-start="711" data-end="747">So redo transport never even starts.</p>
<p data-start="749" data-end="782">That matches your standby status:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<hr data-start="861" data-end="864" />
<h1 data-section-id="uxfosg" data-start="866" data-end="900">EXACT FIX (Send this to DC Team)</h1>
<p data-start="902" data-end="963">They must add this entry in&nbsp;<strong data-start="930" data-end="963">tnsnames.ora on ALL RAC nodes</strong></p>
<div class="group relative my-4 w-full overflow-visible">
<div id="writing-block-91d7d5ee-a9cc-443d-a14d-ed8821b7855d" class="relative w-full overflow-clip rounded-[24px] bg-token-bg-primary dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] shadow-[0px_4px_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]" data-writing-block="true" data-testid="writing-block-container">
<div class="z-1 md:sticky top-(--sticky-padding-top)" data-testid="writing-block-header-sticky-container">
<div class="bg-token-bg-primary flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-3 font-sans dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] py-2.5 py-2.5" data-testid="writing-block-header-surface">
<div class="flex grow gap-3 items-center">
<div class="text-token-text-tertiary flex max-w-[75%] min-w-0 grow cursor-default items-center self-center text-sm font-medium">
<div class="truncate">Email</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex shrink-0 items-center">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-[auto_1fr] items-start gap-2 pt-0 pb-3 leading-normal">
<div class="font-medium">Subject</div>
<div class="grid">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
<hr class="border-token-border-light! border-t-0.5 mx-4 my-0! border-t! md:mx-5" />
<div class="writing-block-editor markdown-new-styling relative flow-root pt-(--writing-block-editor-pt) pe-(--writing-block-editor-pr) pb-(--writing-block-editor-pb) ps-(--writing-block-editor-pl)">
<div class="ProseMirror markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full min-h-6 break-words focus:outline-none" dir="auto" contenteditable="true" translate="no">
<p>Hi Team,</p>
<p>Standby listener and database are up and ready.<br />Issue is due to missing TNS resolution on Primary side (ORA-12154).</p>
<p>Please add the following entry in tnsnames.ora on all RAC nodes and reload listener.</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<p>PRODCDB_DR =<br />(DESCRIPTION =<br />(ADDRESS = (PROTOCOL = TCP)(HOST = erpproddb-scan)(PORT = 1521))<br />(CONNECT_DATA =<br />(SERVER = DEDICATED)<br />(SERVICE_NAME = PRODCDB_DR)<br />)<br />)</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<p>After adding, please validate:</p>
<p>tnsping PRODCDB_DR<br />sqlplus sys/@PRODCDB_DR as sysdba</p>
<p>Then enable log shipping:</p>
<p>ALTER SYSTEM SET log_archive_dest_2=<br />'SERVICE=PRODCDB_DR ASYNC VALID_FOR=(ONLINE_LOGFILES,PRIMARY_ROLE) DB_UNIQUE_NAME=PRODCDB_DR'<br />scope=both sid='*';</p>
<p>Regards</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 z-2 rounded-[24px] shadow-[inset_0px_0px_0px_1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.07)]">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1885" data-end="1888" />

<p data-start="1941" data-end="1990">Within 30&ndash;60 seconds your standby will change to:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">

<p data-start="2032" data-end="2044">Check using:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

<hr data-start="2122" data-end="2125" />
<h1 data-section-id="pfnld1" data-start="2127" data-end="2180">IMPORTANT &mdash; About your RAC conversion steps earlier</h1>
<p data-start="2181" data-end="2216">You asked if we can continue these:</p>
<blockquote data-start="2218" data-end="2268">
<p data-start="2220" data-end="2268">create spfile / srvctl add database / RAC enable</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="2270" data-end="2277">Answer:</p>
<p data-start="2279" data-end="2289">🚫 NOT YET</p>
<p data-start="2291" data-end="2308">Correct order is:</p>
<ol data-start="2310" data-end="2466">
<li data-section-id="swjbpa" data-start="2310" data-end="2345">
<p data-start="2313" data-end="2345">Fix redo shipping (current step)</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="rscwi" data-start="2346" data-end="2372">
<p data-start="2349" data-end="2372">Sync standby completely</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="i46btg" data-start="2373" data-end="2397">
<p data-start="2376" data-end="2397">Verify zero apply lag</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1s8ck2s" data-start="2398" data-end="2428">
<p data-start="2401" data-end="2428">THEN convert standby to RAC</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1jw9wed" data-start="2429" data-end="2466">
<p data-start="2432" data-end="2466">THEN perform DR drill / switchover</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start="2468" data-end="2513">Otherwise failover will corrupt redo threads.</p>
<hr data-start="2515" data-end="2518" />
<p data-start="2520" data-end="2646" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Reply once DC team confirms tnsping works &mdash;<br data-start="2563" data-end="2566" />Then I&rsquo;ll guide you to&nbsp;<strong data-start="2589" data-end="2645">real-time sync verification and DR drill preparation</strong>.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="c076ce35-db86-4dc6-a4f3-4882d660f44c" data-testid="conversation-turn-73" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="7bb16b45-0e0a-4f01-93d2-76cb36b319a6" data-testid="conversation-turn-74" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="7bb16b45-0e0a-4f01-93d2-76cb36b319a6" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="86">Good 👍 &mdash; using IP is perfectly fine for redo transport (actually safer for DR drill).</p>
<p data-start="88" data-end="311">But the entry they sent you is&nbsp;<strong data-start="119" data-end="133">incomplete</strong>&nbsp;&mdash; the closing brackets are missing and more importantly&nbsp;<strong data-start="190" data-end="236">RAC standby should have multiple addresses</strong>&nbsp;(both VIPs), otherwise archive shipping will randomly fail when VIP moves.</p>
<hr data-start="313" data-end="316" />
<h1 data-section-id="1u2o8cn" data-start="318" data-end="362">Send them this corrected TNS entry (FINAL)</h1>
<p data-start="364" data-end="433">Use&nbsp;<strong data-start="368" data-end="384">both DR VIPs</strong>&nbsp;so redo continues even if node failover happens.</p>
<div class="group relative my-4 w-full overflow-visible">
<div id="writing-block-7bb16b45-0e0a-4f01-93d2-76cb36b319a6" class="relative w-full overflow-clip rounded-[24px] bg-token-bg-primary dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] shadow-[0px_4px_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]" data-writing-block="true" data-testid="writing-block-container">
<div class="z-1 md:sticky top-(--sticky-padding-top)" data-testid="writing-block-header-sticky-container">
<div class="bg-token-bg-primary flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-3 font-sans dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] py-2.5 py-2.5" data-testid="writing-block-header-surface">
<div class="flex grow gap-3 items-center">
<div class="text-token-text-tertiary flex max-w-[75%] min-w-0 grow cursor-default items-center self-center text-sm font-medium">
<div class="truncate">Email</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex shrink-0 items-center">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-[auto_1fr] items-start gap-2 pt-0 pb-3 leading-normal">
<div class="font-medium">Subject</div>
<div class="grid">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
<hr class="border-token-border-light! border-t-0.5 mx-4 my-0! border-t! md:mx-5" />
<div class="writing-block-editor markdown-new-styling relative flow-root pt-(--writing-block-editor-pt) pe-(--writing-block-editor-pr) pb-(--writing-block-editor-pb) ps-(--writing-block-editor-pl)">
<div class="ProseMirror markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full min-h-6 break-words focus:outline-none" dir="auto" contenteditable="true" translate="no">
<p>Hi Team,</p>
<p>Please update the PRODCDB_DR entry in tnsnames.ora on all Primary RAC nodes with the below corrected configuration.</p>
<p>Use both DR VIP IPs to support failover.</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<p>PRODCDB_DR =<br />(DESCRIPTION =<br />(ADDRESS_LIST =<br />(ADDRESS = (PROTOCOL = TCP)(HOST = 10.61.185.221)(PORT = 1521))<br />(ADDRESS = (PROTOCOL = TCP)(HOST = 10.61.185.228)(PORT = 1521))<br />)<br />(CONNECT_DATA =<br />(SERVER = DEDICATED)<br />(SERVICE_NAME = PRODCDB_DR)<br />(UR=A)<br />)<br />)</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<p>After adding please run:</p>
<p>tnsping PRODCDB_DR<br />sqlplus sys/@PRODCDB_DR as sysdba</p>
<p>Then enable redo transport again if required.</p>
<p>Regards</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 z-2 rounded-[24px] shadow-[inset_0px_0px_0px_1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.07)]">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1254" data-end="1257" />
<h1 data-section-id="qgqslq" data-start="1259" data-end="1277">Why this matters</h1>
<p data-start="1278" data-end="1345">Right now you have&nbsp;<strong data-start="1297" data-end="1345">single instance standby but cluster listener</strong></p>
<p data-start="1347" data-end="1370">If only one IP is used:</p>
<ul data-start="1372" data-end="1452">
<li data-section-id="1c00wkx" data-start="1372" data-end="1409">
<p data-start="1374" data-end="1409">node restart = redo transport stops</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1oz8e56" data-start="1410" data-end="1430">
<p data-start="1412" data-end="1430">DR drill will fail</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="6ztffq" data-start="1431" data-end="1452">
<p data-start="1433" data-end="1452">switchover may hang</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1454" data-end="1515">With two VIPs &rarr; Oracle automatically connects to active node.</p>
<hr data-start="1517" data-end="1520" />
<h1 data-section-id="10e3gky" data-start="1522" data-end="1557">What you should monitor meanwhile</h1>
<p data-start="1559" data-end="1576">Run every 30 sec:</p>

<p data-start="1852" data-end="1890" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Tell me when tnsping succeeds from DC.</p>

<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">

<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">Hi Alok, Below is the error now after adding the TNS entry. [oracle@erpproddb1 PROD_erpproddb1]$ tnsping PRODCDB_DR TNS Ping Utility for Linux: Version 19.0.0.0.0 - Production on 20-FEB-2026 14:46:39 Copyright (c) 1997, 2025, Oracle. All rights reserved. Used parameter files: /oracle/racdb/product/network/admin/PROD_erpproddb1/sqlnet_ifile.ora Used TNSNAMES adapter to resolve the alias Attempting to contact (DESCRIPTION = TNS-12533: TNS:illegal ADDRESS parameters Thanks and Regards Varun Aggarwal | Module Lead | Oracle Apps Tech Mahindra Ltd |Chandigarh +91 9953044667</div>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="e7d4d258-a9ce-42c9-a6b7-dc409d75315a" data-testid="conversation-turn-76" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="64929931-e859-4a5b-aeea-538caebf87f8" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="43">Perfect 👍 &mdash; this error is&nbsp;<strong data-start="27" data-end="42">very useful</strong>.</p>
<blockquote data-start="45" data-end="174">
<p data-start="47" data-end="174"><strong data-start="47" data-end="88">TNS-12533: illegal ADDRESS parameters</strong><br data-start="88" data-end="91" />means the syntax of the&nbsp;<code data-start="115" data-end="129">tnsnames.ora</code>&nbsp;entry is still wrong (not network/firewall).</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="176" data-end="210">In RAC this happens mainly due to:</p>
<ul data-start="211" data-end="362">
<li data-section-id="1jwwpsg" data-start="211" data-end="229">
<p data-start="213" data-end="229">missing brackets</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1p1lv06" data-start="230" data-end="260">
<p data-start="232" data-end="260">wrong indentation copy-paste</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="t4zq9r" data-start="261" data-end="326">
<p data-start="263" data-end="326">smart quotes / hidden characters (very common from email/Teams)</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="oplnk8" data-start="327" data-end="362">
<p data-start="329" data-end="362">ADDRESS_LIST not closed correctly</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="364" data-end="367" />
<h1 data-section-id="f2w23z" data-start="369" data-end="426">Give DC team this exact working block (copy-paste safe)</h1>
<p data-start="428" data-end="497">⚠️ Tell them to&nbsp;<strong data-start="444" data-end="475">delete old entry completely</strong>&nbsp;and paste this fresh.</p>
<div class="group relative my-4 w-full overflow-visible">
<div id="writing-block-64929931-e859-4a5b-aeea-538caebf87f8" class="relative w-full overflow-clip rounded-[24px] bg-token-bg-primary dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] shadow-[0px_4px_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]" data-writing-block="true" data-testid="writing-block-container">
<div class="z-1 md:sticky top-(--sticky-padding-top)" data-testid="writing-block-header-sticky-container">
<div class="bg-token-bg-primary flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-3 font-sans dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] py-2.5 py-2.5" data-testid="writing-block-header-surface">
<div class="flex grow gap-3 items-center">
<div class="text-token-text-tertiary flex max-w-[75%] min-w-0 grow cursor-default items-center self-center text-sm font-medium">
<div class="truncate">Email</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex shrink-0 items-center">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-[auto_1fr] items-start gap-2 pt-0 pb-3 leading-normal">
<div class="font-medium">Subject</div>
<div class="grid">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
<hr class="border-token-border-light! border-t-0.5 mx-4 my-0! border-t! md:mx-5" />
<div class="writing-block-editor markdown-new-styling relative flow-root pt-(--writing-block-editor-pt) pe-(--writing-block-editor-pr) pb-(--writing-block-editor-pb) ps-(--writing-block-editor-pl)">
<div class="ProseMirror markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full min-h-6 break-words focus:outline-none" dir="auto" contenteditable="true" translate="no">
<p>Hi Team,</p>
<p>The error TNS-12533 indicates syntax issue in the tnsnames.ora entry.</p>
<p>Please remove the old PRODCDB_DR entry completely and paste the below exactly as-is (no extra spaces/characters):</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<p>PRODCDB_DR =<br />(DESCRIPTION =<br />(ADDRESS_LIST =<br />(ADDRESS = (PROTOCOL = TCP)(HOST = 10.61.185.221)(PORT = 1521))<br />(ADDRESS = (PROTOCOL = TCP)(HOST = 10.61.185.228)(PORT = 1521))<br />)<br />(CONNECT_DATA =<br />(SERVICE_NAME = PRODCDB_DR)<br />(SERVER = DEDICATED)<br />(UR = A)<br />)<br />)</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<p>After updating run:</p>
<p>tnsping PRODCDB_DR</p>
<p>If successful, then test:</p>
<p>sqlplus -L sys/@PRODCDB_DR as sysdba</p>
<p>Please share outputs.</p>
<p>Regards</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 z-2 rounded-[24px] shadow-[inset_0px_0px_0px_1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.07)]">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1354" data-end="1357" />
<h1 data-section-id="ubeses" data-start="1359" data-end="1390">Why their previous one failed</h1>
<p data-start="1391" data-end="1401">They sent:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

</div>
</div>

</div>

</div>

<p data-start="1427" data-end="1458">but likely missed one of these:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

</div>

</div>
<p data-start="1475" data-end="1552">Oracle Net parser is extremely strict &mdash;<br data-start="1514" data-end="1517" /><strong data-start="1517" data-end="1552">one missing bracket = TNS-12533</strong></p>
<hr data-start="1554" data-end="1557" />
<h1 data-section-id="8ifb1a" data-start="1559" data-end="1586">What you do now (DR side)</h1>

<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<p data-start="1706" data-end="1712">Check:</p>

</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1782" data-end="1801">We are waiting for:</p>

<hr data-start="1843" data-end="1846" />
<p data-start="1848" data-end="1985">Once tnsping works &rarr; redo transport will immediately start &rarr; then we prepare&nbsp;<strong data-start="1925" data-end="1984">actual DR cutover rehearsal (switchover readiness test)</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="1987" data-end="2021" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Send me their next tnsping output.</p>
