<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="9db51048-dc39-4d6a-a287-df46f1ebbf27" data-testid="conversation-turn-78" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="9db51048-dc39-4d6a-a287-df46f1ebbf27" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="77">Good 👍 &mdash; this confirms&nbsp;<strong data-start="24" data-end="76">DR side networking &amp; listener are perfectly fine</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="79" data-end="123">Your DR server can resolve and reach itself:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">tnsping PRODCDB_DR &rarr; OK<br />listener &rarr; reachable<br />hostname &rarr; resolves to 10.61.185.221</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="239" data-end="276">So the problem is&nbsp;<strong data-start="257" data-end="267">NOT DR</strong>&nbsp;anymore.</p>
<hr data-start="278" data-end="281" />
<h1 data-section-id="1jdjlo8" data-start="283" data-end="307">Now interpret DC error</h1>
<p data-start="309" data-end="327">Earlier DC showed:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">DEST_ID 2 ERROR<br />ORA-12154: could not resolve connect identifier PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="413" data-end="441">Then after they added entry:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">TNS-12533: illegal ADDRESS parameters</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="490" data-end="501">That means:</p>
<p data-start="503" data-end="582">👉 DC server still cannot correctly parse / use the standby connect descriptor.</p>
<p data-start="584" data-end="641">So redo transport never starts &rarr; therefore on DR you see:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 WAIT_FOR_LOG<br />RFS IDLE</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="680" data-end="692">Which means:</p>
<blockquote data-start="694" data-end="739">
<p data-start="696" data-end="739">Standby ready but Primary not shipping redo</p>
</blockquote>
<hr data-start="741" data-end="744" />
<h1 data-section-id="e026lw" data-start="746" data-end="795">Now we verify one critical thing (often missed)</h1>
<p data-start="797" data-end="841">Your DR listener is listening on&nbsp;<strong data-start="830" data-end="841">TWO IPs</strong></p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">10.61.185.221<br />10.61.185.228</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="880" data-end="919">But your working tnsping used hostname:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">erpproddb1-dr.pspcl.in &rarr; 10.61.185.221</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="969" data-end="1076">In Data Guard, PRIMARY should NOT use hostname if DNS unreliable<br data-start="1033" data-end="1036" />(you already mentioned resolution issue)</p>
<p data-start="1078" data-end="1125">So we must force DC to use IP-based descriptor.</p>
<hr data-start="1127" data-end="1130" />
<h1 data-section-id="11k1em4" data-start="1132" data-end="1171">Ask DC team to run THIS (not tnsping)</h1>
<p data-start="1173" data-end="1214">This checks real Data Guard connectivity:</p>
<div class="group relative my-4 w-full overflow-visible">
<div id="writing-block-9db51048-dc39-4d6a-a287-df46f1ebbf27" class="relative w-full overflow-clip rounded-[24px] bg-token-bg-primary dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] shadow-[0px_4px_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]" data-writing-block="true" data-testid="writing-block-container">
<div class="z-1 md:sticky top-(--sticky-padding-top)" data-testid="writing-block-header-sticky-container">
<div class="bg-token-bg-primary flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-3 font-sans dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] py-2.5 py-2.5" data-testid="writing-block-header-surface">
<div class="flex grow gap-3 items-center">
<div class="text-token-text-tertiary flex max-w-[75%] min-w-0 grow cursor-default items-center self-center text-sm font-medium">
<div class="truncate">Email</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex shrink-0 items-center">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-[auto_1fr] items-start gap-2 pt-0 pb-3 leading-normal">
<div class="font-medium">Subject</div>
<div class="grid">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
<hr class="border-token-border-light! border-t-0.5 mx-4 my-0! border-t! md:mx-5" />
<div class="writing-block-editor markdown-new-styling relative flow-root pt-(--writing-block-editor-pt) pe-(--writing-block-editor-pr) pb-(--writing-block-editor-pb) ps-(--writing-block-editor-pl)">
<div class="ProseMirror markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full min-h-6 break-words focus:outline-none" dir="auto" contenteditable="true" translate="no">
<p>Hi Team,</p>
<p>Kindly test real SYSDBA connectivity instead of tnsping.</p>
<p>Run the below command from PRIMARY database server:</p>
<p>sqlplus -L sys/@'(DESCRIPTION=<br />(ADDRESS=(PROTOCOL=TCP)(HOST=10.61.185.221)(PORT=1521))<br />(CONNECT_DATA=(SERVICE_NAME=PRODCDB_DR)(UR=A))<br />)' as sysdba</p>
<p>If connection succeeds you should see:</p>
<p>Connected to:<br />Oracle Database 19c ...</p>
<p>Please share output screenshot/text.</p>
<p>This confirms redo transport connectivity.</p>
<p>Regards</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 z-2 rounded-[24px] shadow-[inset_0px_0px_0px_1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.07)]">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1772" data-end="1775" />
<h1 data-section-id="mvztve" data-start="1777" data-end="1800">Why this is important</h1>
<p data-start="1801" data-end="1900"><code data-start="1801" data-end="1810">tnsping</code>&nbsp;only checks listener reachability ❌<br data-start="1846" data-end="1849" />Data Guard needs&nbsp;<strong data-start="1866" data-end="1898">SYSDBA authenticated session</strong>&nbsp;✔</p>
<p data-start="1902" data-end="1959">Many times tnsping works but redo shipping fails because:</p>
<ul data-start="1961" data-end="2079">
<li data-section-id="5napsi" data-start="1961" data-end="1985">
<p data-start="1963" data-end="1985">password file mismatch</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1yaot5b" data-start="1986" data-end="2010">
<p data-start="1988" data-end="2010">SERVICE not registered</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1etsp5" data-start="2011" data-end="2031">
<p data-start="2013" data-end="2031">wrong service_name</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="4h73n4" data-start="2032" data-end="2046">
<p data-start="2034" data-end="2046">UR=A missing</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1phmjau" data-start="2047" data-end="2079">
<p data-start="2049" data-end="2079">static vs dynamic registration</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="2081" data-end="2084" />
<h1 data-section-id="1fltjq4" data-start="2086" data-end="2130">Meanwhile &mdash; your standby status is correct</h1>
<p data-start="2132" data-end="2141">You have:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">DATABASE_ROLE = PHYSICAL STANDBY<br />OPEN_MODE = MOUNTED<br />MRP0 = WAIT_FOR_LOG</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2238" data-end="2293">This is PERFECT standby state waiting for primary redo.</p>
<hr data-start="2295" data-end="2298" />
<h1 data-section-id="1xj7hrr" data-start="2300" data-end="2323">What will happen next</h1>
<p data-start="2324" data-end="2381">The moment DC connectivity works, instantly you will see:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<p data-start="2451" data-end="2471">No restart required.</p>
<hr data-start="2473" data-end="2476" />
<p data-start="2478" data-end="2606" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Send me DC sqlplus test output once they run it.<br data-start="2526" data-end="2529" />After that we will start&nbsp;<strong data-start="2554" data-end="2605">real DR drill readiness (switchover validation)</strong>.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>

<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="fc6f1769-4a88-431a-8757-6da798a68b64" data-testid="conversation-turn-79" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">

<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">but at our end also when we do tnsping PRODCDB_DR it resolves only to 64 bytes from erpproddb1-dr.pspcl.in (10.61.185.221): icmp_seq=1 ttl=64 time=0.016 ms not to 10.61.185.228 is this OK</div>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="bbfd5235-453f-47a3-91f9-a82633c3f3d1" data-testid="conversation-turn-80" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">

<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="65">Yes 👍 &mdash;&nbsp;<strong data-start="9" data-end="65">this is completely OK and actually correct behavior.</strong></p>
<p data-start="67" data-end="103">You are mixing two different things:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="105" data-end="376">
<thead data-start="105" data-end="158">
<tr data-start="105" data-end="158">
<th class="" data-start="105" data-end="115" data-col-size="sm">Command</th>
<th class="" data-start="115" data-end="132" data-col-size="sm">What it checks</th>
<th class="" data-start="132" data-end="158" data-col-size="sm">What it should resolve</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="183" data-end="376">
<tr data-start="183" data-end="235">
<td data-start="183" data-end="192" data-col-size="sm"><code data-start="185" data-end="191">ping</code></td>
<td data-start="192" data-end="220" data-col-size="sm">OS DNS / hosts resolution</td>
<td data-start="220" data-end="235" data-col-size="sm">One IP only</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="236" data-end="302">
<td data-start="236" data-end="248" data-col-size="sm"><code data-start="238" data-end="247">tnsping</code></td>
<td data-start="248" data-end="280" data-col-size="sm">Oracle Net connect descriptor</td>
<td data-start="280" data-end="302" data-col-size="sm">One chosen address</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="303" data-end="376">
<td data-start="303" data-end="318" data-col-size="sm">RAC listener</td>
<td data-start="318" data-end="354" data-col-size="sm">Multiple VIP / local IP endpoints</td>
<td data-start="354" data-end="376" data-col-size="sm">Multiple addresses</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="378" data-end="381" />
<h2 data-section-id="ivcuma" data-start="383" data-end="418">Why you see only&nbsp;<code data-start="403" data-end="418">10.61.185.221</code></h2>
<p data-start="420" data-end="434">Your hostname:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">erpproddb1-dr.pspcl.in &rarr; 10.61.185.221</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="485" data-end="498">So naturally:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ping erpproddb1-dr.pspcl.in &rarr; 10.61.185.221</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="553" data-end="624">That has&nbsp;<strong data-start="562" data-end="623">nothing to do with the second listener IP (10.61.185.228)</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="626" data-end="629" />
<h2 data-section-id="1obk7n5" data-start="631" data-end="661">What is 10.61.185.228 then?</h2>
<p data-start="662" data-end="681">From your listener:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Listening Endpoints:<br />10.61.185.221<br />10.61.185.228</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="741" data-end="752">This means:</p>
<p data-start="754" data-end="849">👉 Oracle Grid registered the database on&nbsp;<strong data-start="796" data-end="849">multiple local interfaces (VIP / private / HA IP)</strong></p>
<p data-start="851" data-end="926">But Data Guard should connect using&nbsp;<strong data-start="887" data-end="926">one stable public reachable IP only</strong></p>
<p data-start="928" data-end="958"><strong data-start="928" data-end="958">Correct IP = 10.61.185.221</strong></p>
<hr data-start="960" data-end="963" />
<h2 data-section-id="7omxvl" data-start="965" data-end="1000">Very Important Rule (Data Guard)</h2>
<p data-start="1001" data-end="1025">Primary must connect to:</p>
<blockquote data-start="1027" data-end="1080">
<p data-start="1029" data-end="1080">A single stable PUBLIC IP reachable from DC network</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="1082" data-end="1086">NOT:</p>
<ul data-start="1087" data-end="1169">
<li data-section-id="1f42wfe" data-start="1087" data-end="1114">
<p data-start="1089" data-end="1114">private interconnect IP ❌</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1vtzj50" data-start="1115" data-end="1137">
<p data-start="1117" data-end="1137">HA/VIP floating IP ❌</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="5nmk41" data-start="1138" data-end="1169">
<p data-start="1140" data-end="1169">scan name with unstable DNS ❌</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1171" data-end="1223">So your TNS should NOT round-robin between both IPs.</p>
<hr data-start="1225" data-end="1228" />
<h2 data-section-id="1rldjin" data-start="1230" data-end="1271">Therefore your result is actually GOOD</h2>
<p data-start="1273" data-end="1286">Your DR test:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">tnsping PRODCDB_DR &rarr; OK<br />ping hostname &rarr; 10.61.185.221</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1351" data-end="1357">Means:</p>
<p data-start="1359" data-end="1452">✔ deterministic routing<br data-start="1382" data-end="1385" />✔ correct network path<br data-start="1407" data-end="1410" />✔ correct IP selected for redo transport</p>
<hr data-start="1454" data-end="1457" />
<h2 data-section-id="3zbla" data-start="1459" data-end="1481">What would be WRONG</h2>
<p data-start="1482" data-end="1518">If it resolved to multiple IPs like:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">10.61.185.221<br />10.61.185.228</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1557" data-end="1637">Then redo shipping randomly breaks every few minutes 😄<br data-start="1612" data-end="1615" />(very common DG issue)</p>
<hr data-start="1639" data-end="1642" />
<h2 data-section-id="ntyep3" data-start="1644" data-end="1679">Real Problem Still Remains at DC</h2>
<p data-start="1680" data-end="1699">DC error proves it:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ORA-12154 &rarr; cannot resolve<br />TNS-12533 &rarr; bad descriptor</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1764" data-end="1810">So DC still cannot build valid connect string.</p>
<p data-start="1812" data-end="1858">Your DR side networking is now&nbsp;<strong data-start="1843" data-end="1857">100% ready</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="1860" data-end="1863" />
<h2 data-section-id="15w8ccw" data-start="1865" data-end="1877">Next Step</h2>
<p data-start="1878" data-end="1909">We now only wait for DC to run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<p data-start="2061" data-end="2112">Once that works &rarr; redo immediately starts applying.</p>

<p data-start="2119" data-end="2254" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">You can relax now 😄<br data-start="2139" data-end="2142" />Your standby build + listener configuration is correct.<br data-start="2197" data-end="2200" />We are in the&nbsp;<strong data-start="2214" data-end="2253">last mile: primary connectivity fix</strong>.</p>

<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="fdb8f35c-78d6-4544-b528-aa515424bc39" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="125">Yes &mdash; you&nbsp;<strong data-start="10" data-end="48">can ask them to ping 10.61.185.228</strong>, but 👉&nbsp;<strong data-start="57" data-end="90">only for network verification</strong>, not for Data Guard configuration.</p>
<p data-start="127" data-end="153">Very important difference:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="155" data-end="378">
<thead data-start="155" data-end="195">
<tr data-start="155" data-end="195">
<th class="" data-start="155" data-end="160" data-col-size="sm">IP</th>
<th class="" data-start="160" data-end="170" data-col-size="sm">Purpose</th>
<th class="" data-start="170" data-end="195" data-col-size="sm">Should DC use for DG?</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="217" data-end="378">
<tr data-start="217" data-end="292">
<td data-start="217" data-end="237" data-col-size="sm"><strong data-start="219" data-end="236">10.61.185.221</strong></td>
<td data-start="237" data-end="270" data-col-size="sm">Public / reachable hostname IP</td>
<td data-start="270" data-end="292" data-col-size="sm">✅ YES (use in TNS)</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="293" data-end="378">
<td data-start="293" data-end="313" data-col-size="sm"><strong data-start="295" data-end="312">10.61.185.228</strong></td>
<td data-start="313" data-end="345" data-col-size="sm">Secondary/VIP/local interface</td>
<td data-start="345" data-end="378" data-col-size="sm">❌ NO (not for redo transport)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="380" data-end="383" />
<h2 data-section-id="cv3kck" data-start="385" data-end="432">Why you still ask them to ping 10.61.185.228</h2>
<p data-start="433" data-end="481">Only to confirm routing/firewall &mdash; nothing else.</p>
<p data-start="483" data-end="499">It helps detect:</p>
<ul data-start="500" data-end="558">
<li data-section-id="1qnedin" data-start="500" data-end="516">
<p data-start="502" data-end="516">firewall block</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1fqe75u" data-start="517" data-end="537">
<p data-start="519" data-end="537">wrong VLAN routing</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="v6zdxy" data-start="538" data-end="558">
<p data-start="540" data-end="558">asymmetric routing</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="560" data-end="601">So yes, ask them &mdash; but with a clear note.</p>
<hr data-start="603" data-end="606" />
<h2 data-section-id="1hrc6gw" data-start="608" data-end="633">Send them this message</h2>
<div class="group relative my-4 w-full overflow-visible">
<div id="writing-block-fdb8f35c-78d6-4544-b528-aa515424bc39" class="relative w-full overflow-clip rounded-[24px] bg-token-bg-primary dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] shadow-[0px_4px_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]" data-writing-block="true" data-testid="writing-block-container">

<div class="ProseMirror markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full min-h-6 break-words focus:outline-none" dir="auto" contenteditable="true" translate="no">
<p>Hi Varun,</p>
<p>Please check basic network connectivity from DC to DR server on both interfaces:</p>
<p>ping 10.61.185.221<br />ping 10.61.185.228<br />telnet 10.61.185.221 1521</p>
<p>Note:<br />Redo transport (Data Guard) will use only&nbsp;<strong>10.61.185.221</strong>.<br />10.61.185.228 is only being tested to verify routing/firewall reachability.</p>
<p>Please share the outputs.</p>
<p>Thanks &amp; Regards<br />Alok</p>

<p data-start="1469" data-end="1544" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">After this test we will know exactly why redo shipping is not starting yet.</p>

<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">

<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">now we got from DC Team Hi Alok, As discussed its done on both DB nodes.we are able to tnsping PRODCDB_DR &rarr; OK from both the nodes and able to connect with sysdba but what he said the he has removed the redo log entries so still we are getting following output from DR SQL&gt; SELECT process, status, thread#, sequence# FROM v$managed_standby; 2 PROCESS STATUS THREAD# SEQUENCE# --------- ------------ ---------- ---------- ARCH CONNECTED 0 0 DGRD ALLOCATED 0 0 DGRD ALLOCATED 0 0 ARCH CONNECTED 0 0 ARCH CONNECTED 0 0 ARCH CONNECTED 0 0 RFS IDLE 1 0 RFS IDLE 2 10908 MRP0 WAIT_FOR_LOG 1 12928 9 rows selected. SQL&gt; previously we shared a doc with the DC team we are uploading here please provide redo logs from that word file to apply on DC I Think we have to change PROD to PRODCDB please check and provide the correct entries for redo logs to apply on DC from the attached word file</div>
</div>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="85e35ee2-0c95-46e1-8885-426cdfc6ae7c" data-testid="conversation-turn-84" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="5d463643-5508-471c-af0b-9a2146a8b10a" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="64">Perfect 👍 &mdash; now we finally reached the&nbsp;<strong data-start="40" data-end="63">real Data Guard gap</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="66" data-end="90">Your standby is healthy:</p>
<ul data-start="92" data-end="207">
<li data-section-id="wrbpxi" data-start="92" data-end="122">
<p data-start="94" data-end="122">MRP running &rarr;&nbsp;<code data-start="108" data-end="122">WAIT_FOR_LOG</code></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1lv5drl" data-start="123" data-end="173">
<p data-start="125" data-end="173">RFS receiving &rarr;&nbsp;<strong data-start="141" data-end="173">Thread 2 sequence increasing</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1m5bxm3" data-start="174" data-end="207">
<p data-start="176" data-end="207">But&nbsp;<strong data-start="180" data-end="207">Thread 1 stuck at 12928</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="209" data-end="220">That means:</p>
<blockquote data-start="222" data-end="358">
<p data-start="224" data-end="358">DC Primary is NOT shipping redo correctly for all RAC threads<br data-start="285" data-end="288" />(because standby redo logs were removed OR never recreated properly)</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="360" data-end="463">And yes &mdash; I checked your uploaded DR document.<br data-start="406" data-end="409" />It was written for&nbsp;<strong data-start="428" data-end="463">single instance database (PROD)</strong></p>
<p data-start="465" data-end="579">You are running&nbsp;<strong data-start="481" data-end="502">RAC CDB (PRODCDB)</strong><br data-start="502" data-end="505" />So the redo log section in that document is&nbsp;<strong data-start="549" data-end="579">WRONG for your environment</strong></p>
<hr data-start="581" data-end="584" />
<h1 data-section-id="2dzahp" data-start="586" data-end="613">What exactly is wrong now</h1>
<p data-start="615" data-end="633">In RAC Data Guard:</p>
<blockquote data-start="635" data-end="699">
<p data-start="637" data-end="699">Each primary RAC thread MUST have standby redo logs on PRIMARY</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="701" data-end="772">If DC removed them &rarr; primary cannot stream redo &rarr; standby waits forever</p>
<p data-start="774" data-end="805">That is exactly your situation:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 WAIT_FOR_LOG thread 1 sequence 12928<br />RFS IDLE thread 1<br />RFS receiving thread 2</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="899" data-end="930">So thread-1 redo never arrives.</p>
<hr data-start="932" data-end="935" />
<h1 data-section-id="1bzpgyu" data-start="937" data-end="987">What you must send to DC Team (Correct commands)</h1>
<p data-start="989" data-end="1060">⚠️ These commands must be executed on&nbsp;<strong data-start="1027" data-end="1060">PRIMARY DC database (PRODCDB)</strong></p>
<p data-start="1062" data-end="1097">First they check number of threads:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, instance_name <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> gv$instance;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1159" data-end="1198">(Almost certainly returns thread 1 &amp; 2)</p>
<hr data-start="1200" data-end="1203" />
<h2 data-section-id="1o7ui65" data-start="1205" data-end="1256">STEP 1 &mdash; Check online redo size (VERY IMPORTANT)</h2>
<p data-start="1258" data-end="1272">They must run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SET</span> LINES <span class="ͼb">200</span><br />COL MEMBER <span class="ͼ8">FOR</span> A60<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> b.thread#, a.group#, a.member, b.bytes<span class="ͼ8">/</span><span class="ͼb">1024</span><span class="ͼ8">/</span><span class="ͼb">1024</span> MB<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$logfile a, v$log b<br /><span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> a.group#<span class="ͼ8">=</span>b.group#<br /><span class="ͼ8">ORDER</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> thread#, <span class="ͼ8">group</span>#;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1455" data-end="1484">Example result (assume 200MB)</p>
<hr data-start="1486" data-end="1489" />
<h2 data-section-id="ckfcu9" data-start="1491" data-end="1541">STEP 2 &mdash; DROP OLD WRONG STANDBY LOGS (if exist)</h2>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> <span class="ͼ8">group</span>#, thread# <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$standby_log;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1598" data-end="1622">For each group returned:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ALTER DATABASE DROP STANDBY LOGFILE GROUP &lt;group#&gt;;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1685" data-end="1688" />
<h2 data-section-id="hny892" data-start="1690" data-end="1738">STEP 3 &mdash; CREATE CORRECT RAC STANDBY REDO LOGS</h2>
<p data-start="1740" data-end="1748">📌 RULE:</p>
<p data-start="1750" data-end="1766">For each thread:</p>
<blockquote data-start="1767" data-end="1801">
<p data-start="1769" data-end="1801">standby logs = online groups + 1</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="1803" data-end="1856">Usually Oracle RAC has 2 groups &rarr; create 3 per thread</p>
<hr data-start="1858" data-end="1861" />
<h2 data-section-id="19mcyxh" data-start="1863" data-end="1902">FINAL CORRECT COMMANDS (FOR PRODCDB)</h2>
<p data-start="1904" data-end="1941">Replace&nbsp;<code data-start="1912" data-end="1918">200M</code>&nbsp;if their size differs.</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ6">-- THREAD 1</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">11</span> (<span class="ͼc">'+DATA/PRODCDB/redo_t1_g11.log'</span>) <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">12</span> (<span class="ͼc">'+DATA/PRODCDB/redo_t1_g12.log'</span>) <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">13</span> (<span class="ͼc">'+DATA/PRODCDB/redo_t1_g13.log'</span>) <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ6">-- THREAD 2</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">21</span> (<span class="ͼc">'+DATA/PRODCDB/redo_t2_g21.log'</span>) <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">22</span> (<span class="ͼc">'+DATA/PRODCDB/redo_t2_g22.log'</span>) <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">23</span> (<span class="ͼc">'+DATA/PRODCDB/redo_t2_g23.log'</span>) <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2568" data-end="2571" />
<h2 data-section-id="3wezfj" data-start="2573" data-end="2608">STEP 4 &mdash; VERIFY (VERY IMPORTANT)</h2>
<p data-start="2610" data-end="2637">They must send this output:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, <span class="ͼ8">group</span>#, bytes<span class="ͼ8">/</span><span class="ͼb">1024</span><span class="ͼ8">/</span><span class="ͼb">1024</span> MB <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$standby_log <span class="ͼ8">ORDER</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> thread#, <span class="ͼ8">group</span>#;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2739" data-end="2748">Expected:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">THREAD GROUP<br />1 11<br />1 12<br />1 13<br />2 21<br />2 22<br />2 23</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<hr data-start="2839" data-end="2842" />
<h2 data-section-id="36lnh" data-start="2844" data-end="2872">STEP 5 &mdash; FORCE LOG SWITCH</h2>
<p data-start="2874" data-end="2903">After creation they MUST run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span>;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span>;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="3019" data-end="3022" />
<h1 data-section-id="138kcwg" data-start="3024" data-end="3060">What will happen immediately after</h1>
<p data-start="3062" data-end="3112">Within&nbsp;<strong data-start="3069" data-end="3086">10&ndash;30 seconds</strong>&nbsp;your DR will change from:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 WAIT_FOR_LOG</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>

</div>

<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 APPLYING_LOG</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<p data-start="3172" data-end="3176">And:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">

<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">RFS IDLE &rarr; RFS RECEIVING<br />Sequence numbers start increasing</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<p data-start="3246" data-end="3304">Your DR sync will start automatically &mdash; no restart needed.</p>
<hr data-start="3306" data-end="3309" />
<h1 data-section-id="e08hpd" data-start="3311" data-end="3353">Important &mdash; DO NOT do RAC conversion yet</h1>
<p data-start="3354" data-end="3403">You asked earlier about RAC standby config steps.</p>
<p data-start="3405" data-end="3415">👉 NOT NOW</p>
<p data-start="3417" data-end="3490">Until redo apply works perfectly, RAC standby config must NOT be touched.</p>
<p data-start="3492" data-end="3523">Otherwise switchover will fail.</p>
<hr data-start="3525" data-end="3528" />
<h1 data-section-id="xeo31" data-start="3530" data-end="3569">Short message you can send to DC team</h1>
<p data-start="3571" data-end="3590">You can paste this:</p>
<hr data-start="3592" data-end="3595" />
<p data-start="3597" data-end="3606">Hi Varun,</p>
<p data-start="3608" data-end="3732">Standby is waiting for Thread-1 redo.<br data-start="3645" data-end="3648" />Issue is because standby redo logs for RAC threads are missing/incorrect on Primary.</p>
<p data-start="3734" data-end="3811">Please create standby redo logs for BOTH RAC threads in PRODCDB as per below:</p>
<p data-start="3813" data-end="3834">(then paste commands)</p>
<p data-start="3836" data-end="3862">After creation kindly run:</p>
<p data-start="3864" data-end="3907">ALTER SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG CURRENT; (3 times)</p>
<p data-start="3909" data-end="3929">and share output of:</p>
<p data-start="3931" data-end="3993">SELECT thread#, group#, bytes/1024/1024 MB FROM v$standby_log;</p>
<hr data-start="3995" data-end="3998" /><hr data-start="4000" data-end="4003" />
<p data-start="4005" data-end="4149" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Once they do this, your DR will start syncing immediately.<br data-start="4063" data-end="4066" />After that I&rsquo;ll guide you to&nbsp;<strong data-start="4095" data-end="4141">real DR drill (production switchover test)</strong>&nbsp;safely.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="9fcfe8cd-c658-413e-9364-7f06e0b8adac" data-testid="conversation-turn-85" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">

<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">we get out put from DC now please clearly email with command to execute on DC step by step to enable redo logs Hi Alok, SELECT thread#, instance_name FROM gv$instance; THREAD# INSTANCE_NAME ---------- ---------------- 1 PRODCDB1 2 PRODCDB2 SQL&gt; SELECT thread#, group#, sequence#, bytes, archived, status FROM v$log ORDER BY thread#, group#, group#; 2 3 THREAD# GROUP# SEQUENCE# BYTES ARC STATUS ---------- ---------- ---------- ---------- --- ---------------- 1 1 12970 209715200 YES INACTIVE 1 2 12971 209715200 YES ACTIVE 1 3 12972 209715200 NO CURRENT 2 5 10864 209715200 YES INACTIVE 2 6 10865 209715200 YES ACTIVE 2 7 10866 209715200 NO CURRENT</div>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="ee7f40a2-6bdd-4e86-b7e9-b97305fdf4ed" data-testid="conversation-turn-86" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="ee7f40a2-6bdd-4e86-b7e9-b97305fdf4ed" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="51">Great &mdash; now we have the exact primary RAC layout 👍</p>
<p data-start="53" data-end="200"><strong data-start="53" data-end="68">Primary DB:</strong>&nbsp;<code data-start="69" data-end="78">PRODCDB</code><br data-start="78" data-end="81" /><strong data-start="81" data-end="93">Threads:</strong>&nbsp;2 (PRODCDB1 &amp; PRODCDB2)<br data-start="117" data-end="120" /><strong data-start="120" data-end="154">Online redo groups per thread:</strong>&nbsp;3<br data-start="156" data-end="159" /><strong data-start="159" data-end="173">Redo size:</strong>&nbsp;<code data-start="174" data-end="200">209715200 bytes = 200 MB</code></p>
<p data-start="202" data-end="231">👉 Therefore Data Guard rule:</p>
<blockquote data-start="233" data-end="319">
<p data-start="235" data-end="319">Standby Redo Logs per thread = Online groups + 1<br data-start="283" data-end="286" />= 3 + 1 =&nbsp;<strong data-start="298" data-end="319">4 SRLs per thread</strong></p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="321" data-end="388">So DC must create&nbsp;<strong data-start="339" data-end="388">8 standby redo logs total (4 for each thread)</strong></p>
<hr data-start="390" data-end="393" />
<h2 data-section-id="1yv4c5v" data-start="395" data-end="425">Copy-paste Email to DC Team</h2>
<div class="group relative my-4 w-full overflow-visible">
<div id="writing-block-ee7f40a2-6bdd-4e86-b7e9-b97305fdf4ed" class="relative w-full overflow-clip rounded-[24px] bg-token-bg-primary dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] shadow-[0px_4px_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]" data-writing-block="true" data-testid="writing-block-container">
<div class="z-1 md:sticky top-(--sticky-padding-top)" data-testid="writing-block-header-sticky-container">
<div class="bg-token-bg-primary flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-3 font-sans dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] py-2.5 py-2.5" data-testid="writing-block-header-surface">
<div class="flex grow gap-3 items-center">
<div class="text-token-text-tertiary flex max-w-[75%] min-w-0 grow cursor-default items-center self-center text-sm font-medium">
<div class="truncate">Email</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex shrink-0 items-center">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-[auto_1fr] items-start gap-2 pt-0 pb-3 leading-normal">
<div class="font-medium">Subject</div>
<div class="grid">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
<hr class="border-token-border-light! border-t-0.5 mx-4 my-0! border-t! md:mx-5" />
<div class="writing-block-editor markdown-new-styling relative flow-root pt-(--writing-block-editor-pt) pe-(--writing-block-editor-pr) pb-(--writing-block-editor-pb) ps-(--writing-block-editor-pl)">
<div class="ProseMirror markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full min-h-6 break-words focus:outline-none" dir="auto" contenteditable="true" translate="no">
<p>Hi Varun,</p>
<p>Based on the outputs shared, the Primary database PRODCDB is a 2-node RAC database having 3 online redo log groups per thread (200 MB each).</p>
<p>For Data Guard redo transport to work, Standby Redo Logs must exist on PRIMARY for each RAC thread.<br />Currently redo for Thread-1 is not being shipped to DR, therefore standby database is waiting for logs.</p>
<p>Please execute the below steps on&nbsp;<strong>PRIMARY (PRODCDB)</strong>&nbsp;as SYSDBA.</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<h2>STEP 1 &mdash; Check existing standby redo logs</h2>
<p>SELECT group#, thread#, bytes/1024/1024 MB FROM v$standby_log ORDER BY thread#, group#;</p>
<p>If rows exist, drop them first:</p>
<p>SELECT group#, thread# FROM v$standby_log;</p>
<p>For each group returned:<br />ALTER DATABASE DROP STANDBY LOGFILE GROUP &lt;group#&gt;;</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<p>-- THREAD 1<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 1 GROUP 11 SIZE 200M;<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 1 GROUP 12 SIZE 200M;<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 1 GROUP 13 SIZE 200M;<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 1 GROUP 14 SIZE 200M;</p>
<p>-- THREAD 2<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 2 GROUP 21 SIZE 200M;<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 2 GROUP 22 SIZE 200M;<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 2 GROUP 23 SIZE 200M;<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 2 GROUP 24 SIZE 200M;</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<h2>STEP 3 &mdash; Verify</h2>
<p>SELECT thread#, group#, bytes/1024/1024 MB FROM v$standby_log ORDER BY thread#, group#;</p>
<p>Expected: 4 rows per thread (1 &amp; 2)</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<h2>STEP 4 &mdash; Force redo shipping</h2>
<p>ALTER SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG CURRENT;<br />ALTER SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG CURRENT;<br />ALTER SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG CURRENT;</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<p>After execution kindly share verification output.</p>
<p>Once done, standby redo apply will start automatically on DR.</p>
<p>Thanks &amp; Regards<br />Alok</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 z-2 rounded-[24px] shadow-[inset_0px_0px_0px_1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.07)]">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2828" data-end="2831" />
<h3 data-section-id="1gro9hc" data-start="2833" data-end="2871">What will happen after they run it</h3>
<p data-start="2872" data-end="2897">Within ~30 seconds on DR:</p>
<p data-start="2899" data-end="2942"><code data-start="2899" data-end="2918">MRP0 WAIT_FOR_LOG</code>&nbsp;➜&nbsp;<strong data-start="2921" data-end="2942">MRP0 APPLYING_LOG</strong></p>
<p data-start="2944" data-end="2993">And your standby will begin syncing continuously.</p>
<hr data-start="2995" data-end="2998" />
<p data-start="3000" data-end="3155" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">After redo starts applying, next step will be:<br />👉&nbsp;<strong data-start="3050" data-end="3106">Switchover / DR Drill (safe production cutover test)</strong>&nbsp;&mdash; I&rsquo;ll guide you step-by-step when they confirm.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="e34af954-3554-4bc8-8cc1-5e2923191374" data-testid="conversation-turn-87" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="user" data-message-id="e34af954-3554-4bc8-8cc1-5e2923191374">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden items-end rtl:items-start">
<div class="user-message-bubble-color corner-superellipse/0.98 relative rounded-[22px] px-4 py-2.5 leading-6 max-w-(--user-chat-width,70%)">
<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">SQL&gt; SELECT (SELECT MAX(sequence#) FROM v$archived_log WHERE applied='YES') AS LAST_APPLIED, (SELECT MAX(sequence#) FROM v$archived_log) AS LAST_RECEIVED FROM dual; 2 3 4 LAST_APPLIED LAST_RECEIVED ------------ ------------- 12927 12927 SQL&gt;</div>
</div>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="442b420c-e2b4-4922-b8cd-2b229f480d40" data-testid="conversation-turn-88" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">

<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="43">Good 👍 &mdash; this output is&nbsp;<strong data-start="25" data-end="43">very important</strong></p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>

<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">

<h3 data-section-id="1fpdxh" data-start="98" data-end="115">What it means</h3>
<p data-start="116" data-end="195">Your DR standby is&nbsp;<strong data-start="135" data-end="195">perfectly consistent with primary till last archived log</strong></p>
<p data-start="197" data-end="253">So Data Guard is working&nbsp;<strong data-start="222" data-end="253">up to ARCHIVE shipping only</strong></p>
<p data-start="255" data-end="296">But look at your managed standby earlier:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 WAIT_FOR_LOG<br />RFS IDLE (thread 1 sequence 0)<br />RFS IDLE (thread 2 sequence 10908)</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="393" data-end="407">This confirms:</p>
<blockquote data-start="409" data-end="519">
<p data-start="411" data-end="519">🔴 Primary is NOT sending CURRENT ONLINE REDO (real-time redo)<br />Only archived logs are available till 12927</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="521" data-end="590">That happens ONLY when&nbsp;<strong data-start="544" data-end="590">Standby Redo Logs (SRL) missing on PRIMARY</strong></p>
<p data-start="592" data-end="615">So your database is in:</p>
<h3 data-section-id="1d2vft4" data-start="617" data-end="651">ARCHIVE APPLY MODE (Lagged DR)</h3>
<p data-start="652" data-end="655">NOT</p>
<h3 data-section-id="1l9crg8" data-start="656" data-end="700">REAL TIME APPLY MODE (Zero data loss DR)</h3>
<hr data-start="702" data-end="705" />
<h1 data-section-id="8sp1t8" data-start="707" data-end="753">Why DR Drill / Switchover cannot be done yet</h1>
<p data-start="754" data-end="772">If you switch now:</p>
<p data-start="774" data-end="856">You will lose transactions between<br data-start="808" data-end="811" /><code data-start="811" data-end="832">current online redo</code>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<code data-start="837" data-end="856">last archived log</code></p>
<p data-start="858" data-end="888">Meaning &rarr; production data loss</p>
<p data-start="890" data-end="917">So we must first make this:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 APPLYING_LOG</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="946" data-end="973">Only then DR drill is safe.</p>
<hr data-start="975" data-end="978" />
<h1 data-section-id="sgn549" data-start="980" data-end="1019">What will happen after DC creates SRL</h1>
<p data-start="1020" data-end="1045">Immediately you will see:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">RFS WRITING<br />MRP0 APPLYING_LOG<br />REAL TIME APPLY</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1102" data-end="1122">Then run this again:</p>

<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">Hi Alok, Standby Redo were added as per instruction earlier provided in Doc ID. SQL&gt; SELECT * FROM v$logfile; GROUP# STATUS TYPE MEMBER IS_ CON_ID ---------- ------- ------- ------------------------------------------------------------ --- ---------- 3 ONLINE +DATA/PROD/ONLINELOG/redo03.log NO 0 2 ONLINE +DATA/PROD/ONLINELOG/redo02.log NO 0 1 ONLINE +DATA/PROD/ONLINELOG/redo01.log NO 0 5 ONLINE +DATA/PROD/ONLINELOG/redogroup5.log NO 0 6 ONLINE +DATA/PROD/ONLINELOG/redogroup6.log NO 0 7 ONLINE +DATA/PROD/ONLINELOG/redogroup7.log NO 0 8 STANDBY +DATA/PROD/STANDBYLOG/redo08.log NO 0 9 STANDBY +DATA/PROD/STANDBYLOG/redo09.log NO 0 10 STANDBY +DATA/PROD/STANDBYLOG/redo10.log NO 0 SQL&gt; SELECT group#, thread#, bytes/1024/1024 MB FROM v$standby_log ORDER BY thread#, group#; GROUP# THREAD# MB ---------- ---------- ---------- 8 3 200 9 3 200 10 3 200 Kindly ask Anirudh to check above output and let me know further steps to be performed on Prod.</div>

<p data-start="0" data-end="31">🚨 Now we found the real issue.</p>

<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">

<hr data-start="395" data-end="398" />
<h1 data-section-id="m0l6yp" data-start="400" data-end="412">Root Cause</h1>
<p data-start="414" data-end="445">They created standby redo logs:</p>
<ul data-start="447" data-end="624">
<li data-section-id="1d0yy1h" data-start="447" data-end="476">
<p data-start="449" data-end="476">❌ Without specifying THREAD</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="h2bp3b" data-start="477" data-end="540">
<p data-start="479" data-end="540">❌ Oracle defaulted them to THREAD 3 (invalid / unused thread)</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="19kb1py" data-start="541" data-end="578">
<p data-start="543" data-end="578">❌ Therefore primary cannot use them</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1kstuxm" data-start="579" data-end="624">
<p data-start="581" data-end="624">❌ So real-time redo shipping is NOT working</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="626" data-end="666">That is exactly why your DR is stuck at:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
