<hr data-start="695" data-end="698" />
<h1 data-section-id="207gw2" data-start="700" data-end="736">What Must Be Done Now (Very Clear)</h1>
<p data-start="738" data-end="748">They must:</p>
<p data-start="750" data-end="842">1️⃣ Drop the incorrect SRLs (Thread 3)<br data-start="788" data-end="791" />2️⃣ Create correct SRLs for THREAD 1 and THREAD 2</p>
<hr data-start="844" data-end="847" />
<h2 data-section-id="fdwg84" data-start="849" data-end="879">Send This Exact Email to DC</h2>
<div class="group relative my-4 w-full overflow-visible">
<div id="writing-block-0ca3f369-7910-4b55-8322-88378c1516ce" class="relative w-full overflow-clip rounded-[24px] bg-token-bg-primary dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] shadow-[0px_4px_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]" data-writing-block="true" data-testid="writing-block-container">
<div class="z-1 md:sticky top-(--sticky-padding-top)" data-testid="writing-block-header-sticky-container">
<div class="bg-token-bg-primary flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-3 font-sans dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] py-2.5 py-2.5" data-testid="writing-block-header-surface">
<div class="flex grow gap-3 items-center">
<div class="text-token-text-tertiary flex max-w-[75%] min-w-0 grow cursor-default items-center self-center text-sm font-medium">
<div class="truncate">Email</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex shrink-0 items-center">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-[auto_1fr] items-start gap-2 pt-0 pb-3 leading-normal">
<div class="font-medium">Subject</div>
<div class="grid">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
<hr class="border-token-border-light! border-t-0.5 mx-4 my-0! border-t! md:mx-5" />
<div class="writing-block-editor markdown-new-styling relative flow-root pt-(--writing-block-editor-pt) pe-(--writing-block-editor-pr) pb-(--writing-block-editor-pb) ps-(--writing-block-editor-pl)">
<div class="ProseMirror markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full min-h-6 break-words focus:outline-none" dir="auto" contenteditable="true" translate="no">
<p>Hi Varun,</p>
<p>The standby redo logs created earlier are assigned to THREAD# 3, which does not exist in the PRODCDB RAC database.</p>
<p>Current RAC configuration:<br />Thread 1 &rarr; PRODCDB1<br />Thread 2 &rarr; PRODCDB2</p>
<p>However, the standby redo logs are created under THREAD 3, so redo shipping cannot function.</p>
<p>Please execute the following steps on PRIMARY (PRODCDB):</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<h2>STEP 1 &ndash; Drop Incorrect Standby Redo Logs (Thread 3)</h2>
<p>SELECT group#, thread# FROM v$standby_log;</p>
<p>For each group returned (8, 9, 10):</p>
<p>ALTER DATABASE DROP STANDBY LOGFILE GROUP 8;<br />ALTER DATABASE DROP STANDBY LOGFILE GROUP 9;<br />ALTER DATABASE DROP STANDBY LOGFILE GROUP 10;</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<p>STEP 2 &ndash; Create Correct Standby Redo Logs (200MB each)</p>
<p>Online redo per thread = 3 groups<br />Required SRL per thread = 4 groups</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<p>-- THREAD 1<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 1 GROUP 11 SIZE 200M;<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 1 GROUP 12 SIZE 200M;<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 1 GROUP 13 SIZE 200M;<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 1 GROUP 14 SIZE 200M;</p>
<p>-- THREAD 2<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 2 GROUP 21 SIZE 200M;<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 2 GROUP 22 SIZE 200M;<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 2 GROUP 23 SIZE 200M;<br />ALTER DATABASE ADD STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD 2 GROUP 24 SIZE 200M;</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<h2>STEP 3 &ndash; Verify</h2>
<p>SELECT thread#, group#, bytes/1024/1024 MB<br />FROM v$standby_log<br />ORDER BY thread#, group#;</p>
<p>Expected: 4 rows for Thread 1 and 4 rows for Thread 2</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<h2>STEP 4 &ndash; Force Log Switch</h2>
<p>ALTER SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG CURRENT;<br />ALTER SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG CURRENT;<br />ALTER SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG CURRENT;</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<p>Once completed, real-time redo apply will start automatically on DR.</p>
<p>Please share verification output after execution.</p>
<p>Thanks &amp; Regards<br />Alok</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 z-2 rounded-[24px] shadow-[inset_0px_0px_0px_1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.07)]">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="3287" data-end="3290" />
<h1 data-section-id="2mdvyb" data-start="3292" data-end="3320">What Will Happen After Fix</h1>
<p data-start="3322" data-end="3346">Within 30 seconds on DR:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">RFS WRITING<br />MRP0 APPLYING_LOG</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3387" data-end="3391">And:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> name, <span class="ͼ8">value</span> <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$dataguard_stats;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3448" data-end="3458">Will show:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">transport lag 0<br />apply lag 0</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="3503" data-end="3506" />
<p data-start="3508" data-end="3528">You were very close.</p>
<p data-start="3530" data-end="3560">This is a classic RAC mistake:</p>
<blockquote data-start="3561" data-end="3598">
<p data-start="3563" data-end="3598">Creating SRL without THREAD clause.</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="3600" data-end="3673">Once corrected, your Data Guard will become fully real-time synchronized.</p>
<p data-start="3675" data-end="3755" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Send me the output once they fix it &mdash; next step will be DR switchover rehearsal.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="b69be08b-d91d-4d63-bb9e-00d06be91c34" data-testid="conversation-turn-91" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">

All rights reserved. Connected to: Oracle Database 19c Enterprise Edition Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production Version 19.27.0.0.0 SQL&gt; can we make chenges from here if there is not any critical misconfiguration will occur from thease command please suggest</div>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="7c8d3e27-9b58-42f2-b3f6-e67ba388592d" data-testid="conversation-turn-92" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="7c8d3e27-9b58-42f2-b3f6-e67ba388592d" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="42">Good question 👍 &mdash; and very important one.</p>
<p data-start="44" data-end="97">You are connected from DR server to Primary database:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">sqlplus sys/sys123@PRODCDB_PROD as sysdba</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="154" data-end="165">This means:</p>
<ul data-start="167" data-end="293">
<li data-section-id="8sajdh" data-start="167" data-end="198">
<p data-start="169" data-end="198">You are sitting on DR machine</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1bpglwh" data-start="199" data-end="242">
<p data-start="201" data-end="242">But you are logged into PRIMARY (PRODCDB)</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="15pgjo4" data-start="243" data-end="293">
<p data-start="245" data-end="293">Any command you run will modify PRIMARY database</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="295" data-end="298" />
<h1 data-section-id="kwpob2" data-start="300" data-end="343">Can you create Standby Redo Logs from DR?</h1>
<h3 data-section-id="1wq1zpf" data-start="345" data-end="379">✅ YES &mdash; Technically possible</h3>
<h3 data-section-id="11c9xnv" data-start="380" data-end="399">⚠️ But only if:</h3>
<ul data-start="401" data-end="511">
<li data-section-id="sr21p8" data-start="401" data-end="440">
<p data-start="403" data-end="440">You are connected to PRIMARY instance</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1q5fn3w" data-start="441" data-end="478">
<p data-start="443" data-end="478">You understand it is a RAC database</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="13gkufz" data-start="479" data-end="511">
<p data-start="481" data-end="511">You execute commands carefully</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="513" data-end="516" />
<h1 data-section-id="wheaf2" data-start="518" data-end="557">Important Check Before Doing Anything</h1>
<p data-start="559" data-end="610">Run this first to confirm you are truly on PRIMARY:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> name, open_mode, database_role <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$database;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="679" data-end="692">It must show:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">PRODCDB READ WRITE PRIMARY</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="734" data-end="773">If it shows STANDBY &rarr; STOP immediately.</p>
<hr data-start="775" data-end="778" />
<h1 data-section-id="1cb5g18" data-start="780" data-end="821">Is it safe to create Standby Redo Logs?</h1>
<p data-start="823" data-end="845">Yes. Creating SRLs is:</p>
<ul data-start="847" data-end="922">
<li data-section-id="134964y" data-start="847" data-end="865">
<p data-start="849" data-end="865">Online operation</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="ndahfy" data-start="866" data-end="879">
<p data-start="868" data-end="879">No downtime</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="10f72nm" data-start="880" data-end="900">
<p data-start="882" data-end="900">No impact to users</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="phhtyv" data-start="901" data-end="922">
<p data-start="903" data-end="922">No restart required</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="924" data-end="961">Even in RAC production, this is safe.</p>
<hr data-start="963" data-end="966" />
<h1 data-section-id="13u03z6" data-start="968" data-end="1000">What You Must NOT Do From Here</h1>
<p data-start="1002" data-end="1009">Do NOT:</p>
<ul data-start="1011" data-end="1172">
<li data-section-id="chnhr0" data-start="1011" data-end="1034">
<p data-start="1013" data-end="1034">Change DB_UNIQUE_NAME</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="k6bn17" data-start="1035" data-end="1081">
<p data-start="1037" data-end="1081">Modify LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST without coordination</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1184rno" data-start="1082" data-end="1119">
<p data-start="1084" data-end="1119">Run ALTER DATABASE ACTIVATE STANDBY</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1x0qrxo" data-start="1120" data-end="1148">
<p data-start="1122" data-end="1148">Run any SWITCHOVER command</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="ihl6sl" data-start="1149" data-end="1172">
<p data-start="1151" data-end="1172">Drop online redo logs</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1174" data-end="1203">Only SRL operations are safe.</p>
<hr data-start="1205" data-end="1208" />
<h1 data-section-id="bg3xcm" data-start="1210" data-end="1242">Recommended Approach (Cleaner)</h1>
<p data-start="1244" data-end="1280">Even though you&nbsp;<em data-start="1260" data-end="1265">can</em>&nbsp;do it from DR:</p>
<p data-start="1282" data-end="1310">Best practice in production:</p>
<p data-start="1312" data-end="1349">👉 Let DC team execute locally<br data-start="1342" data-end="1345" />Why?</p>
<ul data-start="1351" data-end="1453">
<li data-section-id="b1b41p" data-start="1351" data-end="1386">
<p data-start="1353" data-end="1386">They have RAC cluster environment</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1fkzhau" data-start="1387" data-end="1411">
<p data-start="1389" data-end="1411">They can see ASM paths</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1tcmt72" data-start="1412" data-end="1453">
<p data-start="1414" data-end="1453">They avoid accidental instance mismatch</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1455" data-end="1458" />
<h1 data-section-id="izrpi8" data-start="1460" data-end="1493">If You Decide to Do It Yourself</h1>
<p data-start="1495" data-end="1539">Then connect explicitly to one RAC instance:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">sqlplus sys/sys123@PRODCDB1 as sysdba</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1592" data-end="1610">Then execute ONLY:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1734" data-end="1767">(Repeat required number of times)</p>
<hr data-start="1769" data-end="1772" />
<h1 data-section-id="1s2fn74" data-start="1774" data-end="1806">My Professional Recommendation</h1>
<p data-start="1808" data-end="1837">Since this is production RAC:</p>
<p data-start="1839" data-end="1912">👉 Do NOT take ownership from DR side<br data-start="1876" data-end="1879" />👉 Ask DC to correct it locally</p>
<p data-start="1914" data-end="1987">You are already 95% complete.<br data-start="1943" data-end="1946" />No need to introduce change control risk.</p>
<hr data-start="1989" data-end="1992" />
<h1 data-section-id="1ayfp54" data-start="1994" data-end="2008">Short Answer</h1>
<p data-start="2010" data-end="2138">Can you do it? &rarr; ✅ Yes<br data-start="2032" data-end="2035" />Should you do it? &rarr; ⚠️ Better DC executes<br data-start="2076" data-end="2079" />Will it break anything? &rarr; ❌ No, if only SRL commands used</p>
<hr data-start="2140" data-end="2143" />
<p data-start="2145" data-end="2166">If you want, send me:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> instance_name, host_name <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> gv$instance;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2230" data-end="2302" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">I&rsquo;ll confirm exactly which node you are connected to before you proceed.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="fdb8ad4e-57e0-483b-ba37-0ad3287c3f93" data-testid="conversation-turn-93" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="c095c68b-078d-493f-9bf9-eab7f4040a0c" data-testid="conversation-turn-94" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">

<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="12">Perfect 👍</p>
<p data-start="14" data-end="36">This confirms clearly:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">PRODCDB READ WRITE PRIMARY</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="78" data-end="137">You are connected to&nbsp;<strong data-start="99" data-end="123">Primary RAC database</strong>, not standby.</p>
<p data-start="139" data-end="217">So yes &mdash; technically you&nbsp;<em data-start="164" data-end="169">can</em>&nbsp;execute standby redo log corrections from here.</p>
<hr data-start="219" data-end="222" />
<h1 data-section-id="1kjzxze" data-start="224" data-end="239">✅ Is It Safe?</h1>
<p data-start="241" data-end="298">Creating or dropping&nbsp;<strong data-start="262" data-end="283">standby redo logs</strong>&nbsp;on PRIMARY is:</p>
<ul data-start="300" data-end="416">
<li data-section-id="134964y" data-start="300" data-end="318">
<p data-start="302" data-end="318">Online operation</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="phhtyv" data-start="319" data-end="340">
<p data-start="321" data-end="340">No restart required</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="ptgv0a" data-start="341" data-end="357">
<p data-start="343" data-end="357">No user impact</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1rvmuq5" data-start="358" data-end="382">
<p data-start="360" data-end="382">Safe in production RAC</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="13vf89c" data-start="383" data-end="416">
<p data-start="385" data-end="416">Does NOT interrupt transactions</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="418" data-end="457">So from database perspective &rarr;&nbsp;<strong data-start="449" data-end="457">Safe</strong></p>
<hr data-start="459" data-end="462" />
<h1 data-section-id="16dy2vk" data-start="464" data-end="505">⚠️ But Very Important (RAC Environment)</h1>
<p data-start="507" data-end="534">Since this is a 2-node RAC:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Thread 1 &rarr; PRODCDB1<br />Thread 2 &rarr; PRODCDB2</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="585" data-end="630">Standby redo logs MUST be created per thread.</p>
<hr data-start="632" data-end="635" />
<h1 data-section-id="hxyujk" data-start="637" data-end="679">🔴 First Confirm Where You Are Connected</h1>
<p data-start="681" data-end="685">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> instance_name, host_name <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> gv$instance;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="749" data-end="764">This will show:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="766" data-end="847">
<thead data-start="766" data-end="785">
<tr data-start="766" data-end="785">
<th class="" data-start="766" data-end="777" data-col-size="sm">INSTANCE</th>
<th class="" data-start="777" data-end="785" data-col-size="sm">HOST</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="806" data-end="847">
<tr data-start="806" data-end="826">
<td data-start="806" data-end="817" data-col-size="sm">PRODCDB1</td>
<td data-start="817" data-end="826" data-col-size="sm">node1</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="827" data-end="847">
<td data-start="827" data-end="838" data-col-size="sm">PRODCDB2</td>
<td data-start="838" data-end="847" data-col-size="sm">node2</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="849" data-end="929">Even if you are connected through service, SRL creation will apply cluster-wide.</p>
<hr data-start="931" data-end="934" />
<h1 data-section-id="43qijc" data-start="936" data-end="998">🔥 What You Should Do Now (If You Decide to Fix It Yourself)</h1>
<h3 data-section-id="1gmedcm" data-start="1000" data-end="1032">1️⃣ Drop wrong thread-3 logs</h3>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> <span class="ͼ8">group</span>#, thread# <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$standby_log;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1089" data-end="1117">If it shows thread 3 groups:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">DROP</span> STANDBY LOGFILE <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">8</span>;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">DROP</span> STANDBY LOGFILE <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">9</span>;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">DROP</span> STANDBY LOGFILE <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">10</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1267" data-end="1270" />
<h3 data-section-id="10ekuse" data-start="1272" data-end="1312">2️⃣ Create Correct Standby Redo Logs</h3>
<p data-start="1314" data-end="1374">Online groups per thread = 3<br data-start="1342" data-end="1345" />Required SRL per thread = 4</p>
<p data-start="1376" data-end="1383">Create:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ6">-- THREAD 1</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ6">-- THREAD 2</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1862" data-end="1933">No need to specify file path in ASM &mdash; Oracle will auto place correctly.</p>
<hr data-start="1935" data-end="1938" />
<h3 data-section-id="1tbyy6m" data-start="1940" data-end="1954">3️⃣ Verify</h3>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, <span class="ͼ8">group</span>#, bytes<span class="ͼ8">/</span><span class="ͼb">1024</span><span class="ͼ8">/</span><span class="ͼb">1024</span> MB <br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$standby_log <br /><span class="ͼ8">ORDER</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> thread#, <span class="ͼ8">group</span>#;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2058" data-end="2071">You must see:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Thread 1 &rarr; 4 groups<br />Thread 2 &rarr; 4 groups</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2122" data-end="2125" />
<h3 data-section-id="155izrp" data-start="2127" data-end="2151">4️⃣ Force Log Switch</h3>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span>;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span>;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2267" data-end="2270" />
<h1 data-section-id="k994oy" data-start="2272" data-end="2298">✅ What Will Happen on DR</h1>
<p data-start="2300" data-end="2321">Within 20&ndash;30 seconds:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">

<h1 data-section-id="vykg79" data-start="841" data-end="883">🔴 Step 1 &ndash; Drop Incorrect Thread 3 Logs</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<h1 data-section-id="195zh35" data-start="1080" data-end="1127">🟢 Step 2 &ndash; Create Correct SRL (4 per thread)</h1>
<p data-start="1129" data-end="1205">Since online redo per thread = 3 groups<br data-start="1168" data-end="1171" />Required SRL per thread = 4 groups</p>
<p data-start="1207" data-end="1211">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ6">-- THREAD 1</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ6">-- THREAD 2</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1690" data-end="1749">Do NOT specify ASM path &mdash; Oracle will auto-place correctly.</p>

<h1 data-section-id="13xr8qk" data-start="1756" data-end="1776">🟢 Step 3 &ndash; Verify</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, <span class="ͼ8">COUNT</span>(<span class="ͼ8">*</span>) <br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$standby_log<br /><span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> thread#<br /><span class="ͼ8">ORDER</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> thread#;</div>

<p data-start="90" data-end="253">🔴&nbsp;<strong data-start="93" data-end="146">Thread 3 does NOT exist in your RAC (only 1 &amp; 2).</strong><br data-start="146" data-end="149" />So these standby redo logs are completely unusable.<br data-start="200" data-end="203" />That is exactly why DR is stuck at&nbsp;<code data-start="238" data-end="252">WAIT_FOR_LOG</code>.</p>
<p data-start="255" data-end="283">You can safely fix this now.</p>

<h1 data-section-id="10x2s1v" data-start="290" data-end="309">✅ SAFE TO PROCEED</h1>
<p data-start="311" data-end="319">You are:</p>
<ul data-start="320" data-end="387">
<li data-section-id="1fj7rnk" data-start="320" data-end="342">
<p data-start="322" data-end="342">Connected to PRIMARY</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1eacqzn" data-start="343" data-end="363">
<p data-start="345" data-end="363">In READ WRITE mode</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="5776gm" data-start="364" data-end="372">
<p data-start="366" data-end="372">SYSDBA</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="s1d1r2" data-start="373" data-end="387">
<p data-start="375" data-end="387">RAC verified</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="389" data-end="431">Dropping these SRLs will NOT impact users.</p>
<hr data-start="433" data-end="436" />
<h1 data-section-id="1o5ogtm" data-start="438" data-end="482">🔴 Step 1 &mdash; Drop Incorrect SRLs (Thread 3)</h1>
<p data-start="484" data-end="496">Run exactly:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">DROP</span> STANDBY LOGFILE <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">8</span>;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">DROP</span> STANDBY LOGFILE <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">9</span>;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">DROP</span> STANDBY LOGFILE <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼb">10</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="646" data-end="665">After that confirm:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

<h1 data-section-id="nmfa8l" data-start="744" data-end="792">🟢 Step 2 &mdash; Create Correct SRLs (4 per thread)</h1>
<p data-start="794" data-end="859">Online redo groups per thread = 3<br data-start="827" data-end="830" />Required SRL per thread = 4</p>
<p data-start="861" data-end="865">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ6">-- THREAD 1</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ6">-- THREAD 2</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">ADD</span> STANDBY LOGFILE THREAD <span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼ8">SIZE</span> <span class="ͼb">200</span>M;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1344" data-end="1406">Do not specify ASM path &mdash; Oracle will auto create under +DATA.</p>
<hr data-start="1408" data-end="1411" />
<h1 data-section-id="1c8pxp7" data-start="1413" data-end="1433">🟢 Step 3 &mdash; Verify</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">

<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">

<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="41">Good &mdash; this tells us something important.</p>
<p data-start="43" data-end="97">Even after creating correct SRLs, DR is still showing:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">RFS IDLE<br />MRP0 WAIT_FOR_LOG</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="138" data-end="142">And:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Thread 1 stuck at sequence 12928<br />Thread 2 last seen 11105</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="211" data-end="214">So:</p>
<p data-start="216" data-end="292">✅ SRLs are now correct<br data-start="238" data-end="241" />❌ But primary is still NOT actively shipping redo</p>
<p data-start="294" data-end="360">This means redo transport is not being triggered yet from PRIMARY.</p>
<hr data-start="362" data-end="365" />
<h1 data-section-id="12txs4d" data-start="367" data-end="417">🔎 We Now Need to Check PRIMARY Transport Status</h1>
<p data-start="419" data-end="463">From PRIMARY (where you are connected), run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> dest_id, status, error, destination<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archive_dest_status<br /><span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> dest_id <span class="ͼ8">=</span> <span class="ͼb">2</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="566" data-end="575">Also run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> dest_id, status, error<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archive_dest<br /><span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> dest_id <span class="ͼ8">=</span> <span class="ͼb">2</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="658" data-end="675">We want to check:</p>
<ul data-start="677" data-end="765">
<li data-section-id="q4ab2d" data-start="677" data-end="709">
<p data-start="679" data-end="709">Is LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_2 enabled?</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="wtm207" data-start="710" data-end="738">
<p data-start="712" data-end="738">Is there any hidden error?</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="13f924w" data-start="739" data-end="765">
<p data-start="741" data-end="765">Is it VALID or INACTIVE?</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="767" data-end="770" />
<h1 data-section-id="dcoei7" data-start="772" data-end="824">🔥 Very Important Step (Force Real-Time Transport)</h1>
<p data-start="826" data-end="841">On PRIMARY run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM SWITCH LOGFILE;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM SWITCH LOGFILE;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM SWITCH LOGFILE;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="942" data-end="1000">(Use SWITCH LOGFILE instead of ARCHIVE LOG CURRENT in RAC)</p>
<p data-start="1002" data-end="1034">Then immediately check DR again:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> process, status, thread#, sequence#<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$managed_standby;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1115" data-end="1118" />
<h1 data-section-id="1765su8" data-start="1120" data-end="1146">🧠 Why This Is Happening</h1>
<p data-start="1148" data-end="1179">When SRLs were missing earlier:</p>
<ul data-start="1181" data-end="1309">
<li data-section-id="1kalvlk" data-start="1181" data-end="1216">
<p data-start="1183" data-end="1216">Primary transport silently failed</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1hfdyep" data-start="1217" data-end="1309">
<p data-start="1219" data-end="1309">Even after SRL creation, redo transport sometimes needs a fresh log switch to reinitialize</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1311" data-end="1352">This is normal behavior in RAC DG setups.</p>
<hr data-start="1354" data-end="1357" />
<h1 data-section-id="16mpklt" data-start="1359" data-end="1385">🟢 Expected After Switch</h1>
<p data-start="1387" data-end="1402">You should see:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">RFS WRITING<br />MRP0 APPLYING_LOG</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1446" data-end="1499">If still WAIT_FOR_LOG &mdash; then we check transport mode.</p>
<hr data-start="1501" data-end="1504" />
<h1 data-section-id="cmity1" data-start="1506" data-end="1532">🎯 Most Likely Cause Now</h1>
<p data-start="1534" data-end="1541">Either:</p>
<ul data-start="1543" data-end="1663">
<li data-section-id="aqjh5v" data-start="1543" data-end="1583">
<p data-start="1545" data-end="1583">LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_STATE_2 is not ENABLE</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1qi37yn" data-start="1584" data-end="1620">
<p data-start="1586" data-end="1620">OR ASYNC transport not reactivated</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="7he44w" data-start="1621" data-end="1663">
<p data-start="1623" data-end="1663">OR primary still holding old error state</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1665" data-end="1702">We confirm via the two queries above.</p>
<hr data-start="1704" data-end="1707" />
<p data-start="1709" data-end="1753">Run the 3 SWITCH LOGFILE commands and paste:</p>
<ol data-start="1755" data-end="1800">
<li data-section-id="1tciza0" data-start="1755" data-end="1779">
<p data-start="1758" data-end="1779">v$archive_dest_status</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="xdr5nq" data-start="1780" data-end="1800">
<p data-start="1783" data-end="1800">v$managed_standby</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start="1802" data-end="1862" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">We are extremely close now &mdash; just transport activation left.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="64cdd161-731b-493b-a422-6c0b91fbffb4" data-testid="conversation-turn-103" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="user" data-message-id="64cdd161-731b-493b-a422-6c0b91fbffb4">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden items-end rtl:items-start">
<div class="user-message-bubble-color corner-superellipse/0.98 relative rounded-[22px] px-4 py-2.5 leading-6 max-w-(--user-chat-width,70%)">
<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">SQL&gt; SELECT dest_id, status, error, destination FROM v$archive_dest_status WHERE dest_id = 2; 2 3 DEST_ID STATUS ---------- --------- ERROR ----------------------------------------------------------------- DESTINATION -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 2 ERROR ORA-12154: TNS:could not resolve the connect identifier specified PRODCDB_DR SQL&gt;</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="f4e101d5-402f-44e1-af8a-2bc42c57333b" data-testid="conversation-turn-104" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="f4e101d5-402f-44e1-af8a-2bc42c57333b" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="62">Good &mdash; now we have the&nbsp;<strong data-start="23" data-end="42">real root cause</strong>&nbsp;clearly identified.</p>
<p data-start="64" data-end="77">From PRIMARY:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">DEST_ID <span class="ͼ8">=</span> <span class="ͼb">2</span><br />STATUS <span class="ͼ8">=</span> ERROR<br />ERROR <span class="ͼ8">=</span> ORA<span class="ͼ8">-</span><span class="ͼb">12154</span>: TNS could <span class="ͼ8">not</span> resolve <span class="ͼ8">connect</span> identifier<br />DESTINATION <span class="ͼ8">=</span> PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="206" data-end="217">This means:</p>
<p data-start="219" data-end="273">🚨&nbsp;<strong data-start="222" data-end="273">Primary cannot resolve the TNS alias PRODCDB_DR</strong></p>
<p data-start="275" data-end="314">So redo transport is NOT even starting.</p>
<p data-start="316" data-end="328">That is why:</p>
<ul data-start="330" data-end="393">
<li data-section-id="1bhi1fa" data-start="330" data-end="342">
<p data-start="332" data-end="342">RFS = IDLE</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="r7tvvi" data-start="343" data-end="364">
<p data-start="345" data-end="364">MRP0 = WAIT_FOR_LOG</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="qjthdx" data-start="365" data-end="393">
<p data-start="367" data-end="393">No real-time redo shipping</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="395" data-end="398" />
<h1 data-section-id="4sje8b" data-start="400" data-end="439">✅ This Has Nothing To Do With SRL Now</h1>
<p data-start="441" data-end="458">SRLs are correct.</p>
<p data-start="460" data-end="475">Problem now is:</p>
<blockquote data-start="477" data-end="578">
<p data-start="479" data-end="578">LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_2 is pointing to SERVICE=PRODCDB_DR<br data-start="531" data-end="534" />But PRIMARY cannot resolve that TNS entry.</p>
</blockquote>
<hr data-start="580" data-end="583" />
<h1 data-section-id="1y5rd8a" data-start="585" data-end="625">🔎 Step 1 &mdash; Verify TNS From PRIMARY OS</h1>
<p data-start="627" data-end="661">From PRIMARY server (not DR), run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">tnsping PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="695" data-end="739">If it fails &rarr; TNS entry missing or wrong in:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">$ORACLE_HOME/network/admin/tnsnames.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="790" data-end="793" />
<h1 data-section-id="1frduqf" data-start="795" data-end="837">🔎 Step 2 &mdash; Confirm Parameter on PRIMARY</h1>
<p data-start="839" data-end="852">From PRIMARY:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">SHOW <span class="ͼ8">PARAMETER</span> log_archive_dest_2;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="901" data-end="919">It probably shows:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">SERVICE=PRODCDB_DR LGWR ASYNC ...</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="964" data-end="1000">So alias must exist on PRIMARY node.</p>
<hr data-start="1002" data-end="1005" />
<h1 data-section-id="1g72v3r" data-start="1007" data-end="1029">🔥 Most Common Cause</h1>
<p data-start="1031" data-end="1110">Earlier you created alias&nbsp;<strong data-start="1057" data-end="1073">PRODCDB_PROD</strong><br data-start="1073" data-end="1076" />But Data Guard parameter is using:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1132" data-end="1196">So PRIMARY needs TNS entry for&nbsp;<strong data-start="1163" data-end="1177">PRODCDB_DR</strong>, not PRODCDB_PROD.</p>
<hr data-start="1198" data-end="1201" />
<h1 data-section-id="ylaanp" data-start="1203" data-end="1237">✅ Fix Required on PRIMARY Server</h1>
<p data-start="1239" data-end="1285">Edit PRIMARY&rsquo;s tnsnames.ora and ensure it has:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">PRODCDB_DR =<br /> (DESCRIPTION =<br /> (ADDRESS = (PROTOCOL = TCP)(HOST = 10.61.185.221)(PORT = 1521))<br /> (CONNECT_DATA =<br /> (SERVER = DEDICATED)<br /> (SERVICE_NAME = PRODCDB_DR)<br /> (UR = A)<br /> )<br /> )</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1503" data-end="1542">⚠ Use IP (10.61.185.221), not hostname.</p>
<hr data-start="1544" data-end="1547" />
<h1 data-section-id="d5gbzy" data-start="1549" data-end="1573">After Adding TNS Entry</h1>
<p data-start="1575" data-end="1592">From PRIMARY run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">tnsping PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1626" data-end="1638">It must say:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">OK (0 msec)</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1661" data-end="1664" />
<h1 data-section-id="1k786mh" data-start="1666" data-end="1692">Then Re-enable Transport</h1>
<p data-start="1694" data-end="1707">From PRIMARY:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_STATE_2<span class="ͼ8">=</span>ENABLE;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM SWITCH LOGFILE;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM SWITCH LOGFILE;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1829" data-end="1832" />
<h1 data-section-id="gqix04" data-start="1834" data-end="1873">🎯 What Will Immediately Change on DR</h1>
<p data-start="1875" data-end="1896">Within 10&ndash;20 seconds:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
