<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> process, status, thread#, sequence#<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$managed_standby;</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1977" data-end="1987">Will show:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">RFS WRITING<br />MRP0 APPLYING_LOG</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2029" data-end="2032" />
<h1 data-section-id="5nbx84" data-start="2034" data-end="2056">📌 Why This Happened</h1>
<p data-start="2058" data-end="2086">When DC earlier changed TNS:</p>
<ul data-start="2088" data-end="2256">
<li data-section-id="1epwka0" data-start="2088" data-end="2117">
<p data-start="2090" data-end="2117">They fixed tnsping manually</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="7fzy62" data-start="2118" data-end="2177">
<p data-start="2120" data-end="2177">But database parameter still referencing unresolved alias</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1r6h3c0" data-start="2178" data-end="2226">
<p data-start="2180" data-end="2226">Oracle background process cannot resolve alias</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1ovduuc" data-start="2227" data-end="2256">
<p data-start="2229" data-end="2256">So transport stays in ERROR</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="2258" data-end="2261" />
<h1 data-section-id="fkok6o" data-start="2263" data-end="2291">🚨 Final Diagnosis Summary</h1>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="2293" data-end="2455">

</tr>

</table>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2457" data-end="2460" />
<p data-start="2462" data-end="2517">You are 100% blocked only by TNS resolution on PRIMARY.</p>
<p data-start="2519" data-end="2581">Fix that one alias and your DR will immediately start syncing.</p>
<hr data-start="2583" data-end="2586" />
<p data-start="2588" data-end="2643" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Run&nbsp;<code data-start="2592" data-end="2612">tnsping PRODCDB_DR</code>&nbsp;from PRIMARY and paste output.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>

<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="user" data-message-id="c1e6b0ae-67e8-4cd9-968b-66ffb499340a">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden items-end rtl:items-start">
<div class="user-message-bubble-color corner-superellipse/0.98 relative rounded-[22px] px-4 py-2.5 leading-6 max-w-(--user-chat-width,70%)">
<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">then what is this please explain SQL&gt; SELECT (SELECT MAX(sequence#) FROM v$archived_log WHERE applied='YES') AS LAST_APPLIED, (SELECT MAX(sequence#) FROM v$archived_log) AS LAST_RECEIVED FROM dual; 2 3 4 LAST_APPLIED LAST_RECEIVED ------------ ------------- 12927 12927 SQL&gt;</div>
</div>
</div>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="96b923ec-af84-44a6-a277-2c305745f9c0" data-testid="conversation-turn-106" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">

<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="80">Very good question 👌 &mdash; this is exactly where people get confused in Data Guard.</p>
<p data-start="82" data-end="112">Let&rsquo;s break this down clearly.</p>
<p data-start="114" data-end="142">You ran on&nbsp;<strong data-start="125" data-end="141">DR (standby)</strong>:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span><br /> (<span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> MAX(sequence#) <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archived_log <span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> applied<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'YES'</span>) <span class="ͼ8">AS</span> LAST_APPLIED,<br /> (<span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> MAX(sequence#) <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archived_log) <span class="ͼ8">AS</span> LAST_RECEIVED<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> dual;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="320" data-end="327">Result:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">LAST_APPLIED 12927<br />LAST_RECEIVED 12927</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="380" data-end="383" />
<h1 data-section-id="1dwbe00" data-start="385" data-end="413">✅ What This Actually Means</h1>
<p data-start="415" data-end="478">This query checks&nbsp;<strong data-start="433" data-end="477">archived redo logs already present on DR</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="480" data-end="492">It tells us:</p>
<ul data-start="494" data-end="608">
<li data-section-id="1kyd7x" data-start="494" data-end="538">
<p data-start="496" data-end="538">DR has received archive log sequence 12927</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1iyu81z" data-start="539" data-end="582">
<p data-start="541" data-end="582">DR has applied archive log sequence 12927</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="ydmvah" data-start="583" data-end="608">
<p data-start="585" data-end="608">No gap in archived logs</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="610" data-end="669">So DR is consistent&nbsp;<strong data-start="630" data-end="668">up to the last archived log it has</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="671" data-end="674" />
<h1 data-section-id="1w9j1pu" data-start="676" data-end="701">❌ What It Does NOT Mean</h1>
<p data-start="703" data-end="720">It does NOT mean:</p>
<ul data-start="722" data-end="826">
<li data-section-id="150o4qn" data-start="722" data-end="758">
<p data-start="724" data-end="758">Real-time redo shipping is working</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1gg8obm" data-start="759" data-end="794">
<p data-start="761" data-end="794">Primary is currently sending redo</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1x43dbf" data-start="795" data-end="826">
<p data-start="797" data-end="826">Transport is active right now</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="828" data-end="842">It only means:</p>
<blockquote data-start="844" data-end="893">
<p data-start="846" data-end="893">&ldquo;DR applied everything it previously received.&rdquo;</p>
</blockquote>
<hr data-start="895" data-end="898" />
<h1 data-section-id="1wxb26c" data-start="900" data-end="943">🔎 Why This Still Matches ORA-12154 Error</h1>
<p data-start="945" data-end="965">On PRIMARY you have:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">DEST_ID 2<br />STATUS ERROR<br />ORA-12154</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1010" data-end="1021">That means:</p>
<p data-start="1023" data-end="1105">🚨 Primary cannot resolve PRODCDB_DR alias<br data-start="1065" data-end="1068" />🚨 So it is NOT shipping new redo now</p>
<p data-start="1107" data-end="1124">So what happened?</p>
<p data-start="1126" data-end="1157">Most likely sequence of events:</p>
<ol data-start="1159" data-end="1382">
<li data-section-id="f261ab" data-start="1159" data-end="1204">
<p data-start="1162" data-end="1204">Earlier TNS was working &rarr; archives shipped</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="g5qhlv" data-start="1205" data-end="1242">
<p data-start="1208" data-end="1242">Then TNS misconfiguration happened</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1u7yfn6" data-start="1243" data-end="1263">
<p data-start="1246" data-end="1263">Transport stopped</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="r8vh7" data-start="1264" data-end="1303">
<p data-start="1267" data-end="1303">DR applied everything it already had</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="13jl4uv" data-start="1304" data-end="1337">
<p data-start="1307" data-end="1337">Now DR is waiting for next log</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1g5knq6" data-start="1338" data-end="1382">
<p data-start="1341" data-end="1382">But Primary cannot ship because TNS error</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start="1384" data-end="1405">That is why DR shows:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 WAIT_FOR_LOG</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1434" data-end="1483">And your archive query still shows equal numbers.</p>
<hr data-start="1485" data-end="1488" />
<h1 data-section-id="2tixf5" data-start="1490" data-end="1516">🧠 Think of It Like This</h1>

<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<p data-start="1578" data-end="1595">Standby has only:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Sequence 12927</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1621" data-end="1653">But because transport is broken:</p>
<ul data-start="1655" data-end="1768">
<li data-section-id="1bx5pul" data-start="1655" data-end="1692">
<p data-start="1657" data-end="1692">No new archive logs are reaching DR</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="pttstx" data-start="1693" data-end="1714">
<p data-start="1695" data-end="1714">DR is stuck waiting</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="ixhzqj" data-start="1715" data-end="1768">
<p data-start="1717" data-end="1768">But there is no gap in what it has already received</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1770" data-end="1773" />
<h1 data-section-id="z9z4w3" data-start="1775" data-end="1797">🔥 The Proof Is Here</h1>
<p data-start="1799" data-end="1809">On DR run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, sequence#, applied<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archived_log<br /><span class="ͼ8">ORDER</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> sequence# <span class="ͼ8">DESC</span> <span class="ͼ8">FETCH</span> <span class="ͼ8">FIRST</span> <span class="ͼb">10</span> <span class="ͼ8">ROWS</span> <span class="ͼ8">ONLY</span>;</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<p data-start="1928" data-end="1999">You will see last applied = 12927<br data-start="1961" data-end="1964" />But primary is already beyond that.</p>
<hr data-start="2001" data-end="2004" />
<h1 data-section-id="5mpn6s" data-start="2006" data-end="2035">🎯 Final Simple Explanation</h1>
<p data-start="2037" data-end="2055">Your query proves:</p>
<p data-start="2057" data-end="2119">✔ Archive apply is correct<br data-start="2083" data-end="2086" />❌ Transport is currently broken</p>
<p data-start="2121" data-end="2142">The blocker is still:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2197" data-end="2228">Until that is fixed on PRIMARY:</p>
<ul data-start="2230" data-end="2318">
<li data-section-id="1tiyazt" data-start="2230" data-end="2243">
<p data-start="2232" data-end="2243">No new redo</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="hzryoc" data-start="2244" data-end="2274">
<p data-start="2246" data-end="2274">DR will stay in WAIT_FOR_LOG</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="116qu3b" data-start="2275" data-end="2318">
<p data-start="2277" data-end="2318">LAST_APPLIED = LAST_RECEIVED (but frozen)</p>
</li>
</ul>

<h1 data-section-id="12me42l" data-start="2325" data-end="2351">📌 What Fixes Everything</h1>
<p data-start="2353" data-end="2371">On PRIMARY server:</p>
<ol data-start="2373" data-end="2425">
<li data-section-id="tjfwo8" data-start="2373" data-end="2413">
<p data-start="2376" data-end="2413">Fix tnsnames.ora entry for PRODCDB_DR</p>
</li>

<p data-start="2417" data-end="2425">Confirm:</p>
</li>
</ol>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

<ol start="3" data-start="2459" data-end="2467">

<p data-start="2462" data-end="2467">Then:</p>
</li>
</ol>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_STATE_2<span class="ͼ8">=</span>ENABLE;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM SWITCH LOGFILE;</div>

</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="521d49be-6524-4310-853f-d2784cdabbeb" data-testid="conversation-turn-107" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="user" data-message-id="521d49be-6524-4310-853f-d2784cdabbeb">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden items-end rtl:items-start">
<div class="user-message-bubble-color corner-superellipse/0.98 relative rounded-[22px] px-4 py-2.5 leading-6 max-w-(--user-chat-width,70%)">
<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">but DC team confirms that they are able to tnsping PRODCDB_DR fromm both nodes</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex justify-end">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="a1eab7fd-f890-445c-8d6a-342d1e49dc7e" data-testid="conversation-turn-108" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="a1eab7fd-f890-445c-8d6a-342d1e49dc7e" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="39">Excellent &mdash; this is the key moment now.</p>
<p data-start="41" data-end="49">DC says:</p>
<blockquote data-start="51" data-end="95">
<p data-start="53" data-end="95">✅ tnsping PRODCDB_DR works from both nodes</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="97" data-end="122">But database still shows:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">DEST_ID <span class="ͼb">2</span> STATUS <span class="ͼ8">=</span> ERROR<br />ORA<span class="ͼ8">-</span><span class="ͼb">12154</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="172" data-end="207">This means something very specific:</p>
<blockquote data-start="209" data-end="297">
<p data-start="211" data-end="297">OS-level tnsping works<br data-start="233" data-end="236" />But Oracle background process (ARCn/LGWR) cannot resolve it</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="299" data-end="335">These are NOT always the same thing.</p>
<hr data-start="337" data-end="340" />
<h1 data-section-id="jikvlw" data-start="342" data-end="363">🎯 Why This Happens</h1>
<p data-start="365" data-end="380"><code data-start="365" data-end="374">tnsping</code>&nbsp;uses:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">$ORACLE_HOME/network/admin/tnsnames.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="431" data-end="484">But the&nbsp;<strong data-start="439" data-end="470">database background process</strong>&nbsp;may be using:</p>
<ul data-start="486" data-end="583">
<li data-section-id="1ed0kaz" data-start="486" data-end="509">
<p data-start="488" data-end="509">Different ORACLE_HOME</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1q0fy44" data-start="510" data-end="531">
<p data-start="512" data-end="531">Different TNS_ADMIN</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="m0r3ke" data-start="532" data-end="554">
<p data-start="534" data-end="554">Different sqlnet.ora</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="10eybvy" data-start="555" data-end="583">
<p data-start="557" data-end="583">Or an IFILE (include file)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="585" data-end="609">Remember earlier we saw:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Used parameter files:<br />/oracle/racdb/product/network/admin/PROD_erpproddb1/sqlnet_ifile.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="711" data-end="762">That means Oracle is using an included config file.</p>
<p data-start="764" data-end="789">So tnsping may work from:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">/oracle/app/oracle/database/19.3.0/dbhome_1/network/admin</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="858" data-end="895">But database might be resolving from:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">/oracle/racdb/product/network/admin/PROD_erpproddb1</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="958" data-end="1002">Different location = different tnsnames.ora.</p>
<hr data-start="1004" data-end="1007" />
<h1 data-section-id="1uk3o45" data-start="1009" data-end="1053">🔎 We Must Check What DB Is Actually Using</h1>
<p data-start="1055" data-end="1070">On PRIMARY run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">SHOW <span class="ͼ8">PARAMETER</span> tns_admin;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1110" data-end="1134">If empty, then check OS:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">echo</span> <span class="ͼe">$TNS_ADMIN</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1165" data-end="1183">Also check sqlnet:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">cat</span> <span class="ͼe">$ORACLE_HOME</span>/network/admin/sqlnet.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1240" data-end="1249">Look for:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">IFILE=</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1267" data-end="1316">That tells us where real tnsnames is coming from.</p>
<hr data-start="1318" data-end="1321" />
<h1 data-section-id="1ryc7qj" data-start="1323" data-end="1348">🔥 Most Likely Scenario</h1>
<p data-start="1350" data-end="1366">Primary RAC has:</p>
<ul data-start="1368" data-end="1389">
<li data-section-id="1va8n7j" data-start="1368" data-end="1379">
<p data-start="1370" data-end="1379">Grid Home</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="b32vlt" data-start="1380" data-end="1389">
<p data-start="1382" data-end="1389">DB Home</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1391" data-end="1422">tnsping was tested from DB home</p>
<p data-start="1424" data-end="1481">But database background is using Grid home network config</p>
<p data-start="1483" data-end="1554">So PRODCDB_DR exists in one tnsnames<br />But not in the one ARCn is reading</p>
<hr data-start="1556" data-end="1559" />
<h1 data-section-id="g1md9a" data-start="1561" data-end="1593">🧪 Quick Test (Very Important)</h1>
<p data-start="1595" data-end="1630">From PRIMARY, inside SQL*Plus, run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> sys_context(<span class="ͼc">'USERENV'</span>,<span class="ͼc">'NETWORK_PROTOCOL'</span>) <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> dual;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1704" data-end="1755">Then check which ORACLE_HOME the instance is using:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> <span class="ͼ8">*</span> <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$version;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1794" data-end="1807">Then from OS:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">ps</span> <span class="ͼf">-ef</span> | <span class="ͼd">grep</span> pmon</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1841" data-end="1866">Confirm ORACLE_HOME path.</p>
<p data-start="1868" data-end="1926">Then verify tnsnames.ora in THAT home contains PRODCDB_DR.</p>
<hr data-start="1928" data-end="1931" />
<h1 data-section-id="1a0v52q" data-start="1933" data-end="1976">💥 Fastest Way To Bypass All TNS Problems</h1>
<p data-start="1978" data-end="2007">Instead of SERVICE=PRODCDB_DR</p>
<p data-start="2009" data-end="2062">Change LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_2 to use full connect string:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_2<span class="ͼ8">=</span><br /><span class="ͼc">'SERVICE="(DESCRIPTION=(ADDRESS=(PROTOCOL=TCP)(HOST=10.61.185.221)(PORT=1521))</span><br /><span class="ͼc">(CONNECT_DATA=(SERVICE_NAME=PRODCDB_DR)(UR=A)))"</span><br /><span class="ͼc"> LGWR ASYNC VALID_FOR=(ONLINE_LOGFILES,PRIMARY_ROLE)</span><br /><span class="ͼc"> DB_UNIQUE_NAME=PRODCDB_DR'</span><br />SCOPE<span class="ͼ8">=BOTH</span> SID<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2342" data-end="2380">This completely bypasses tnsnames.ora.</p>
<p data-start="2382" data-end="2411">No alias resolution required.</p>
<hr data-start="2413" data-end="2416" />
<h1 data-section-id="3v4wac" data-start="2418" data-end="2443">🎯 What I Recommend Now</h1>
<p data-start="2445" data-end="2500">Since this is RAC production and time is already spent:</p>
<p data-start="2502" data-end="2592">👉 Do NOT debug TNS further<br data-start="2529" data-end="2532" />👉 Replace LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_2 with full connect descriptor</p>
<p data-start="2594" data-end="2656">This is standard practice in enterprise RAC Data Guard setups.</p>
<p data-start="2658" data-end="2669">After that:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_STATE_2<span class="ͼ8">=</span>ENABLE;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM SWITCH LOGFILE;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2762" data-end="2790">Redo will start immediately.</p>
<hr data-start="2792" data-end="2795" />
<h1 data-section-id="1o6iqpe" data-start="2797" data-end="2809">🔥 Summary</h1>
<p data-start="2811" data-end="2966">| tnsping works | ✅ |<br />| DB transport works | ❌ |<br />| Cause | Different TNS resolution context |<br />| Clean Fix | Use full connect string in LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_2 |</p>
<hr data-start="2968" data-end="2971" />
<p data-start="2973" data-end="2992">If you want, paste:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">SHOW <span class="ͼ8">PARAMETER</span> log_archive_dest_2;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3041" data-end="3092" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">I&rsquo;ll rewrite exact safe production command for you.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="96549dbf-9652-4189-977c-aa81e9a70361" data-testid="conversation-turn-109" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">

<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">

<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="9">Good 👌</p>
<p data-start="11" data-end="69"><code data-start="11" data-end="38">SHOW PARAMETER tns_admin;</code>&nbsp;returned nothing &mdash; that means:</p>
<p data-start="71" data-end="162">👉 The database is&nbsp;<strong data-start="90" data-end="132">not using a custom TNS_ADMIN parameter</strong><br data-start="132" data-end="135" />👉 It will use the default:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">$ORACLE_HOME/network/admin</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="200" data-end="219">for TNS resolution.</p>
<hr data-start="221" data-end="224" />
<h1 data-section-id="1mh8a43" data-start="226" data-end="264">🎯 Then Why ORA-12154 Still Appears?</h1>
<p data-start="266" data-end="312">Because in RAC environments there are usually:</p>
<ul data-start="314" data-end="349">
<li data-section-id="15jrr0f" data-start="314" data-end="329">
<p data-start="316" data-end="329"><strong data-start="316" data-end="329">Grid Home</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1tv98wy" data-start="330" data-end="349">
<p data-start="332" data-end="349"><strong data-start="332" data-end="349">Database Home</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="351" data-end="448">Even if tnsping works from your shell, the&nbsp;<strong data-start="394" data-end="426">ARCn/LGWR background process</strong>&nbsp;may still be reading:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Different ORACLE_HOME<br />Different sqlnet.ora<br />Different tnsnames.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="525" data-end="544">And we already see:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">DEST_ID <span class="ͼb">2</span> STATUS <span class="ͼ8">=</span> ERROR<br />ORA<span class="ͼ8">-</span><span class="ͼb">12154</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="594" data-end="653">So the database process itself cannot resolve&nbsp;<code data-start="640" data-end="652">PRODCDB_DR</code>.</p>
<hr data-start="655" data-end="658" />
<h1 data-section-id="12w06zu" data-start="660" data-end="706">✅ Let&rsquo;s Confirm the Real TNS File Being Used</h1>
<p data-start="708" data-end="746">On PRIMARY node (as oracle user), run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">ps</span> <span class="ͼf">-ef</span> | <span class="ͼd">grep</span> pmon</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="780" data-end="808">You will see something like:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">oracle ... ora_pmon_PRODCDB1</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="849" data-end="876">Then check its ORACLE_HOME:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">echo</span> <span class="ͼe">$ORACLE_HOME</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="909" data-end="956">Then verify that this file contains PRODCDB_DR:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">cat</span> <span class="ͼe">$ORACLE_HOME</span>/network/admin/tnsnames.ora</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1015" data-end="1028">You must see:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">PRODCDB_DR =<br /> (DESCRIPTION =<br /> (ADDRESS = (PROTOCOL = TCP)(HOST = 10.61.185.221)(PORT = 1521))<br /> (CONNECT_DATA =<br /> (SERVICE_NAME = PRODCDB_DR)<br /> (UR = A)<br /> )<br /> )</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1216" data-end="1257">If not present there &rarr; that is the issue.</p>
<hr data-start="1259" data-end="1262" />
<h1 data-section-id="2zycv1" data-start="1264" data-end="1319">🚀 The Clean Enterprise Solution (No More TNS Issues)</h1>
<p data-start="1321" data-end="1385">Instead of depending on tnsnames alias, we bypass it completely.</p>
<p data-start="1387" data-end="1404">From PRIMARY run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_2<span class="ͼ8">=</span><br /><span class="ͼc">'SERVICE="(DESCRIPTION=(ADDRESS=(PROTOCOL=TCP)(HOST=10.61.185.221)(PORT=1521))</span><br /><span class="ͼc">(CONNECT_DATA=(SERVICE_NAME=PRODCDB_DR)(UR=A)))"</span><br /><span class="ͼc"> LGWR ASYNC</span><br /><span class="ͼc"> VALID_FOR=(ONLINE_LOGFILES,PRIMARY_ROLE)</span><br /><span class="ͼc"> DB_UNIQUE_NAME=PRODCDB_DR'</span><br />SCOPE<span class="ͼ8">=BOTH</span> SID<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1685" data-end="1690">Then:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_STATE_2<span class="ͼ8">=</span>ENABLE;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM SWITCH LOGFILE;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM SWITCH LOGFILE;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>

<hr data-start="1812" data-end="1815" />
<h1 data-section-id="w80yac" data-start="1817" data-end="1840">💥 Why This Is Better</h1>
<ul data-start="1842" data-end="1990">
<li data-section-id="on1c2w" data-start="1842" data-end="1873">
<p data-start="1844" data-end="1873">No dependency on tnsnames.ora</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="102vyym" data-start="1874" data-end="1902">
<p data-start="1876" data-end="1902">No dependency on TNS_ADMIN</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="wpla53" data-start="1903" data-end="1933">
<p data-start="1905" data-end="1933">No Grid vs DB Home confusion</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1oqwupb" data-start="1934" data-end="1959">
<p data-start="1936" data-end="1959">No ORA-12154 ever again</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="i7fg3a" data-start="1960" data-end="1990">
<p data-start="1962" data-end="1990">Enterprise RAC best practice</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1992" data-end="1995" />
<h1 data-section-id="1yd10vn" data-start="1997" data-end="2012">🔥 After That</h1>
<p data-start="2014" data-end="2038">Immediately check on DR:</p>

<p data-start="2178" data-end="2204">And your lag goes to zero.</p>
<hr data-start="2206" data-end="2209" />
<h1 data-section-id="le26k4" data-start="2211" data-end="2227">🎯 Bottom Line</h1>
<p data-start="2229" data-end="2318">You are NOT facing a redo issue.<br data-start="2261" data-end="2264" />You are facing a&nbsp;<strong data-start="2281" data-end="2317">RAC TNS resolution context issue</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="2320" data-end="2373">Bypassing alias is the fastest, safest, cleanest fix.</p>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="41fd1ac1-f54a-47d4-8474-5d6b7cd476a5" data-testid="conversation-turn-111" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="ed4863b1-ec0f-4e83-9b1f-e6aa1d5f8134" data-testid="conversation-turn-112" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="ed4863b1-ec0f-4e83-9b1f-e6aa1d5f8134" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-2">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="87">Good 👍 this output is useful &mdash; but this is&nbsp;<strong data-start="44" data-end="61">not the cause</strong>&nbsp;of your Data Guard issue.</p>
<p data-start="89" data-end="119">Let&rsquo;s separate things clearly.</p>
<hr data-start="121" data-end="124" />
<h1 data-section-id="1uu5mno" data-start="126" data-end="180">1️⃣ What&nbsp;<code data-start="137" data-end="153">local_listener</code>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<code data-start="158" data-end="175">remote_listener</code>&nbsp;Mean</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">local_listener <span class="ͼ8">=</span> (HOST<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">10.61.185.228</span>)<br />remote_listener <span class="ͼ8">=</span> erpproddb<span class="ͼ8">-</span>scan:<span class="ͼb">1521</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="271" data-end="315">This is&nbsp;<strong data-start="279" data-end="314">RAC listener configuration only</strong>.</p>
<ul data-start="317" data-end="415">
<li data-section-id="150b4wk" data-start="317" data-end="362">
<p data-start="319" data-end="362"><code data-start="319" data-end="335">local_listener</code>&nbsp;&rarr; node VIP (10.61.185.228)</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1ajqp9h" data-start="363" data-end="415">
<p data-start="365" data-end="415"><code data-start="365" data-end="382">remote_listener</code>&nbsp;&rarr; SCAN listener (erpproddb-scan)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="417" data-end="436">These are used for:</p>
<ul data-start="438" data-end="508">
<li data-section-id="itlfis" data-start="438" data-end="461">
<p data-start="440" data-end="461">Client load balancing</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="opk94g" data-start="462" data-end="485">
<p data-start="464" data-end="485">Instance registration</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="t143d0" data-start="486" data-end="508">
<p data-start="488" data-end="508">Service registration</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="510" data-end="562">They are&nbsp;<strong data-start="519" data-end="561">NOT used for Data Guard redo transport</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="564" data-end="567" />
<h1 data-section-id="1n4ko5s" data-start="569" data-end="610">2️⃣ Why Ping of SCAN is Irrelevant Here</h1>
<p data-start="612" data-end="623">You pinged:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">ping</span> erpproddb-scan<br />&rarr; <span class="ͼb">10</span>.61.185.223</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="674" data-end="712">That only proves DNS resolution works.</p>
<p data-start="714" data-end="740">It has nothing to do with:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_2</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="773" data-end="797">Your transport error is:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ORA<span class="ͼ8">-</span><span class="ͼb">12154</span>: could <span class="ͼ8">not</span> resolve <span class="ͼ8">connect</span> identifier PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="870" data-end="881">That means:</p>
<p data-start="883" data-end="1030">👉 Primary database cannot resolve the TNS alias<br data-start="931" data-end="934" />👉 It is NOT a listener problem<br data-start="965" data-end="968" />👉 It is NOT a SCAN problem<br data-start="995" data-end="998" />👉 It is NOT a network problem</p>
<p data-start="1032" data-end="1093">It is purely&nbsp;<strong data-start="1045" data-end="1093">TNS alias resolution inside database context</strong></p>
<hr data-start="1095" data-end="1098" />
<h1 data-section-id="glkjo1" data-start="1100" data-end="1151">3️⃣ Important Concept (Very Common RAC Confusion)</h1>
<p data-start="1153" data-end="1197">There are 3 different connection mechanisms:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="1199" data-end="1395">
<thead data-start="1199" data-end="1217">
<tr data-start="1199" data-end="1217">
<th class="" data-start="1199" data-end="1209" data-col-size="sm">Purpose</th>
<th class="" data-start="1209" data-end="1217" data-col-size="sm">Uses</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="1237" data-end="1395">
<tr data-start="1237" data-end="1287">
<td data-start="1237" data-end="1261" data-col-size="sm">RAC client connection</td>
<td data-start="1261" data-end="1287" data-col-size="sm">remote_listener (SCAN)</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1288" data-end="1330">
<td data-start="1288" data-end="1312" data-col-size="sm">Instance registration</td>
<td data-start="1312" data-end="1330" data-col-size="sm">local_listener</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1331" data-end="1395">
<td data-start="1331" data-end="1359" data-col-size="sm">Data Guard redo transport</td>
<td data-start="1359" data-end="1395" data-col-size="sm">LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_2 (SERVICE=...)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1397" data-end="1441">Data Guard does&nbsp;<strong data-start="1413" data-end="1420">NOT</strong>&nbsp;use remote_listener.</p>
<hr data-start="1443" data-end="1446" />
<h1 data-section-id="1sibfbh" data-start="1448" data-end="1482">4️⃣ Why You Still Have ORA-12154</h1>
<p data-start="1484" data-end="1498">Primary shows:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> dest_id, status, error<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archive_dest_status<br /><span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> dest_id<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">2</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1586" data-end="1616">&rarr; STATUS = ERROR<br data-start="1602" data-end="1605" />&rarr; ORA-12154</p>
<p data-start="1618" data-end="1629">That means:</p>
<p data-start="1631" data-end="1648">The alias inside:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_2<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'SERVICE=PRODCDB_DR ...'</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1706" data-end="1747">cannot be resolved by background process.</p>
<p data-start="1749" data-end="1757">Even if:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">tnsping PRODCDB_DR</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1791" data-end="1806">works manually.</p>
<p data-start="1808" data-end="1848">Because background process may be using:</p>
<ul data-start="1850" data-end="1934">
<li data-section-id="1ed0kaz" data-start="1850" data-end="1873">
<p data-start="1852" data-end="1873">Different ORACLE_HOME</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="m0r3ke" data-start="1874" data-end="1896">
<p data-start="1876" data-end="1896">Different sqlnet.ora</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1lj5gfv" data-start="1897" data-end="1912">
<p data-start="1899" data-end="1912">IFILE include</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1uplpyc" data-start="1913" data-end="1934">
<p data-start="1915" data-end="1934">Grid network config</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1936" data-end="1939" />
<h1 data-section-id="bxhknp" data-start="1941" data-end="1983">5️⃣ The Cleanest Fix (No More Debugging)</h1>
<p data-start="1985" data-end="2036">Instead of debugging TNS across RAC homes, do this:</p>
<p data-start="2038" data-end="2081">Replace alias with full connect descriptor.</p>
<p data-start="2083" data-end="2098">Run on PRIMARY:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_2<span class="ͼ8">=</span><br /><span class="ͼc">'SERVICE="(DESCRIPTION=</span><br /><span class="ͼc"> (ADDRESS=(PROTOCOL=TCP)(HOST=10.61.185.221)(PORT=1521))</span><br /><span class="ͼc"> (CONNECT_DATA=</span><br /><span class="ͼc"> (SERVICE_NAME=PRODCDB_DR)</span><br /><span class="ͼc"> (UR=A)</span><br /><span class="ͼc"> )</span><br /><span class="ͼc">)"</span><br /><span class="ͼc"> LGWR ASYNC</span><br /><span class="ͼc"> VALID_FOR=(ONLINE_LOGFILES,PRIMARY_ROLE)</span><br /><span class="ͼc"> DB_UNIQUE_NAME=PRODCDB_DR'</span><br />SCOPE<span class="ͼ8">=BOTH</span> SID<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'*'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2405" data-end="2410">Then:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> LOG_ARCHIVE_DEST_STATE_2<span class="ͼ8">=</span>ENABLE;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM SWITCH LOGFILE;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM SWITCH LOGFILE;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2532" data-end="2535" />
<h1 data-section-id="1s6uvc" data-start="2537" data-end="2579">6️⃣ Why This Is Enterprise Best Practice</h1>
<p data-start="2581" data-end="2599">In RAC production:</p>
<ul data-start="2601" data-end="2726">
<li data-section-id="1tvz59q" data-start="2601" data-end="2631">
<p data-start="2603" data-end="2631">Avoid dependency on tnsnames</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="uq6u7e" data-start="2632" data-end="2663">
<p data-start="2634" data-end="2663">Avoid dependency on TNS_ADMIN</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1q09f0t" data-start="2664" data-end="2696">
<p data-start="2666" data-end="2696">Avoid Grid vs DB home mismatch</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1931icw" data-start="2697" data-end="2726">
<p data-start="2699" data-end="2726">Avoid ORA-12154 permanently</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="2728" data-end="2787">Large enterprises always use full descriptor in Data Guard.</p>

<p data-start="3107" data-end="3127">Your problem is NOT:</p>
