<h1 data-section-id="vdgyrq" data-start="132" data-end="149">✅ Critical Line</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">

<p data-start="0" data-end="65">Perfect 👍 &mdash; this output is actually&nbsp;<strong data-start="37" data-end="50">good news</strong>, not an error.</p>

<hr data-start="94" data-end="97" />
<h2 data-section-id="9d1tg1" data-start="99" data-end="114">What You Ran</h2>
<p data-start="116" data-end="133">You connected to:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">sqlplus sys/sys123@PRODCDB_PROD as sysdba</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="186" data-end="256">That means you connected to the&nbsp;<strong data-start="218" data-end="238">PRIMARY database</strong>, not the standby.</p>
<p data-start="258" data-end="271">Then you ran:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">

<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">13079<br />13080<br />13081</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="561" data-end="572">That means:</p>
<ul data-start="574" data-end="692">
<li data-section-id="6gmqyq" data-start="574" data-end="596">
<p data-start="576" data-end="596">Primary is far ahead</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1un8dr" data-start="597" data-end="628">
<p data-start="599" data-end="628">Standby is catching up slowly</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1yqs6vp" data-start="629" data-end="663">
<p data-start="631" data-end="663">Huge archive gap existed earlier</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1j18myz" data-start="664" data-end="692">
<p data-start="666" data-end="692">Now it's replaying backlog</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="694" data-end="697" />
<h1 data-section-id="6d4cyx" data-start="699" data-end="727">📊 Let&rsquo;s Confirm Exact Gap</h1>
<p data-start="729" data-end="744">On PRIMARY run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, MAX(sequence#) <br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archived_log <br /><span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> thread#;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="829" data-end="844">On STANDBY run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, MAX(sequence#) <br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archived_log <br /><span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> applied<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'YES'</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> thread#;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="949" data-end="975">The difference = real gap.</p>
<hr data-start="977" data-end="980" />
<h1 data-section-id="1jpujm9" data-start="982" data-end="1005">🎯 Why Lag Is So High</h1>
<p data-start="1007" data-end="1021">Common causes:</p>
<ol data-start="1023" data-end="1147">
<li data-section-id="soberg" data-start="1023" data-end="1055">
<p data-start="1026" data-end="1055">Standby was down for 2&ndash;3 days</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="2elbhz" data-start="1056" data-end="1103">
<p data-start="1059" data-end="1103">Transport was broken (your ORA-12154 period)</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1lmjy2y" data-start="1104" data-end="1126">
<p data-start="1107" data-end="1126">Network was stopped</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1yshdlz" data-start="1127" data-end="1147">
<p data-start="1130" data-end="1147">Apply was stopped</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start="1149" data-end="1184">Now it's replaying all missed redo.</p>
<hr data-start="1186" data-end="1189" />
<h1 data-section-id="1ryn6en" data-start="1191" data-end="1213">⚡ Important Question</h1>
<p data-start="1215" data-end="1234">Is this acceptable?</p>
<p data-start="1236" data-end="1239">If:</p>
<ul data-start="1241" data-end="1302">
<li data-section-id="vs5jv1" data-start="1241" data-end="1263">
<p data-start="1243" data-end="1263">This is initial sync</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="ymyjlm" data-start="1264" data-end="1302">
<p data-start="1266" data-end="1302">Or standby was intentionally offline</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1304" data-end="1339">&rarr; This is normal catch-up behavior.</p>
<p data-start="1341" data-end="1344">If:</p>
<ul data-start="1346" data-end="1384">
<li data-section-id="11pd727" data-start="1346" data-end="1384">
<p data-start="1348" data-end="1384">Standby was supposed to be real-time</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1386" data-end="1427">&rarr; Then this is serious and must be fixed.</p>
<hr data-start="1429" data-end="1432" />
<h1 data-section-id="8pju0" data-start="1434" data-end="1477">🚀 How To Speed Up Catch-Up (Safe Method)</h1>
<p data-start="1479" data-end="1496">On STANDBY check:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">SHOW <span class="ͼ8">PARAMETER</span> parallel;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1535" data-end="1564">Then increase parallel apply:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE CANCEL;<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE<br /><span class="ͼ8">USING</span> <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span> LOGFILE<br /><span class="ͼ8">DISCONNECT</span> <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> <span class="ͼ8">SESSION</span><br />PARALLEL <span class="ͼb">8</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1741" data-end="1777">(Adjust parallel based on CPU cores)</p>
<p data-start="1779" data-end="1833">Since you are running RAC 19c, parallel apply is safe.</p>
<hr data-start="1835" data-end="1838" />
<h1 data-section-id="8ej6qf" data-start="1840" data-end="1874">🧠 Why Apply Lag &gt; Transport Lag</h1>
<p data-start="1876" data-end="1884">Because:</p>
<p data-start="1886" data-end="1973">Transport lag = redo not yet received<br data-start="1923" data-end="1926" />Apply lag = redo received but not yet applied</p>
<p data-start="1975" data-end="2011">Apply lag is always &ge; transport lag.</p>
<hr data-start="2013" data-end="2016" />
<h1 data-section-id="rnemrx" data-start="2018" data-end="2050">📌 What You Should Monitor Now</h1>
<p data-start="2052" data-end="2076">Run every 10&ndash;15 minutes:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> name, <span class="ͼ8">value</span> <br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$dataguard_stats <br /><span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> name <span class="ͼ8">LIKE</span> <span class="ͼc">'%lag%'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2159" data-end="2189">Lag should decrease gradually.</p>
<hr data-start="2191" data-end="2194" />

<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">

<p data-start="0" data-end="40">Perfect 👍 now we have the real numbers.</p>
<p data-start="42" data-end="82">Let&rsquo;s calculate the&nbsp;<strong data-start="62" data-end="81">actual redo gap</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="84" data-end="87" />
<h1 data-section-id="agojct" data-start="89" data-end="115">📊 Current Redo Position</h1>
<h2 data-section-id="116gsg1" data-start="117" data-end="130">🔵 PRIMARY</h2>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">

<hr data-start="221" data-end="224" />
<h2 data-section-id="hzytjd" data-start="226" data-end="249">🟢 STANDBY (Applied)</h2>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="251" data-end="329">

<h1 data-section-id="4upp3q" data-start="336" data-end="361">🚨 Real Gap Calculation</h1>

<p data-start="481" data-end="503">So standby is roughly:</p>
<p data-start="505" data-end="567">👉 250&ndash;300 archive logs behind<br data-start="535" data-end="538" />👉 NOT 3 days in real terms</p>
<p data-start="569" data-end="662">The lag value showing 2&ndash;3 days is a&nbsp;<strong data-start="605" data-end="631">time-based calculation</strong>, not actual unrecoverable gap.</p>
<hr data-start="664" data-end="667" />
<h1 data-section-id="1q9z3i9" data-start="669" data-end="712">🧠 Why v$dataguard_stats Shows 3 Days Lag</h1>
<p data-start="714" data-end="751"><code data-start="714" data-end="729">transport lag</code>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<code data-start="734" data-end="745">apply lag</code>&nbsp;show:</p>
<blockquote data-start="753" data-end="806">
<p data-start="755" data-end="806">Time difference between primary SCN and standby SCN</p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="808" data-end="811">If:</p>
<ul data-start="813" data-end="891">
<li data-section-id="5z6838" data-start="813" data-end="840">
<p data-start="815" data-end="840">Redo generation was heavy</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1xs7qgk" data-start="841" data-end="868">
<p data-start="843" data-end="868">Apply was stopped earlier</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="quuaio" data-start="869" data-end="891">
<p data-start="871" data-end="891">Large batch jobs ran</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="893" data-end="964">Then lag time appears very high even though sequence gap is manageable.</p>
<p data-start="966" data-end="1007">Your gap is actually small and catchable.</p>
<hr data-start="1009" data-end="1012" />
<h1 data-section-id="1abkoeq" data-start="1014" data-end="1028">🔥 Good News</h1>

<p data-start="1047" data-end="1073">284 logs behind (Thread 1)</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="swouzd" data-start="1074" data-end="1102">
<p data-start="1076" data-end="1102">250 logs behind (Thread 2)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1104" data-end="1188">In a RAC system, that is completely recoverable within hours depending on redo size.</p>

<h1 data-section-id="1jp6b1k" data-start="1627" data-end="1662">🎯 When Will You Be Fully Synced?</h1>
<p data-start="1664" data-end="1667">If:</p>

</li>
<li data-section-id="1tnr3vu" data-start="1698" data-end="1723">

</li>

<p data-start="1753" data-end="1758">Then:</p>
<p data-start="1760" data-end="1812">⏱ Estimated catch-up: 30&ndash;60 minutes (rough estimate)</p>

<p data-start="145" data-end="156">That means:</p>
<p data-start="158" data-end="318">👉 Standby is only&nbsp;<strong data-start="177" data-end="213">~1 hour 4 minutes behind primary</strong><br data-start="213" data-end="216" />👉 Transport and apply lag are equal<br data-start="252" data-end="255" />👉 No gap condition<br data-start="274" data-end="277" />👉 Just low redo generation on one thread</p>
<hr data-start="320" data-end="323" />
<h1 data-section-id="13nmmgy" data-start="325" data-end="375">🔎 Why 1 Hour Lag When Everything Looked Synced?</h1>
<p data-start="377" data-end="403">From your previous output:</p>
<ul data-start="405" data-end="481">
<li data-section-id="6ywyqe" data-start="405" data-end="438">
<p data-start="407" data-end="438">Thread 1 was fully synchronized</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="fl7osx" data-start="439" data-end="466">
<p data-start="441" data-end="466">MRP was in&nbsp;<code data-start="452" data-end="466">WAIT_FOR_LOG</code></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="boy87i" data-start="467" data-end="481">
<p data-start="469" data-end="481">RFS was IDLE</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="483" data-end="494">That means:</p>
<p data-start="496" data-end="535">Standby applied everything it received.</p>
<p data-start="537" data-end="551">So why 1 hour?</p>
<p data-start="553" data-end="561">Because:</p>
<p data-start="563" data-end="662"><code data-start="563" data-end="582">v$dataguard_stats</code>&nbsp;lag is calculated using SCN timestamp comparison, not pure sequence comparison.</p>
<p data-start="664" data-end="667">If:</p>
<ul data-start="669" data-end="764">
<li data-section-id="ux9b5w" data-start="669" data-end="708">
<p data-start="671" data-end="708">Primary did not switch log for 1 hour</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="llf8eu" data-start="709" data-end="737">
<p data-start="711" data-end="737">Or thread 2 is less active</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="bffr7f" data-start="738" data-end="764">
<p data-start="740" data-end="764">Or no new redo generated</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="766" data-end="859">Then standby appears &ldquo;1 hour behind&rdquo; even though it is fully caught up to last archived redo.</p>
<p data-start="861" data-end="887">This is completely normal.</p>
<hr data-start="889" data-end="892" />
<h1 data-section-id="wuq9dq" data-start="894" data-end="916">🧠 Important Concept</h1>
<p data-start="918" data-end="931">If MRP shows:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">WAIT_FOR_LOG</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="955" data-end="958">and</p>
<p data-start="960" data-end="974">RFS shows IDLE</p>
<p data-start="976" data-end="981">Then:</p>
<p data-start="983" data-end="1070">✔ Standby is caught up<br data-start="1005" data-end="1008" />✔ No real backlog<br data-start="1025" data-end="1028" />✔ Lag is just time difference of last redo</p>
<hr data-start="1072" data-end="1075" />
<h1 data-section-id="1k2sqwl" data-start="1077" data-end="1098">🚀 Quick Validation</h1>
<p data-start="1100" data-end="1138">To confirm true sync level, run on DR:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, MAX(sequence#)<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archived_log<br /><span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> applied<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'YES'</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> thread#;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1241" data-end="1284">Then compare with primary current sequence.</p>
<p data-start="1286" data-end="1318">If equal &rarr; you are synchronized.</p>
<hr data-start="1320" data-end="1323" />
<h1 data-section-id="1acegbb" data-start="1325" data-end="1352">📌 When Should You Worry?</h1>
<p data-start="1354" data-end="1379">You should worry only if:</p>
<ul data-start="1381" data-end="1539">
<li data-section-id="t3lcza" data-start="1381" data-end="1439">
<p data-start="1383" data-end="1439">APPLYING_LOG continues but sequence gap keeps increasing</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1x6ar9q" data-start="1440" data-end="1478">
<p data-start="1442" data-end="1478">transport lag increases continuously</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1dmp2vo" data-start="1479" data-end="1500">
<p data-start="1481" data-end="1500">dest_id shows ERROR</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1dqsa1k" data-start="1501" data-end="1539">
<p data-start="1503" data-end="1539">RFS stuck in RECEIVING for long time</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1541" data-end="1564">You have none of these.</p>
<hr data-start="1566" data-end="1569" />
<h1 data-section-id="gzpasz" data-start="1571" data-end="1599">🎯 Final Health Assessment</h1>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="1601" data-end="1773">

</tr>

<td data-start="1671" data-end="1682" data-col-size="sm">Healthy</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1683" data-end="1705">
<td data-start="1683" data-end="1689" data-col-size="sm">MRP</td>
<td data-start="1689" data-end="1705" data-col-size="sm">WAIT_FOR_LOG</td>
</tr>

</tr>
<tr data-start="1721" data-end="1757">

</tr>
<tr data-start="1758" data-end="1773">
<td data-start="1758" data-end="1765" data-col-size="sm">Risk</td>
<td data-start="1765" data-end="1773" data-col-size="sm">Zero</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1775" data-end="1778" />
<p data-start="1780" data-end="1831">Your Data Guard is now stable and production-ready.</p>
<p data-start="1833" data-end="1865">If you want, I can now give you:</p>
<ul data-start="1867" data-end="2039">
<li data-section-id="m9m80n" data-start="1867" data-end="1914">

</li>
<li data-section-id="xsvri2" data-start="1915" data-end="1956">

</li>

</li>
<li data-section-id="1su0vtn" data-start="1993" data-end="2039">

</li>

<p data-start="2041" data-end="2075" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Tell me what you want to finalize.</p>
</div>

<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">

<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="42">Here is a professional reply you can send:</p>
<div class="group relative my-4 w-full overflow-visible">
<div id="writing-block-997fc757-3f01-478f-94c9-12e44b346801" class="relative w-full overflow-clip rounded-[24px] bg-token-bg-primary dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] shadow-[0px_4px_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]" data-writing-block="true" data-testid="writing-block-container">

<div class="text-token-text-tertiary flex max-w-[75%] min-w-0 grow cursor-default items-center self-center text-sm font-medium">
<div class="truncate">Email</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="font-medium">Subject</div>
<div class="grid">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
<hr class="border-token-border-light! border-t-0.5 mx-4 my-0! border-t! md:mx-5" />
<div class="writing-block-editor markdown-new-styling relative flow-root pt-(--writing-block-editor-pt) pe-(--writing-block-editor-pr) pb-(--writing-block-editor-pb) ps-(--writing-block-editor-pl)">
<div class="ProseMirror markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full min-h-6 break-words focus:outline-none" dir="auto" contenteditable="true" translate="no">
<p>Hi Varun,</p>
<p>Greetings.</p>
<p>Please find the current DR synchronization status for&nbsp;<strong>ERP PROD Database</strong>:</p>
<p><strong>DR Sync Status:</strong><br />The standby database is synchronized and in healthy state. Managed Recovery Process (MRP) is running and waiting for new redo (WAIT_FOR_LOG), which indicates no backlog.</p>
<p><strong>Last Applied Archive Log Sequence on DR:</strong></p>
<ul data-spread="false">
<li>
<p>Thread 1: 13316</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Thread 2: 11149</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>These can be matched with the current archive sequence on Production for validation.</p>
<p>Current transport and apply lag is approximately&nbsp;<strong>1 hour</strong>, which is within expected limits and not indicative of any transport or apply issue. The standby is fully caught up to the last generated redo.</p>
<p>We will proceed with DR application configuration upon your confirmation.</p>
<div contenteditable="false"><hr /></div>
<p>Regarding&nbsp;<strong>INFRADB PROD Database</strong>:</p>
<p>As discussed, this is a single-node (Non-RAC) database. We will initiate DR setup similar to ERP DB architecture (Primary&ndash;Standby configuration using Data Guard). Kindly confirm:</p>
<ul data-spread="false">
<li>
<p>Database size</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Current backup availability</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Preferred DR creation approach (Active Duplicate / Backup-based)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Application DR expectations</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>Once confirmed, we will prepare the implementation plan and timelines.</p>
<p>Please let us know if any further validation is required from our side.</p>
<p>Thanks and Regards,<br />Alok Chaudhary<br />PRR Technologies</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 z-2 rounded-[24px] shadow-[inset_0px_0px_0px_1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.07)]">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1465" data-end="1573" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">If you want, I can also prepare a structured DR implementation plan for INFRADB to attach in the same email.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="5f5e1a38-57d2-4462-af6d-15533ce4f48a" data-testid="conversation-turn-130" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="7e470b19-248f-4a5e-b0e8-85214d5b34d2" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-3">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="291">You are in a&nbsp;<strong data-start="13" data-end="45">common RAC recovery scenario</strong>: one node (<code data-start="57" data-end="72">erpproddb2-dr</code>) is down and you plan to rebuild it and rejoin the cluster. The safest approach is usually to&nbsp;<strong data-start="167" data-end="201">reuse the same hostname and IP</strong>, but there are some checks. I&rsquo;ll explain the recommendation and the full process clearly.</p>
<hr data-start="293" data-end="296" />
<h1 data-section-id="19zcbe8" data-start="298" data-end="347">1️⃣ Should You Use the Same IP (10.61.185.222)?</h1>
<p data-start="349" data-end="407"><strong data-start="349" data-end="365">Recommended:</strong>&nbsp;✅&nbsp;<strong data-start="368" data-end="407">Yes, reuse the same IP and hostname</strong></p>
<p data-start="409" data-end="414">Keep:</p>
<ul data-start="416" data-end="499">
<li data-section-id="171mp90" data-start="416" data-end="443">
<p data-start="418" data-end="443">Hostname:&nbsp;<code data-start="428" data-end="443">erpproddb2-dr</code></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="11he4z0" data-start="444" data-end="472">
<p data-start="446" data-end="472">Public IP:&nbsp;<code data-start="457" data-end="472">10.61.185.222</code></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="ycmqhp" data-start="473" data-end="499">
<p data-start="475" data-end="499">VIP:&nbsp;<code data-start="480" data-end="499">erpproddb2-dr.vip</code></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 data-section-id="1jx03ip" data-start="501" data-end="527">Why reuse the same IP?</h3>
<p data-start="528" data-end="570">Oracle RAC configuration already contains:</p>
<ul data-start="572" data-end="627">
<li data-section-id="fsvprj" data-start="572" data-end="583">
<p data-start="574" data-end="583">node name</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1o4wp3" data-start="584" data-end="589">
<p data-start="586" data-end="589">VIP</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="q0271i" data-start="590" data-end="613">
<p data-start="592" data-end="613">network configuration</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="17axpic" data-start="614" data-end="627">
<p data-start="616" data-end="627">OCR entries</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="629" data-end="696">Changing the IP would require modifying multiple cluster resources.</p>
<p data-start="698" data-end="725">Your cluster already shows:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ora.erpproddb2-dr.vip FAILED OVER</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="771" data-end="823">So the cluster still&nbsp;<strong data-start="792" data-end="822">expects node2 with that IP</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="825" data-end="862">If you change the IP you must modify:</p>
<ul data-start="864" data-end="949">
<li data-section-id="14hyq8e" data-start="864" data-end="886">
<p data-start="866" data-end="886"><code data-start="866" data-end="874">srvctl</code>&nbsp;node config</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="ss0jql" data-start="887" data-end="901">
<p data-start="889" data-end="901">VIP resource</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="10aqzng" data-start="902" data-end="918">
<p data-start="904" data-end="918">network config</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="a5kzzt" data-start="919" data-end="936">
<p data-start="921" data-end="936">SCAN resolution</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="z1mn2h" data-start="937" data-end="949">
<p data-start="939" data-end="949">/etc/hosts</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="951" data-end="982">This is unnecessary complexity.</p>
<p data-start="984" data-end="1053">✔&nbsp;<strong data-start="986" data-end="1004">Best practice:</strong>&nbsp;rebuild node with&nbsp;<strong data-start="1023" data-end="1052">same hostname and same IP</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="1055" data-end="1058" />
<h1 data-section-id="1bqmici" data-start="1060" data-end="1103">2️⃣ What Must Be Cleaned Before Rejoining</h1>
<p data-start="1105" data-end="1164">Since you will reinstall the OS, ensure the new server has:</p>
<ul data-start="1166" data-end="1286">
<li data-section-id="fbo14e" data-start="1166" data-end="1198">
<p data-start="1168" data-end="1198">Same hostname:&nbsp;<code data-start="1183" data-end="1198">erpproddb2-dr</code></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="4afb4n" data-start="1199" data-end="1225">
<p data-start="1201" data-end="1225">Same IP:&nbsp;<code data-start="1210" data-end="1225">10.61.185.222</code></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="u689m" data-start="1226" data-end="1251">
<p data-start="1228" data-end="1251">Same subnet and gateway</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="18cn4at" data-start="1252" data-end="1286">
<p data-start="1254" data-end="1286">Same DNS or&nbsp;<code data-start="1266" data-end="1278">/etc/hosts</code>&nbsp;entries</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1288" data-end="1300">Also ensure:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">erpproddb1-dr<br />erpproddb2-dr<br />erpproddb1-dr-vip<br />erpproddb2-dr-vip<br />scan addresses</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1390" data-end="1405">are consistent.</p>
<hr data-start="1407" data-end="1410" />
<h1 data-section-id="1ior2c" data-start="1412" data-end="1445">3️⃣ High-Level Recovery Process</h1>
<p data-start="1447" data-end="1476">Steps to re-add the RAC node.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="u73z70" data-start="1478" data-end="1501">Step 1 &mdash; Install OS</h3>
<p data-start="1502" data-end="1536">Install&nbsp;<strong data-start="1510" data-end="1530">Oracle Linux 7.9</strong>&nbsp;with:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">oracle-database-preinstall-19c</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1578" data-end="1588">Configure:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">hostnamectl set-hostname erpproddb2-dr</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1638" data-end="1656">Configure network:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Public IP : 10.61.185.222<br />VIP : erpproddb2-dr-vip<br />Private : RAC interconnect</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1752" data-end="1755" />
<h1 data-section-id="146onpj" data-start="1757" data-end="1790">4️⃣ Configure SSH Between Nodes</h1>
<p data-start="1792" data-end="1803">From node1:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ssh-keygen<br />ssh-copy-id erpproddb2-dr</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1851" data-end="1856">Test:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ssh erpproddb2-dr date</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1890" data-end="1893" />
<h1 data-section-id="1oxkfoe" data-start="1895" data-end="1926">5️⃣ Install Required Packages</h1>
<p data-start="1928" data-end="1959">Install same packages as node1.</p>
<p data-start="1961" data-end="1969">Example:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">yum install oracle-database-preinstall-19c -y<br />yum install iscsi-initiator-utils -y</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2063" data-end="2066" />
<h1 data-section-id="1jilhjh" data-start="2068" data-end="2094">6️⃣ Attach iSCSI Storage</h1>
<p data-start="2096" data-end="2148">If ASM disks are via&nbsp;<strong data-start="2117" data-end="2126">iSCSI</strong>, perform these steps.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="1nk4s1l" data-start="2150" data-end="2174">Enable iSCSI service</h3>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">systemctl enable iscsid<br />systemctl start iscsid</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<h3 data-section-id="c2kihj" data-start="2232" data-end="2252">Discover targets</h3>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">iscsiadm -m discovery -t sendtargets -p &lt;iscsi-ip&gt;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2314" data-end="2322">Example:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">iscsiadm -m discovery -t sendtargets -p 10.61.185.100</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<h3 data-section-id="296yj3" data-start="2387" data-end="2406">Login to target</h3>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">iscsiadm -m node -l</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2437" data-end="2450">Verify disks:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">

<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">

<h1 data-section-id="15ggs3b" data-start="3756" data-end="3800">🔎 One More Important Thing in Your Output</h1>
<p data-start="3802" data-end="3832">Your database currently shows:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ora.prodcdb_dr.db INTERMEDIATE<br />Dismounted,Mount Initiated</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3902" data-end="3964">That means standby DB is running but&nbsp;<strong data-start="3939" data-end="3963">instance2 is missing</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="3966" data-end="3983">After node2 join:</p>
<p data-start="3985" data-end="4024">RAC standby will run&nbsp;<strong data-start="4006" data-end="4023">two instances</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="4026" data-end="4029" />

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="ef0d1846-4b1c-482e-a74a-a2fb73960e25" data-testid="conversation-turn-132" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="bb954794-0673-4d23-994f-985c4f5acba6" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-3">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="294">After the reboot your&nbsp;<strong data-start="22" data-end="65">Oracle High Availability Services (HAS)</strong>&nbsp;is now started, but&nbsp;<strong data-start="86" data-end="180">Cluster Ready Services (CRS) resources including ASM and the database are not yet fully up</strong>. You should&nbsp;<strong data-start="193" data-end="263">bring up the Grid stack first, then ASM, then the standby database</strong>&nbsp;so Data Guard sync can resume.</p>
<p data-start="296" data-end="328">Follow the steps below in order.</p>
<hr data-start="330" data-end="333" />
<h1 data-section-id="1d4xsx9" data-start="335" data-end="367">1️⃣ Check Cluster Stack Status</h1>
<p data-start="368" data-end="399">First confirm CRS stack status.</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">/oracle/app/grid/19.3.0/gridhome_1/bin/crsctl check cluster <span class="ͼf">-all</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="479" data-end="481">or</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">/oracle/app/grid/19.3.0/gridhome_1/bin/crsctl stat res <span class="ͼf">-t</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="554" data-end="595">If CRS is still not fully up, check OHAS:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">/oracle/app/grid/19.3.0/gridhome_1/bin/crsctl check has</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="666" data-end="675">Expected:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">CRS-4638: Oracle High Availability Services is online</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="740" data-end="743" />
<h1 data-section-id="1aaxde7" data-start="745" data-end="775">2️⃣ Start Full Cluster Stack</h1>
<p data-start="776" data-end="851">Sometimes after reboot only&nbsp;<strong data-start="804" data-end="850">OHAS starts but not the full cluster stack</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="853" data-end="857">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">/oracle/app/grid/19.3.0/gridhome_1/bin/crsctl <span class="ͼd">start</span> cluster</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="932" data-end="949">Then check again:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">/oracle/app/grid/19.3.0/gridhome_1/bin/crsctl stat res <span class="ͼf">-t</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1022" data-end="1052">You should see resources like:</p>
<ul data-start="1054" data-end="1124">
<li data-section-id="1o4frr" data-start="1054" data-end="1059">
<p data-start="1056" data-end="1059">ASM</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1de0192" data-start="1060" data-end="1070">

<p data-start="1073" data-end="1080">DATA.dg</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1mjljn7" data-start="1081" data-end="1093">

</li>
<li data-section-id="o470xk" data-start="1094" data-end="1104">
<p data-start="1096" data-end="1104">SCAN VIP</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1cebwjr" data-start="1105" data-end="1124">

</li>

<p data-start="1126" data-end="1144">coming&nbsp;<strong data-start="1133" data-end="1143">ONLINE</strong>.</p>

</div>

<p data-start="1314" data-end="1332">Check disk groups:</p>

<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<h1 data-section-id="125ltn8" data-start="1611" data-end="1643">5️⃣ Start the Standby Database</h1>
<p data-start="1644" data-end="1675">If the database is not running:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>

<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">srvctl <span class="ͼd">start</span> database <span class="ͼf">-d</span> prodcdb_dr</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1726" data-end="1753">Or start instance manually:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">srvctl <span class="ͼd">start</span> instance <span class="ͼf">-d</span> prodcdb_dr <span class="ͼf">-i</span> prodcdb_dr1</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1819" data-end="1822" />
<h1 data-section-id="wqbnlk" data-start="1824" data-end="1856">6️⃣ Verify Database is Mounted</h1>

<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1978" data-end="1999">Expected for standby:</p>

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

<hr data-start="2073" data-end="2076" />
<h1 data-section-id="my82bf" data-start="2078" data-end="2125">7️⃣ Start Managed Recovery (Data Guard Apply)</h1>
<p data-start="2126" data-end="2155">If redo apply is not running:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">USING</span> <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span> LOGFILE <span class="ͼ8">DISCONNECT</span> <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> <span class="ͼ8">SESSION</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2264" data-end="2267" />
<h1 data-section-id="b2wr2v" data-start="2269" data-end="2297">8️⃣ Verify Data Guard Sync</h1>
<p data-start="2298" data-end="2302">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> process,status,thread#,sequence#<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$managed_standby;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2380" data-end="2395">You should see:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 APPLYING_LOG<br />RFS RECEIVING</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>

</div>
<hr data-start="2439" data-end="2442" />
<h1 data-section-id="fqy2fz" data-start="2444" data-end="2459">9️⃣ Check Lag</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> name,<span class="ͼ8">value</span> <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$dataguard_stats <span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> name <span class="ͼ8">LIKE</span> <span class="ͼc">'%lag%'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2538" data-end="2578">Lag should start&nbsp;<strong data-start="2555" data-end="2577">reducing to near 0</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="2580" data-end="2583" />
<h1 data-section-id="168dbjn" data-start="2585" data-end="2625">🔎 If&nbsp;<code data-start="2593" data-end="2613">crsctl stat res -t</code>&nbsp;Still Fails</h1>
<p data-start="2626" data-end="2646">Run this diagnostic:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">crsctl check crs</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2678" data-end="2697">If CRS not running:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">crsctl <span class="ͼd">start</span> crs</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2729" data-end="2732" />
<h1 data-section-id="w3nxfx" data-start="2734" data-end="2759">✅ Quick Command Summary</h1>
<p data-start="2761" data-end="2779">Run in this order:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">crsctl <span class="ͼd">start</span> cluster<br />crsctl stat res <span class="ͼf">-t</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2834" data-end="2839">Then:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>

<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">su</span> <span class="ͼf">-</span> oracle<br />srvctl <span class="ͼd">start</span> database <span class="ͼf">-d</span> prodcdb_dr</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2902" data-end="2911">Then SQL:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">USING</span> <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span> LOGFILE <span class="ͼ8">DISCONNECT</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="3007" data-end="3010" />
<p data-start="3012" data-end="3065">💡&nbsp;<strong data-start="3015" data-end="3065">Important observation from your earlier output</strong></p>

<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
<p data-start="3186" data-end="3253">After restart it may&nbsp;<strong data-start="3207" data-end="3225">not auto start</strong>, so manual start is normal.</p>
<hr data-start="3255" data-end="3258" />
<p data-start="3260" data-end="3469" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">✅ If you want, I can also show&nbsp;<strong data-start="3291" data-end="3380">3 quick checks to ensure Data Guard transport from Primary to DR is working correctly</strong>, which helps confirm&nbsp;<strong data-start="3402" data-end="3469" data-is-last-node="">DR sync is fully healthy before informing the application team.</strong></p>
</div>

<p data-start="168" data-end="179">This means:</p>
<ul data-start="181" data-end="342">

<p data-start="183" data-end="212">Grid Infrastructure ✅ running</p>

<p data-start="303" data-end="342"><strong data-start="303" data-end="342">Redo Apply (MRP) is not running yet</strong></p>

<p data-start="344" data-end="431">For&nbsp;<strong data-start="348" data-end="367">Data Guard sync</strong>, you now only need to&nbsp;<strong data-start="390" data-end="430">start Managed Recovery Process (MRP)</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="433" data-end="436" />
<h1 data-section-id="79sjtd" data-start="438" data-end="469">1️⃣ Login to Standby Database</h1>
<p data-start="470" data-end="492">Switch to oracle user:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="519" data-end="525">Login:</p>

<h1 data-section-id="6radsc" data-start="565" data-end="592">2️⃣ Verify Standby Status</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> name,open_mode,database_role <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$database;</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="659" data-end="668">Expected:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
