<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">OPEN_MODE DATABASE_ROLE<br />MOUNTED PHYSICAL STANDBY</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="742" data-end="813">Your CRS output already confirms&nbsp;<strong data-start="775" data-end="795">Mounted (Closed)</strong>&nbsp;which is correct.</p>
<hr data-start="815" data-end="818" />
<h1 data-section-id="oht5jy" data-start="820" data-end="855">3️⃣ Start Data Guard Apply (SYNC)</h1>
<p data-start="857" data-end="874">Run this command:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">USING</span> <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span> LOGFILE <span class="ͼ8">DISCONNECT</span> <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> <span class="ͼ8">SESSION</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="983" data-end="1024">This will start&nbsp;<strong data-start="999" data-end="1023">real-time redo apply</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="1026" data-end="1029" />
<h1 data-section-id="1ua1r5y" data-start="1031" data-end="1062">4️⃣ Verify Redo Apply Running</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> process,status,thread#,sequence#<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$managed_standby;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1140" data-end="1171">Expected output should include:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 APPLYING_LOG<br />RFS RECEIVING</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1215" data-end="1218" />
<h1 data-section-id="1u6bx4j" data-start="1220" data-end="1254">5️⃣ Verify Transport &amp; Apply Lag</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> name,<span class="ͼ8">value</span> <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$dataguard_stats<br /><span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> name <span class="ͼ8">LIKE</span> <span class="ͼc">'%lag%'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1334" data-end="1357">Example healthy result:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">

<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">transport lag +00 00:00:05<br />apply lag +00 00:00:02</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1426" data-end="1469">Lag will gradually&nbsp;<strong data-start="1445" data-end="1468">reduce to near zero</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="1471" data-end="1474" />
<h1 data-section-id="1sc3940" data-start="1476" data-end="1509">6️⃣ Check Archive Sequence Sync</h1>
<p data-start="1511" data-end="1535">Run on&nbsp;<strong data-start="1518" data-end="1534">Primary (DC)</strong>:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">archive log list;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1567" data-end="1581">Run on&nbsp;<strong data-start="1574" data-end="1580">DR</strong>:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, MAX(sequence#) <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archived_log <span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> thread#;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1664" data-end="1703">Sequences should&nbsp;<strong data-start="1681" data-end="1702">start catching up</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="1705" data-end="1708" />
<h1 data-section-id="syhfdd" data-start="1710" data-end="1746">7️⃣ About This Line in Your Output</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ora.erpproddb2-dr.vip<br />ONLINE INTERMEDIATE FAILED OVER</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<p data-start="1811" data-end="1870">This is&nbsp;<strong data-start="1819" data-end="1829">normal</strong>&nbsp;because node2 (<code data-start="1845" data-end="1860">erpproddb2-dr</code>) is down.</p>
<p data-start="1872" data-end="1961">The VIP is&nbsp;<strong data-start="1883" data-end="1907">failed over to node1</strong>, which is expected until you rebuild the second node.</p>
<hr data-start="1963" data-end="1966" />

<h1 data-section-id="16vuvqf" data-start="2207" data-end="2241">⚡ Quick Command (Most Important)</h1>
<p data-start="2243" data-end="2252">Just run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">USING</span> <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span> LOGFILE <span class="ͼ8">DISCONNECT</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2348" data-end="2376">and&nbsp;<strong data-start="2352" data-end="2375">DR sync will resume</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="2378" data-end="2381" />
<p data-start="2383" data-end="2467">✅ After this, you can safely reply to the application team about&nbsp;<strong data-start="2448" data-end="2466">DR sync status</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="2469" data-end="2472" />
<p data-start="2474" data-end="2641" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">If you want, I can also show you a&nbsp;<strong data-start="2509" data-end="2578">very useful 3-command health check for Oracle RAC + Data Guard DR</strong>, which DBAs use before declaring&nbsp;<strong data-start="2612" data-end="2640">DR ready for application</strong>.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>

<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">

<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="118">Your standby database is&nbsp;<strong data-start="25" data-end="46">mounted correctly</strong>, but from the output we can see that&nbsp;<strong data-start="84" data-end="117">redo apply is NOT running yet</strong>.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="1l26sq0" data-start="120" data-end="150">What your output indicates</h3>
<p data-start="152" data-end="157">From:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> process,status,thread#,sequence# <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$managed_standby;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="235" data-end="248">You only see:</p>
<ul data-start="250" data-end="346">
<li data-section-id="13p0e6q" data-start="250" data-end="284">
<p data-start="252" data-end="284"><code data-start="252" data-end="257">RFS</code>&nbsp;processes &rarr; Receiving redo</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="118fkr6" data-start="285" data-end="322">
<p data-start="287" data-end="322"><code data-start="287" data-end="293">ARCH</code>&nbsp;processes &rarr; Archive handling</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1xiw6kd" data-start="323" data-end="346">
<p data-start="325" data-end="346"><strong data-start="325" data-end="346">No&nbsp;<code data-start="330" data-end="336">MRP0</code>&nbsp;process</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="348" data-end="356">Example:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">RFS IDLE 1 14859<br />RFS IDLE 2 12380</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="401" data-end="412">This means:</p>
<ul data-start="414" data-end="568">
<li data-section-id="9tj2v6" data-start="414" data-end="448">
<p data-start="416" data-end="448">Standby is&nbsp;<strong data-start="427" data-end="448">mounted correctly</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="x0n7zv" data-start="449" data-end="481">
<p data-start="451" data-end="481">Redo transport may be arriving</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="qjlzhf" data-start="482" data-end="568">
<p data-start="484" data-end="568"><strong data-start="484" data-end="533">Managed Recovery Process (MRP) is not started</strong>, so logs are&nbsp;<strong data-start="547" data-end="568">not being applied</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="570" data-end="573" />
<h1 data-section-id="38btle" data-start="575" data-end="616">Start Data Guard Apply (Important Step)</h1>
<p data-start="618" data-end="644">Run the following command:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">USING</span> <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span> LOGFILE <span class="ͼ8">DISCONNECT</span> <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> <span class="ͼ8">SESSION</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="753" data-end="794">This will start&nbsp;<strong data-start="769" data-end="793">real-time redo apply</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="796" data-end="799" />
<h1 data-section-id="nhp5fa" data-start="801" data-end="833">Verify After Starting Recovery</h1>
<p data-start="835" data-end="845">Run again:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> process,status,thread#,sequence#<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$managed_standby;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="923" data-end="957">Now you should see something like:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">PROCESS STATUS THREAD# SEQUENCE#<br />------ ------------- ------- --------<br />MRP0 APPLYING_LOG 1 14859<br />RFS RECEIVING 1 14860<br />RFS RECEIVING 2 12381</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1158" data-end="1180">The important line is:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 APPLYING_LOG</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1209" data-end="1253">This confirms&nbsp;<strong data-start="1223" data-end="1252">Data Guard sync is active</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="1255" data-end="1258" />
<h1 data-section-id="wlj9i3" data-start="1260" data-end="1279">Check DR Sync Lag</h1>
<p data-start="1281" data-end="1285">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> name,<span class="ͼ8">value</span> <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$dataguard_stats<br /><span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> name <span class="ͼ8">LIKE</span> <span class="ͼc">'%lag%'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1365" data-end="1373">Example:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">transport lag +00 00:01:10<br />apply lag +00 00:00:40</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1442" data-end="1484">Lag will start&nbsp;<strong data-start="1457" data-end="1483">reducing automatically</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="1486" data-end="1489" />
<h1 data-section-id="1wxuanh" data-start="1491" data-end="1525">Quick Health Check (Recommended)</h1>
<p data-start="1527" data-end="1531">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, MAX(sequence#)<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archived_log<br /><span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> thread#;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1614" data-end="1702">Compare this with&nbsp;<strong data-start="1632" data-end="1673">primary database archive log sequence</strong>&nbsp;to ensure DR is catching up.</p>
<hr data-start="1704" data-end="1707" />
<h1 data-section-id="1vty0gd" data-start="1709" data-end="1728">Current DR Status</h1>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="1730" data-end="1935">
<thead data-start="1730" data-end="1752">
<tr data-start="1730" data-end="1752">
<th class="" data-start="1730" data-end="1742" data-col-size="sm">Component</th>
<th class="" data-start="1742" data-end="1752" data-col-size="sm">Status</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="1763" data-end="1935">
<tr data-start="1763" data-end="1798">
<td data-start="1763" data-end="1785" data-col-size="sm">Grid Infrastructure</td>
<td data-start="1785" data-end="1798" data-col-size="sm">✅ Running</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1799" data-end="1818">
<td data-start="1799" data-end="1805" data-col-size="sm">ASM</td>
<td data-start="1805" data-end="1818" data-col-size="sm">✅ Running</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1819" data-end="1845">
<td data-start="1819" data-end="1832" data-col-size="sm">Diskgroups</td>
<td data-start="1832" data-end="1845" data-col-size="sm">✅ Mounted</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1846" data-end="1872">
<td data-start="1846" data-end="1859" data-col-size="sm">Standby DB</td>
<td data-start="1859" data-end="1872" data-col-size="sm">✅ Mounted</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1873" data-end="1903">
<td data-start="1873" data-end="1886" data-col-size="sm">Redo Apply</td>
<td data-start="1886" data-end="1903" data-col-size="sm">❌ Not Running</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1904" data-end="1935">
<td data-start="1904" data-end="1922" data-col-size="sm">Required Action</td>
<td data-start="1922" data-end="1935" data-col-size="sm">Start MRP</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1937" data-end="1940" />
<h1 data-section-id="4oddra" data-start="1942" data-end="1969">One Important Observation</h1>
<p data-start="1971" data-end="1986">Your RFS shows:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Thread 1 &rarr; 14859<br />Thread 2 &rarr; 12380</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2031" data-end="2102">This indicates&nbsp;<strong data-start="2046" data-end="2083">RAC primary with two redo threads</strong>, which is correct.</p>
<hr data-start="2104" data-end="2107" />
<p data-start="2109" data-end="2132">✅&nbsp;<strong data-start="2111" data-end="2125">Next step:</strong><br data-start="2125" data-end="2128" />Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE <span class="ͼ8">USING</span> <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span> LOGFILE <span class="ͼ8">DISCONNECT</span> <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> <span class="ͼ8">SESSION</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2241" data-end="2282">and then check&nbsp;<code data-start="2256" data-end="2275">v$managed_standby</code>&nbsp;again.</p>
<hr data-start="2284" data-end="2287" />
<p data-start="2289" data-end="2455" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">If you want, I can also show you a&nbsp;<strong data-start="2324" data-end="2455" data-is-last-node="">very useful 5-query DR health check script used by Oracle DBAs to verify DR before declaring it synced to the application team.</strong></p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="c40efccf-fa03-4a6b-adcf-058c122e7bc4" data-testid="conversation-turn-137" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">

<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden items-end rtl:items-start">
<div class="user-message-bubble-color corner-superellipse/0.98 relative rounded-[22px] px-4 py-2.5 leading-6 max-w-(--user-chat-width,70%)">
<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">SQL&gt; ALTER DATABASE RECOVER MANAGED STANDBY DATABASE USING CURRENT LOGFILE DISCONNECT FROM SESSION; Database altered. SQL&gt; SELECT process,status,thread#,sequence# FROM v$managed_standby; 2 PROCESS STATUS THREAD# SEQUENCE# --------- ------------ ---------- ---------- ARCH CONNECTED 0 0 DGRD ALLOCATED 0 0 DGRD ALLOCATED 0 0 ARCH CONNECTED 0 0 ARCH CONNECTED 0 0 ARCH CONNECTED 0 0 RFS IDLE 1 0 RFS IDLE 1 14859 RFS IDLE 1 0 RFS IDLE 2 12380 MRP0 WAIT_FOR_GAP 2 12376 11 rows selected. SQL&gt;</div>
</div>

</div>
<div class="z-0 flex justify-end">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="93e28925-9444-4695-88b2-b02d7d0b41e3" data-testid="conversation-turn-138" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="93e28925-9444-4695-88b2-b02d7d0b41e3" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-3">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="88">Your standby recovery&nbsp;<strong data-start="22" data-end="46">started successfully</strong>, but the status now shows a&nbsp;<strong data-start="75" data-end="87">redo gap</strong>.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="v4slsh" data-start="90" data-end="123">Current Status Interpretation</h3>
<p data-start="125" data-end="142">From your output:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 WAIT_FOR_GAP 2 12376</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="188" data-end="196">Meaning:</p>
<ul data-start="198" data-end="365">
<li data-section-id="1qlvguo" data-start="198" data-end="250">
<p data-start="200" data-end="250"><strong data-start="200" data-end="208">MRP0</strong>&nbsp;&rarr; Managed Recovery Process is running ✅</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="18daed5" data-start="251" data-end="316">
<p data-start="253" data-end="316"><strong data-start="253" data-end="269">WAIT_FOR_GAP</strong>&nbsp;&rarr; Some archive logs are&nbsp;<strong data-start="294" data-end="316">missing on standby</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="mp80w9" data-start="317" data-end="365">
<p data-start="319" data-end="365">Apply cannot continue until those logs arrive.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="367" data-end="389">Your RFS entries show:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Thread 1 last received : 14859<br />Thread 2 last received : 12380</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="462" data-end="485">But MRP is waiting for:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Thread 2 sequence 12376</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="520" data-end="589">This means&nbsp;<strong data-start="531" data-end="588">some archive logs between sequences are missing on DR</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="591" data-end="594" />
<h1 data-section-id="n1vuyl" data-start="596" data-end="640">Step 1 &mdash; Identify the Missing Archive Logs</h1>
<p data-start="642" data-end="661">Run this on&nbsp;<strong data-start="654" data-end="660">DR</strong>:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, low_sequence#, high_sequence#<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archive_gap;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="741" data-end="795">This will show exactly which archive logs are missing.</p>
<p data-start="797" data-end="812">Example output:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">THREAD# LOW_SEQUENCE# HIGH_SEQUENCE#<br />2 12376 12379</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="888" data-end="891" />
<h1 data-section-id="1jeyt1w" data-start="893" data-end="939">Step 2 &mdash; Check if Logs Exist on Primary (DC)</h1>
<p data-start="941" data-end="979">Login to&nbsp;<strong data-start="950" data-end="970">Primary Database</strong>&nbsp;and run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, sequence#, archived<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archived_log<br /><span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> thread#<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">2</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">AND</span> sequence# <span class="ͼ8">BETWEEN</span> <span class="ͼb">12376</span> <span class="ͼ8">AND</span> <span class="ͼb">12380</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1104" data-end="1159">If they exist, Data Guard can fetch them automatically.</p>
<hr data-start="1161" data-end="1164" />
<h1 data-section-id="1of2jds" data-start="1166" data-end="1216">Step 3 &mdash; Force Archive Log Shipping from Primary</h1>
<p data-start="1218" data-end="1237">On&nbsp;<strong data-start="1221" data-end="1232">Primary</strong>&nbsp;run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1285" data-end="1306">Run it&nbsp;<strong data-start="1292" data-end="1305">2&ndash;3 times</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="1308" data-end="1345">This forces redo shipping to standby.</p>
<hr data-start="1347" data-end="1350" />
<h1 data-section-id="wcfxzv" data-start="1352" data-end="1384">Step 4 &mdash; Check if Gap Resolved</h1>
<p data-start="1386" data-end="1402">Run again on DR:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> process,status,thread#,sequence#<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$managed_standby;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1480" data-end="1489">Expected:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 APPLYING_LOG</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1518" data-end="1529">Instead of:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">WAIT_FOR_GAP</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<hr data-start="1553" data-end="1556" />
<h1 data-section-id="z80yiq" data-start="1558" data-end="1588">Step 5 &mdash; If Gap Still Exists</h1>
<p data-start="1590" data-end="1645">You may need to&nbsp;<strong data-start="1606" data-end="1644">manually copy missing archive logs</strong>.</p>
<ol data-start="1647" data-end="1683">
<li data-section-id="bgksk7" data-start="1647" data-end="1683">
<p data-start="1650" data-end="1683">Find archive location on primary:</p>
</li>
</ol>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">archive log list;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<ol start="2" data-start="1715" data-end="1736">
<li data-section-id="vvius5" data-start="1715" data-end="1736">
<p data-start="1718" data-end="1736">Copy missing logs:</p>
</li>
</ol>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">scp arch_2_12376*.arc oracle@DR_SERVER:/archive_location/</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<ol start="3" data-start="1809" data-end="1832">
<li data-section-id="199wdrf" data-start="1809" data-end="1832">
<p data-start="1812" data-end="1832">Register logs on DR:</p>
</li>
</ol>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> DATABASE REGISTER LOGFILE <span class="ͼc">'/path/arch_2_12376.arc'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1904" data-end="1942">Then recovery continues automatically.</p>
<hr data-start="1944" data-end="1947" />
<h1 data-section-id="1wsarfi" data-start="1949" data-end="1981">Step 6 &mdash; Verify Data Guard Lag</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">

<p data-start="2280" data-end="2434">💡&nbsp;<strong data-start="2283" data-end="2302">Very important:</strong><br data-start="2302" data-end="2305" />Since your DR node rebooted earlier,&nbsp;<strong data-start="2342" data-end="2402">some archive logs might have been missed during downtime</strong>, which is why the gap occurred.</p>
<hr data-start="2436" data-end="2439" />
<p data-start="2441" data-end="2485">✅ Next command you should run&nbsp;<strong data-start="2471" data-end="2484">right now</strong>:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<div class="cm-scroller">

<p data-start="2565" data-end="2655" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Send the output if you want, and I can tell you&nbsp;<strong data-start="2613" data-end="2654">exactly how to resolve the gap safely</strong>.</p>

<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>

<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="128">Your situation is&nbsp;<strong data-start="18" data-end="42">very close to normal</strong>, but there is a small&nbsp;<strong data-start="65" data-end="88">redo shipping issue</strong>. Let&rsquo;s interpret the results carefully.</p>
<hr data-start="130" data-end="133" />
<h1 data-section-id="1pyxs3t" data-start="135" data-end="154">Current Situation</h1>
<h3 data-section-id="6z80i9" data-start="156" data-end="165">On DR</h3>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

</div>

<p data-start="201" data-end="209">Meaning:</p>

<li data-section-id="zjarpy" data-start="211" data-end="242">
<p data-start="213" data-end="242">Managed Recovery is running ✅</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="r9gi5j" data-start="243" data-end="295">
<p data-start="245" data-end="295">Standby is waiting for&nbsp;<strong data-start="268" data-end="295">Thread 2 sequence 12376</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="297" data-end="318">But when you checked:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, low_sequence#, high_sequence# <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archive_gap;</div>

<p data-start="398" data-end="405">Result:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<p data-start="433" data-end="550">This means&nbsp;<strong data-start="444" data-end="491">Oracle does not detect a formal archive gap</strong>, but the&nbsp;<strong data-start="501" data-end="549">redo transport has not delivered the log yet</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="552" data-end="555" />
<h1 data-section-id="zpzk7h" data-start="557" data-end="574">On Primary (DC)</h1>
<p data-start="576" data-end="589">You verified:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">

<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>

<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">THREAD# SEQUENCE#<br /><span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼb">12376</span><br /><span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼb">12377</span><br /><span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼb">12378</span><br /><span class="ͼb">2</span> <span class="ͼb">12379</span></div>

<p data-start="677" data-end="722">All logs&nbsp;<strong data-start="686" data-end="706">exist on primary</strong>, which is good.</p>
<p data-start="724" data-end="747">So the issue is simply:</p>
<p data-start="749" data-end="804"><strong data-start="749" data-end="804">Redo logs have not yet been shipped to the standby.</strong></p>
<hr data-start="806" data-end="809" />
<h1 data-section-id="m1luf4" data-start="811" data-end="858">Step 1 &mdash; Force Redo Shipping (Most Important)</h1>
<p data-start="860" data-end="884">Run this on&nbsp;<strong data-start="872" data-end="883">Primary</strong>:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span>;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span>;<br /><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1000" data-end="1021">Run it&nbsp;<strong data-start="1007" data-end="1020">3&ndash;4 times</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="1023" data-end="1065">This forces LGWR to ship redo immediately.</p>
<hr data-start="1067" data-end="1070" />
<h1 data-section-id="16b5t6r" data-start="1072" data-end="1100">Step 2 &mdash; Check on DR Again</h1>

<h1 data-section-id="1g7psqx" data-start="1269" data-end="1300">Step 3 &mdash; Confirm Logs Arrived</h1>
<p data-start="1302" data-end="1308">Check:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#,sequence#,applied<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archived_log<br /><span class="ͼ8">ORDER</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> sequence#;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1395" data-end="1410">You should see:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>

<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">12376 APPLIED<br />12377 APPLIED</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<hr data-start="1451" data-end="1454" />
<h1 data-section-id="2dodaz" data-start="1456" data-end="1486">Step 4 &mdash; Check Transport Lag</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> name,<span class="ͼ8">value</span> <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$dataguard_stats<br /><span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> name <span class="ͼ8">LIKE</span> <span class="ͼc">'%lag%'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1566" data-end="1594">Lag should start decreasing.</p>
<hr data-start="1596" data-end="1599" />
<h1 data-section-id="1lveao5" data-start="1601" data-end="1620">Why This Happened</h1>
<p data-start="1622" data-end="1678">Your server&nbsp;<strong data-start="1634" data-end="1654">rebooted earlier</strong>, so during that period:</p>
<ul data-start="1680" data-end="1761">
<li data-section-id="1mqod74" data-start="1680" data-end="1702">
<p data-start="1682" data-end="1702">Redo shipping paused</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1n11umi" data-start="1703" data-end="1731">
<p data-start="1705" data-end="1731">Standby recovery restarted</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="5kot0l" data-start="1732" data-end="1761">
<p data-start="1734" data-end="1761">MRP waited for missing logs</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1763" data-end="1824">Now the fix is simply&nbsp;<strong data-start="1785" data-end="1823">forcing primary to resend archives</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="1826" data-end="1829" />
<h1 data-section-id="14bds48" data-start="1831" data-end="1857">If It Still Doesn't Ship</h1>
<p data-start="1859" data-end="1888">Then we check redo transport:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> dest_id,status,error <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archive_dest <span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> target<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'STANDBY'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1974" data-end="2016">This will show if transport has any error.</p>
<hr data-start="2018" data-end="2021" />
<h1 data-section-id="190ncm8" data-start="2023" data-end="2048">What Should Happen Next</h1>
<p data-start="2050" data-end="2072">After forcing archive:</p>
<p data-start="2074" data-end="2093">Expected DR status:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2136" data-end="2173">Then sequences will start increasing.</p>
<hr data-start="2175" data-end="2178" />
<h1 data-section-id="eovskt" data-start="2180" data-end="2216">Quick Command to Run Now (Primary)</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG <span class="ͼ8">CURRENT</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2264" data-end="2304">Run it&nbsp;<strong data-start="2271" data-end="2282">3 times</strong>, then check DR again.</p>
<hr data-start="2306" data-end="2309" />
<p data-start="2311" data-end="2513" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">If you want, I can also show you&nbsp;<strong data-start="2344" data-end="2445">one powerful command that instantly tells whether Data Guard transport between DC &rarr; DR is healthy</strong>, which DBAs usually use before declaring&nbsp;<strong data-start="2487" data-end="2512">DR fully synchronized</strong>.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>

<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="73">Good news 👍 &mdash; your&nbsp;<strong data-start="20" data-end="72">Data Guard recovery has now resumed successfully</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="75" data-end="117">Let&rsquo;s interpret the last output carefully.</p>
<hr data-start="119" data-end="122" />
<h1 data-section-id="1vty0gd" data-start="124" data-end="143">Current DR Status</h1>
<p data-start="145" data-end="170">Your latest output shows:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 APPLYING_LOG 1 14850</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="210" data-end="246">This is the&nbsp;<strong data-start="222" data-end="245">most important line</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="248" data-end="256">Meaning:</p>
<ul data-start="258" data-end="428">
<li data-section-id="1m1k7cl" data-start="258" data-end="308">
<p data-start="260" data-end="308"><strong data-start="260" data-end="268">MRP0</strong>&nbsp;&rarr; Managed Recovery Process is running</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1bci924" data-start="309" data-end="370">
<p data-start="311" data-end="370"><strong data-start="311" data-end="327">APPLYING_LOG</strong>&nbsp;&rarr; Redo logs are being applied on standby</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1y94262" data-start="371" data-end="428">
<p data-start="373" data-end="428"><strong data-start="373" data-end="400">Thread 1 Sequence 14850</strong>&nbsp;is currently being applied.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="430" data-end="488">So the standby database is&nbsp;<strong data-start="457" data-end="487">actively synchronizing now</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="490" data-end="493" />
<h1 data-section-id="1olklrf" data-start="495" data-end="518">What Happened Earlier</h1>
<p data-start="520" data-end="536">Earlier you saw:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">

<p data-start="573" data-end="595">This happened because:</p>

</li>

</li>
<li data-section-id="1avnhpe" data-start="658" data-end="679">
<p data-start="660" data-end="679">MRP waited for them</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="681" data-end="728">After you forced archive shipping from primary:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ALTER SYSTEM ARCHIVE LOG CURRENT;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<p data-start="773" data-end="790">the logs arrived:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

</div>
<p data-start="821" data-end="838">Then MRP resumed:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<p data-start="0" data-end="121">Your latest outputs show that&nbsp;<strong data-start="30" data-end="84">Data Guard is now working normally and catching up</strong>. Let&rsquo;s interpret the status clearly.</p>
<hr data-start="123" data-end="126" />
<h1 data-section-id="k5qwq1" data-start="128" data-end="157">1️⃣ Managed Recovery Status</h1>

<p data-start="335" data-end="374">So the recovery process is&nbsp;<strong data-start="362" data-end="373">healthy</strong>.</p>

</div>

</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="500" data-end="508">Meaning:</p>
<ul data-start="510" data-end="606">
<li data-section-id="cbwfpx" data-start="510" data-end="562">
<p data-start="512" data-end="562">Primary database is&nbsp;<strong data-start="532" data-end="562">actively sending redo logs</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1oxwrf7" data-start="563" data-end="606">
<p data-start="565" data-end="606">Standby is&nbsp;<strong data-start="576" data-end="606">receiving them in parallel</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="608" data-end="636">Architecture flow currently:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">Primary (DC)<br /> &darr;<br />LGWR / ARCH<br /> &darr;<br />Network<br /> &darr;<br />RFS (Standby)<br /> &darr;<br />MRP0<br /> &darr;<br />Redo Apply</div>

</div>

</div>

<h1 data-section-id="1sycmna" data-start="778" data-end="798">3️⃣ Data Guard Lag</h1>
<p data-start="800" data-end="816">Your lag values:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<p data-start="883" data-end="891">Meaning:</p>
<ul data-start="893" data-end="972">
<li data-section-id="uuhmvu" data-start="893" data-end="934">
<p data-start="895" data-end="934">Transport delay &asymp;&nbsp;<strong data-start="913" data-end="934">1 hour 22 minutes</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1psv54" data-start="935" data-end="972">
<p data-start="937" data-end="972">Apply delay &asymp;&nbsp;<strong data-start="951" data-end="972">1 hour 50 minutes</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="974" data-end="1066">This is&nbsp;<strong data-start="982" data-end="1022">expected right after standby restart</strong>&nbsp;because it must&nbsp;<strong data-start="1039" data-end="1065">apply backlog archives</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="1068" data-end="1130">As MRP continues applying logs, the lag will reduce gradually:</p>
<p data-start="1132" data-end="1152">Example progression:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

</div>

</div>
</div>

<hr data-start="2614" data-end="2617" />
<h1 data-section-id="huqjt8" data-start="2619" data-end="2651">9️⃣ You Can Inform Team (Soon)</h1>
<p data-start="2653" data-end="2715">Once lag becomes near zero, DR will be&nbsp;<strong data-start="2692" data-end="2714">fully synchronized</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="2717" data-end="2748">Example statement you can send:</p>
<blockquote data-start="2750" data-end="2982">
<p data-start="2752" data-end="2982">The DR database is mounted and Managed Recovery Process (MRP) is running. Redo logs are being received and applied successfully. The standby database is currently catching up with primary and synchronization will complete shortly.</p>
</blockquote>
<hr data-start="2984" data-end="2987" />
<p data-start="2989" data-end="3179" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">If you want, I can also show you a&nbsp;<strong data-start="3024" data-end="3143">very useful command that instantly tells if your Oracle RAC + Data Guard DR is fully synchronized in a single query</strong>, which many DBAs use in production.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>

<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="159">From the outputs you shared, your&nbsp;<strong data-start="34" data-end="98">Oracle Data Guard is working correctly but still catching up</strong>. I&rsquo;ll explain what is happening and what you should check.</p>
<hr data-start="161" data-end="164" />
<h2 data-section-id="11rqcc0" data-start="166" data-end="198">1️⃣ Current Data Guard Status</h2>
<p data-start="200" data-end="225">From&nbsp;<code data-start="205" data-end="224">v$managed_standby</code>:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">

<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">MRP0 APPLYING_LOG 1 14851</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<p data-start="262" data-end="273">This means:</p>

<p data-start="277" data-end="333"><strong data-start="277" data-end="285">MRP0</strong>&nbsp;&rarr; Managed Recovery Process running on standby</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="krhg2m" data-start="334" data-end="395">
<p data-start="336" data-end="395"><strong data-start="336" data-end="352">APPLYING_LOG</strong>&nbsp;&rarr; Standby is actively applying redo logs</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1q6lu95" data-start="396" data-end="455">
<p data-start="398" data-end="455"><strong data-start="398" data-end="425">Thread 1 sequence 14851</strong>&nbsp;&rarr; Currently applying this log</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="457" data-end="501">So&nbsp;<strong data-start="460" data-end="498">redo apply is active and not stuck</strong>. ✅</p>
<hr data-start="503" data-end="506" />
<h2 data-section-id="r02m1x" data-start="508" data-end="525">2️⃣ Lag Status</h2>
<p data-start="527" data-end="538">Your query:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> name,<span class="ͼ8">value</span> <br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$dataguard_stats <br /><span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> name <span class="ͼ8">LIKE</span> <span class="ͼc">'%lag%'</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="">
<div class="relative">

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">

</div>

<p data-start="694" data-end="702">Meaning:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="704" data-end="883">
<thead data-start="704" data-end="733">
<tr data-start="704" data-end="733">
