</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="757" data-end="883">
<tr data-start="757" data-end="828">
<td data-start="757" data-end="773" data-col-size="sm">Transport Lag</td>
<td data-start="773" data-end="818" data-col-size="md">Delay sending redo from primary to standby</td>
<td data-start="818" data-end="828" data-col-size="sm">~5 min</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="829" data-end="883">
<td data-start="829" data-end="841" data-col-size="sm">Apply Lag</td>
<td data-start="841" data-end="874" data-col-size="md">Delay applying logs on standby</td>
<td data-start="874" data-end="883" data-col-size="sm">~1 hr</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="885" data-end="944">👉&nbsp;<strong data-start="888" data-end="930">Apply lag is higher than transport lag</strong>, which means:</p>
<p data-start="946" data-end="1024"><strong data-start="946" data-end="1024">Logs are reaching standby quickly, but apply process is still catching up.</strong></p>
<hr data-start="1026" data-end="1029" />
<h2 data-section-id="1fxb3dk" data-start="1031" data-end="1058">3️⃣ Archive Apply Status</h2>

<div class="">

<p data-start="1366" data-end="1413">Standby&nbsp;<strong data-start="1374" data-end="1413">is receiving redo logs from primary</strong></p>
</li>

</li>

<p data-start="1459" data-end="1487">So&nbsp;<strong data-start="1462" data-end="1486">transport is healthy</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="1489" data-end="1492" />
<h1 data-section-id="3nvqv1" data-start="1494" data-end="1517">📊 Overall Conclusion</h1>
<p data-start="1519" data-end="1553">Your Data Guard is&nbsp;<strong data-start="1538" data-end="1552">not broken</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="1555" data-end="1569">Current state:</p>
<p data-start="1571" data-end="1666">✔ Redo shipping working<br data-start="1594" data-end="1597" />✔ Redo apply running<br data-start="1617" data-end="1620" />✔ Logs being received<br data-start="1641" data-end="1644" />✔ Logs being applied</p>
<p data-start="1668" data-end="1679">Only issue:</p>
<p data-start="1681" data-end="1704">⚠&nbsp;<strong data-start="1683" data-end="1704">Apply lag ~1 hour</strong></p>
<p data-start="1706" data-end="1752">But it is&nbsp;<strong data-start="1716" data-end="1728">reducing</strong>&nbsp;(earlier it was ~1:50).</p>
<hr data-start="1754" data-end="1757" />
<h1 data-section-id="xz20py" data-start="1759" data-end="1792">🔎 Recommended Monitoring Query</h1>
<p data-start="1794" data-end="1821">Run this every few minutes:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> THREAD#, SEQUENCE#, APPLIED<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> V$ARCHIVED_LOG<br /><span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> APPLIED<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'NO'</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">ORDER</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> SEQUENCE#;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1929" data-end="1933">And:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> process,status,thread#,sequence#<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$managed_standby;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2011" data-end="2014" />
<h1 data-section-id="1a07vu2" data-start="2016" data-end="2049">⚡ If You Want to Speed Up Apply</h1>
<p data-start="2051" data-end="2078">Check recovery parallelism:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">show <span class="ͼ8">parameter</span> recovery_parallelism;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2129" data-end="2154">If low, you can increase:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">ALTER</span> SYSTEM <span class="ͼ8">SET</span> RECOVERY_PARALLELISM<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">8</span> SCOPE<span class="ͼ8">=BOTH</span>;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="2220" data-end="2223" />
<h1 data-section-id="1i493n6" data-start="2225" data-end="2259">📌 Important Check (Very Useful)</h1>
<p data-start="2261" data-end="2285">Run this on&nbsp;<strong data-start="2273" data-end="2284">Primary</strong>:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, MAX(sequence#)<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archived_log<br /><span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> thread#;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2368" data-end="2392">Run this on&nbsp;<strong data-start="2380" data-end="2391">Standby</strong>:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> thread#, MAX(sequence#)<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$archived_log<br /><span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> applied<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'YES'</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> thread#;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2495" data-end="2552">This will show&nbsp;<strong data-start="2510" data-end="2551">exact gap between primary and standby</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="2554" data-end="2557" />
<p data-start="2559" data-end="2667" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">✅ If you want, paste these outputs and I can&nbsp;<strong data-start="2604" data-end="2666">calculate exact sync gap and tell you if anything is wrong</strong>.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-(--header-height)" dir="auto" data-turn-id="ecc0e43c-5010-4732-8b6a-d16092a11573" data-testid="conversation-turn-147" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="user" data-message-id="ecc0e43c-5010-4732-8b6a-d16092a11573">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden items-end rtl:items-start">
<div class="user-message-bubble-color corner-superellipse/0.98 relative rounded-[22px] px-4 py-2.5 leading-6 max-w-(--user-chat-width,70%)">
<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">useful command that instantly tells if your Oracle RAC + Data Guard DR is fully synchronized in a single query, which many DBAs use in production. also want to send email to two to three email-id's about the status through the script</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex justify-end">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="e97ee0c5-45b6-473f-b683-60af0b5d6071" data-testid="conversation-turn-148" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="e97ee0c5-45b6-473f-b683-60af0b5d6071" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-3">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="50">You can create a&nbsp;<strong data-start="17" data-end="44">small monitoring script</strong>&nbsp;that:</p>
<ol data-start="52" data-end="232">
<li data-section-id="fjxqdm" data-start="52" data-end="131">
<p data-start="55" data-end="131">Runs&nbsp;<strong data-start="60" data-end="77">one SQL query</strong>&nbsp;to check Data Guard sync status (Primary vs Standby).</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1tt6aun" data-start="132" data-end="180">
<p data-start="135" data-end="180">Decides whether the DR is&nbsp;<strong data-start="161" data-end="179">SYNC / LAGGING</strong>.</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1m62tkn" data-start="181" data-end="232">
<p data-start="184" data-end="232">Sends an&nbsp;<strong data-start="193" data-end="231">email alert to multiple recipients</strong>.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start="234" data-end="300">This is commonly used by DBAs for&nbsp;<strong data-start="268" data-end="299">RAC + Data Guard monitoring</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="302" data-end="305" />
<h1 data-section-id="qz0meo" data-start="307" data-end="357">1️⃣ Single Query to Check Data Guard Sync Status</h1>
<p data-start="358" data-end="385">Run on&nbsp;<strong data-start="365" data-end="385">Standby Database</strong></p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> <br />SYSDATE,<br />(<span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> MAX(SEQUENCE#) <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> V$ARCHIVED_LOG <span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> THREAD#<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">1</span>) <span class="ͼ8">AS</span> RECEIVED_SEQ,<br />(<span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> MAX(SEQUENCE#) <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> V$ARCHIVED_LOG <span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> THREAD#<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">AND</span> APPLIED<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'YES'</span>) <span class="ͼ8">AS</span> APPLIED_SEQ,<br />((<span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> MAX(SEQUENCE#) <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> V$ARCHIVED_LOG <span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> THREAD#<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">1</span>) <span class="ͼ8">-</span><br /> (<span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> MAX(SEQUENCE#) <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> V$ARCHIVED_LOG <span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> THREAD#<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼb">1</span> <span class="ͼ8">AND</span> APPLIED<span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">'YES'</span>)) <span class="ͼ8">AS</span> GAP<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> dual;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<h3 data-section-id="aaiq5t" data-start="748" data-end="766">Example Output</h3>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="768" data-end="861">
<thead data-start="768" data-end="803">
<tr data-start="768" data-end="803">
<th class="" data-start="768" data-end="775" data-col-size="sm">TIME</th>
<th class="" data-start="775" data-end="786" data-col-size="sm">RECEIVED</th>
<th class="" data-start="786" data-end="796" data-col-size="sm">APPLIED</th>
<th class="" data-start="796" data-end="803" data-col-size="sm">GAP</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="822" data-end="861">
<tr data-start="822" data-end="861">
<td data-start="822" data-end="840" data-col-size="sm">13-MAR-26 18:00</td>
<td data-start="840" data-end="848" data-col-size="sm">14870</td>
<td data-start="848" data-end="856" data-col-size="sm">14870</td>
<td data-start="856" data-end="861" data-col-size="sm">0</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="863" data-end="871">Meaning:</p>
<ul data-start="873" data-end="946">
<li data-section-id="rozbsw" data-start="873" data-end="911">
<p data-start="875" data-end="911"><strong data-start="875" data-end="907">GAP = 0 &rarr; Fully synchronized</strong>&nbsp;✅</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="qujw47" data-start="912" data-end="946">
<p data-start="914" data-end="946"><strong data-start="914" data-end="943">GAP &gt; 0 &rarr; Standby lagging</strong>&nbsp;⚠️</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="948" data-end="951" />
<h1 data-section-id="f6dojx" data-start="953" data-end="1004">2️⃣ Better Production Query (Thread wise for RAC)</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> <br />THREAD#,<br />MAX(SEQUENCE#) RECEIVED,<br />MAX(DECODE(APPLIED,<span class="ͼc">'YES'</span>,SEQUENCE#)) APPLIED,<br />MAX(SEQUENCE#)<span class="ͼ8">-</span>MAX(DECODE(APPLIED,<span class="ͼc">'YES'</span>,SEQUENCE#)) GAP<br /><span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> V$ARCHIVED_LOG<br /><span class="ͼ8">GROUP</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> THREAD#<br /><span class="ͼ8">ORDER</span> <span class="ͼ8">BY</span> THREAD#;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1217" data-end="1225">Example:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="1227" data-end="1334">
<thead data-start="1227" data-end="1264">
<tr data-start="1227" data-end="1264">
<th class="" data-start="1227" data-end="1236" data-col-size="sm">THREAD</th>
<th class="" data-start="1236" data-end="1247" data-col-size="sm">RECEIVED</th>
<th class="" data-start="1247" data-end="1257" data-col-size="sm">APPLIED</th>
<th class="" data-start="1257" data-end="1264" data-col-size="sm">GAP</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-start="1283" data-end="1334">
<tr data-start="1283" data-end="1308">
<td data-start="1283" data-end="1287" data-col-size="sm">1</td>
<td data-start="1287" data-end="1295" data-col-size="sm">14864</td>
<td data-start="1295" data-end="1303" data-col-size="sm">14864</td>
<td data-start="1303" data-end="1308" data-col-size="sm">0</td>
</tr>
<tr data-start="1309" data-end="1334">
<td data-start="1309" data-end="1313" data-col-size="sm">2</td>
<td data-start="1313" data-end="1321" data-col-size="sm">12384</td>
<td data-start="1321" data-end="1329" data-col-size="sm">12384</td>
<td data-start="1329" data-end="1334" data-col-size="sm">0</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="1336" data-end="1381">👉&nbsp;<strong data-start="1339" data-end="1381">GAP = 0 means DR is fully synchronized</strong></p>
<hr data-start="1383" data-end="1386" />
<h1 data-section-id="1lofe1i" data-start="1388" data-end="1428">3️⃣ Linux Script to Check + Send Email</h1>
<p data-start="1430" data-end="1444">Create script:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">vi dg_sync_check.sh</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ7">#!/bin/bash</span><br /><br /><span class="ͼe">ORACLE_SID</span><span class="ͼ8">=</span>PRODDB<br /><span class="ͼe">ORACLE_HOME</span><span class="ͼ8">=</span>/u01/app/oracle/product/19.0.0/dbhome_1<br /><span class="ͼe">PATH</span><span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼe">$ORACLE_HOME</span>/bin:<span class="ͼe">$PATH</span><br /><br /><span class="ͼe">EMAIL</span><span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">"dba1@company.com,dba2@company.com,dba3@company.com"</span><br /><br /><span class="ͼe">RESULT</span><span class="ͼ8">=</span>$(<span class="ͼe">$ORACLE_HOME</span>/bin/sqlplus -s / as sysdba &lt;&lt;EOF<br />set pages 0 feedback off heading off<br />SELECT THREAD#||<span class="ͼc">','</span>||<br />MAX(SEQUENCE#)||<span class="ͼc">','</span>||<br />MAX(DECODE(APPLIED,<span class="ͼc">'YES'</span>,SEQUENCE#))||<span class="ͼc">','</span>||<br />(MAX(SEQUENCE#)-MAX(DECODE(APPLIED,<span class="ͼc">'YES'</span>,SEQUENCE#)))<br />FROM V\\<span class="ͼe">$ARCHIVED_LOG</span><br />GROUP BY THREAD#<br />ORDER BY THREAD#;<br />exit<br />EOF<br />)<br /><br /><span class="ͼd">echo</span> <span class="ͼc">"</span><span class="ͼe">$RESULT</span><span class="ͼc">"</span> &gt; /tmp/dg_status.txt<br /><br /><span class="ͼe">GAP</span><span class="ͼ8">=</span>$(echo <span class="ͼc">"</span><span class="ͼe">$RESULT</span><span class="ͼc">"</span> | awk -F<span class="ͼc">','</span> <span class="ͼc">'{sum+=$4} END {print sum}'</span>)<br /><br /><span class="ͼ8">if</span> [ <span class="ͼc">"</span><span class="ͼe">$GAP</span><span class="ͼc">"</span> <span class="ͼf">-eq</span> <span class="ͼb">0</span> ]<br /><span class="ͼ8">then</span><br /><span class="ͼe">SUBJECT</span><span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">"Data Guard Status : SYNC"</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">else</span><br /><span class="ͼe">SUBJECT</span><span class="ͼ8">=</span><span class="ͼc">"Data Guard Alert : LAG DETECTED"</span><br /><span class="ͼ8">fi</span><br /><br />mail <span class="ͼf">-s</span> <span class="ͼc">"</span><span class="ͼe">$SUBJECT</span><span class="ͼc">"</span> <span class="ͼe">$EMAIL</span> &lt; /tmp/dg_status.txt</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<h1 data-section-id="clv0w" data-start="2630" data-end="2666">8️⃣ Bonus (Professional DBA Query)</h1>
<p data-start="2668" data-end="2713">Many DBAs use this&nbsp;<strong data-start="2687" data-end="2712">one-line status check</strong>:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">

<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼ8">SELECT</span> name,<span class="ͼ8">value</span> <span class="ͼ8">FROM</span> v$dataguard_stats <span class="ͼ8">WHERE</span> name <span class="ͼ8">IN</span> (<span class="ͼc">'transport lag'</span>,<span class="ͼc">'apply lag'</span>);</div>

<p data-start="2887" data-end="2944">👉 If both near&nbsp;<strong data-start="2903" data-end="2944">0 seconds &rarr; DR perfectly synchronized</strong></p>
<hr data-start="2946" data-end="2949" />
<p data-start="2951" data-end="3031">✅ If you want, I can also give you a&nbsp;<strong data-start="2988" data-end="3030">complete enterprise script that checks</strong>:</p>
<ul data-start="3033" data-end="3168">
<li data-section-id="1irsfdq" data-start="3033" data-end="3073">
<p data-start="3035" data-end="3073">Primary vs Standby sequence difference</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="39yni9" data-start="3074" data-end="3089">
<p data-start="3076" data-end="3089">Transport lag</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="cz7cie" data-start="3090" data-end="3101">
<p data-start="3092" data-end="3101">Apply lag</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="z9qms3" data-start="3102" data-end="3114">
<p data-start="3104" data-end="3114">MRP status</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="bn05ss" data-start="3115" data-end="3128">
<p data-start="3117" data-end="3128">Archive gap</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="jrhfvy" data-start="3129" data-end="3168">
<p data-start="3131" data-end="3168">Sends&nbsp;<strong data-start="3137" data-end="3168">formatted HTML email report</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="3170" data-end="3238" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">This is what&nbsp;<strong data-start="3183" data-end="3237">large production RAC + Data Guard environments use</strong>.</p>

<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">now showing DATA2 also [root@erpproddb2-dr ~]# oracleasm listdisks DATA1 DATA2 OCRVOTE1 OCRVOTE2 OCRVOTE3 OCRVOTE4 OCRVOTE5 Perfect! Both nodes now see the exact same ASM disks, including the new DATA2. Next Step: Start CRS on Node 2 Run the following command on erpproddb2-dr as root: Bash/oracle/app/grid/19.3.0/gridhome_1/bin/crsctl start crs This command will take 1&ndash;2 minutes to complete. Please run it now and paste the full output here. After it finishes, we will check the cluster status from node 1 (erpproddb1-dr) using: Bash/oracle/app/grid/19.3.0/gridhome_1/bin/crsctl stat res -t Go ahead and run the crsctl start crs command on node 2. (from your output): Node 2 is still not fully joined to the RAC cluster. Most resources (ASM, DATA.dg, OCRVOTE.dg, ora.asm, etc.) are OFFLINE on node 2. The VIP for node 2 (ora.erpproddb2-dr.vip) has FAILED OVER to node 1. This is exactly why crsctl stat res -t was hanging on node 2 &mdash; CRS on node 2 is in a bad/stuck state after the reboot. Recommended Action Now (Safe) Please run the following commands on erpproddb2-dr as root: Bash# 1. Check current CRS status on node 2 /oracle/app/grid/19.3.0/gridhome_1/bin/crsctl check crs # 2. Stop CRS forcefully on node 2 /oracle/app/grid/19.3.0/gridhome_1/bin/crsctl stop crs -f Please run both commands and paste the full output here. Once we see the output, we will either: Cleanly add node 2 back, or Reinstall Grid Infrastructure on node 2 (cleaner option if CRS is badly corrupted). Go ahead and run the two commands on node 2 now.</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="z-0 flex justify-end">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>

<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="a9f273c8-e905-4f68-a4e7-5e2367888f5a" data-testid="conversation-turn-152" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn">
<div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow">
<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="a9f273c8-e905-4f68-a4e7-5e2367888f5a" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-3">
<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="139">Got it &mdash; this confirms&nbsp;<strong data-start="23" data-end="73">CRS on node 2 is completely stuck (hung stack)</strong>.<br data-start="74" data-end="77" />When even&nbsp;<code data-start="87" data-end="105">crsctl check crs</code>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<code data-start="110" data-end="123">stop crs -f</code>&nbsp;hang, it means:</p>
<p data-start="141" data-end="287">👉&nbsp;<strong data-start="144" data-end="192">OHASD / CSSD processes are stuck at OS level</strong><br data-start="192" data-end="195" />👉 Clusterware is not responding to commands<br data-start="239" data-end="242" />👉 Normal CRS control is no longer possible</p>
<hr data-start="289" data-end="292" />
<h1 data-section-id="1lzdc6" data-start="294" data-end="345">🚨 Correct Action Now (Force Cleanup at OS Level)</h1>
<p data-start="347" data-end="463">We will safely&nbsp;<strong data-start="362" data-end="389">kill CRS stack manually</strong>&nbsp;on&nbsp;<strong data-start="393" data-end="408">node 2 only</strong><br data-start="408" data-end="411" />👉 This will NOT impact node 1 or your running DR DB</p>
<hr data-start="465" data-end="468" />
<h1 data-section-id="1x16173" data-start="470" data-end="505">✅ Step 1 &mdash; Identify CRS Processes</h1>
<p data-start="507" data-end="525">Run on&nbsp;<strong data-start="514" data-end="524">node 2</strong>:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">ps</span> <span class="ͼf">-ef</span> | <span class="ͼd">grep</span> <span class="ͼf">-i</span> <span class="ͼc">'ohasd\|crsd\|cssd\|evmd\|asm'</span> | <span class="ͼd">grep</span> <span class="ͼf">-v</span> <span class="ͼd">grep</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="603" data-end="606" />
<h1 data-section-id="1357eie" data-start="608" data-end="659">✅ Step 2 &mdash; Kill All Grid Infrastructure Processes</h1>
<p data-start="661" data-end="665">Run:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">kill</span> <span class="ͼf">-9</span> $(ps -ef | grep -i <span class="ͼc">'ohasd.bin'</span> | awk <span class="ͼc">'{print $2}'</span>)<br /><span class="ͼd">kill</span> <span class="ͼf">-9</span> $(ps -ef | grep -i <span class="ͼc">'crsd.bin'</span> | awk <span class="ͼc">'{print $2}'</span>)<br /><span class="ͼd">kill</span> <span class="ͼf">-9</span> $(ps -ef | grep -i <span class="ͼc">'ocssd.bin'</span> | awk <span class="ͼc">'{print $2}'</span>)<br /><span class="ͼd">kill</span> <span class="ͼf">-9</span> $(ps -ef | grep -i <span class="ͼc">'evmd.bin'</span> | awk <span class="ͼc">'{print $2}'</span>)<br /><span class="ͼd">kill</span> <span class="ͼf">-9</span> $(ps -ef | grep -i <span class="ͼc">'asm_pmon'</span> | awk <span class="ͼc">'{print $2}'</span>)</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="972" data-end="1008">👉 If any &ldquo;No such process&rdquo; &rarr; ignore</p>
<hr data-start="1010" data-end="1013" />
<h1 data-section-id="1c1uqk9" data-start="1015" data-end="1055">✅ Step 3 &mdash; Verify Everything is Killed</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">ps</span> <span class="ͼf">-ef</span> | <span class="ͼd">grep</span> <span class="ͼf">-i</span> <span class="ͼc">'ohasd\|crsd\|cssd\|evmd\|asm'</span> | <span class="ͼd">grep</span> <span class="ͼf">-v</span> <span class="ͼd">grep</span></div>

</div>

</div>

<p data-start="1133" data-end="1161">👉 Should return&nbsp;<strong data-start="1150" data-end="1161">nothing</strong></p>
<hr data-start="1163" data-end="1166" />
<h1 data-section-id="130hfft" data-start="1168" data-end="1202">✅ Step 4 &mdash; Clean IPC (Important)</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">

<h1 data-section-id="3ymuad" data-start="1239" data-end="1271">✅ Step 5 &mdash; Restart CRS Cleanly</h1>
<p data-start="1273" data-end="1289">Now start fresh:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">

<div class="cm-scroller">

<h1 data-section-id="1v44fvl" data-start="1384" data-end="1409">✅ Step 6 &mdash; Check Status</h1>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">ora.asm &rarr; ONLINE on node2<br />ora.DATA.dg &rarr; ONLINE on node2<br />ora.OCRVOTE.dg &rarr; ONLINE on node2<br />ora.erpproddb2-dr.vip &rarr; ONLINE on node2</div>

<h1 data-section-id="1igt8ah" data-start="1674" data-end="1693">⚠️ If Still Fails</h1>
<p data-start="1695" data-end="1710">Then we go for:</p>
<p data-start="1712" data-end="1794">👉&nbsp;<strong data-start="1715" data-end="1752">crsctl start has &rarr; bootstrap only</strong><br data-start="1752" data-end="1755" />👉 or&nbsp;<strong data-start="1761" data-end="1794">full node rejoin (addnode.sh)</strong></p>
<hr data-start="1796" data-end="1799" />
<h1 data-section-id="c1jii1" data-start="1801" data-end="1820">🚀 Why This Works</h1>
<p data-start="1822" data-end="1830">Because:</p>
<ul data-start="1832" data-end="1985">
<li data-section-id="2jws6z" data-start="1832" data-end="1883">
<p data-start="1834" data-end="1883">Your node reboot left&nbsp;<strong data-start="1856" data-end="1883">stale cluster processes</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="5h5jda" data-start="1884" data-end="1937">
<p data-start="1886" data-end="1937">CRS commands depend on those processes &rarr; hence hang</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="g2j096" data-start="1938" data-end="1985">
<p data-start="1940" data-end="1985">Manual kill =&nbsp;<strong data-start="1954" data-end="1985">hard reset of cluster stack</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1987" data-end="1990" />
<h1 data-section-id="pp4mp4" data-start="1992" data-end="2018">❗ Important Safety Notes</h1>
<p data-start="2020" data-end="2141">✔ Only doing this on&nbsp;<strong data-start="2041" data-end="2071">node 2 (DR secondary node)</strong><br data-start="2071" data-end="2074" />✔ Node 1 remains fully active<br data-start="2103" data-end="2106" />✔ No impact to running standby DB</p>
<hr data-start="2143" data-end="2146" />

<p data-start="2320" data-end="2415" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">I&rsquo;ll then guide you to&nbsp;<strong data-start="2343" data-end="2414">fully bring node 2 back into RAC cluster (final stabilization step)</strong>.</p>

<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto pt-12 [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">
<div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col">

<div class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" dir="auto" data-message-author-role="user" data-message-id="bd90b284-e4f1-4d10-84f5-c7a31145b04e">

<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">Understood &ndash; CRS on node 2 is severely hung. You still have: ohasd.bin reboot running for days Dozens of stuck crsctl.bin check crs processes This is why commands are hanging.Understood &ndash; CRS on node 2 is severely hung. is severely hung.[root@erpproddb2-dr ~]# pkill -9 -f crsd [root@erpproddb2-dr ~]# pkill -9 -f cssd [root@erpproddb2-dr ~]# pkill -9 -f evmd [root@erpproddb2-dr ~]# pkill -9 -f crsctl [root@erpproddb2-dr ~]# systemctl stop oracle-ohasd.service [root@erpproddb2-dr ~]# systemctl status oracle-ohasd.service ● oracle-ohasd.service - Oracle High Availability Services &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Loaded: loaded (/etc/systemd/system/oracle-ohasd.service; enabled; vendor preset: disabled) &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Active: inactive (dead) since Fri 2026-04-03 12:23:02 IST; 7s ago &nbsp;&nbsp;Process: 28409 ExecStop=/etc/init.d/init.ohasd stop &gt;/dev/null 2&gt;&amp;1 &lt;/dev/null (code=exited, status=0/SUCCESS) &nbsp;&nbsp;Process: 27668 ExecStart=/etc/init.d/init.ohasd run &gt;/dev/null 2&gt;&amp;1 &lt;/dev/null (code=killed, signal=TERM) &nbsp;Main PID: 27668 (code=killed, signal=TERM) &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;CGroup: /system.slice/oracle-ohasd.service Apr 03 12:22:01 erpproddb2-dr.pspcl.in systemd[1]: Started Oracle High Availability Services. Apr 03 12:23:02 erpproddb2-dr.pspcl.in systemd[1]: Stopping Oracle High Availability Services... Apr 03 12:23:02 erpproddb2-dr.pspcl.in clsecho[28436]: /etc/init.d/init.ohasd: init.ohasd stop called while not running, taking no action Apr 03 12:23:02 erpproddb2-dr.pspcl.in init.ohasd[28409]: /etc/init.d/init.ohasd: init.ohasd stop called while not running, taking no action Apr 03 12:23:02 erpproddb2-dr.pspcl.in systemd[1]: Stopped Oracle High Availability Services. [root@erpproddb2-dr ~]# ps -ef | grep -E 'ohasd|crsd|cssd|evmd|crsctl' | grep -v grep [root@erpproddb2-dr ~]# what to do next</div>
</div>

<div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">it still hangs [root@erpproddb2-dr ~]# /oracle/app/grid/19.3.0/gridhome_1/bin/crsctl check crs CRS-4639: Could not contact Oracle High Availability Services [root@erpproddb2-dr ~]# /oracle/app/grid/19.3.0/gridhome_1/bin/crsctl start crs Next Recommended Step (After killing) Since CRS is badly corrupted on node 2, the cleanest way is: Hard power off the VM erpproddb2-dr from VMware/vCenter (this is safe because the database is only running on node 1). Then we will delete node 2 from the cluster (from node 1) and re-add it cleanly. what would you suggest</div>
</div>

<span class="sr-only"><br /></span></section>
<section class="text-token-text-primary w-full focus:outline-none [--shadow-height:45px] has-data-writing-block:pointer-events-none has-data-writing-block:-mt-(--shadow-height) has-data-writing-block:pt-(--shadow-height) [&amp;:has([data-writing-block])&gt;*]:pointer-events-auto scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="d34ddf56-d277-44be-afc0-0b24d7a0267f" data-testid="conversation-turn-156" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">
<div class="text-base my-auto mx-auto [--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-xs,calc(var(--spacing)*4))] @w-sm/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-sm,calc(var(--spacing)*6))] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-margin:var(--thread-content-margin-lg,calc(var(--spacing)*16))] px-(--thread-content-margin)">

<div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden">
<div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word light markdown-new-styling">
<p data-start="0" data-end="107">You&rsquo;ve handled this very well so far &mdash; and at this point, we need to be&nbsp;<strong data-start="72" data-end="106">practical, not just procedural</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="109" data-end="145">👉 Based on everything you&rsquo;ve shown:</p>
<ul data-start="147" data-end="341">
<li data-section-id="e01tqc" data-start="147" data-end="175">
<p data-start="149" data-end="175">CRS fully hung earlier ✔</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="p5c77q" data-start="176" data-end="201">
<p data-start="178" data-end="201">Manual cleanup done ✔</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1xaa24k" data-start="202" data-end="221">
<p data-start="204" data-end="221">OHASD stopped ✔</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="knm67k" data-start="222" data-end="304">
<p data-start="224" data-end="228">Now:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto pe-11 pt-3">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">CRS-4639: Could not contact Oracle High Availability Services</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1rzagem" data-start="305" data-end="341">
<p data-start="307" data-end="341"><code data-start="307" data-end="325">crsctl start crs</code>&nbsp;<strong data-start="326" data-end="341">still hangs</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="343" data-end="346" />
<h1 data-section-id="19rrdb" data-start="348" data-end="368">🎯 Clear Diagnosis</h1>
<p data-start="370" data-end="442">Node 2 (<strong data-start="378" data-end="395">erpproddb2-dr</strong>) is in a&nbsp;<strong data-start="405" data-end="441">broken Grid Infrastructure state</strong>:</p>
<p data-start="444" data-end="520">👉 OHASD is not starting<br data-start="468" data-end="471" />👉 CRS stack cannot bootstrap<br data-start="500" data-end="503" />👉 Likely causes:</p>
<ul data-start="521" data-end="632">
<li data-section-id="a58e61" data-start="521" data-end="552">
<p data-start="523" data-end="552">Stale OCR / voting disk state</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1s7vuhx" data-start="553" data-end="584">
<p data-start="555" data-end="584">Cluster membership corruption</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1wf2xye" data-start="585" data-end="632">
<p data-start="587" data-end="632">GI binaries/config inconsistency after reboot</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="634" data-end="637" />
<h1 data-section-id="1tub0cr" data-start="639" data-end="667">❗ Important Decision Point</h1>
<p data-start="669" data-end="743">You have&nbsp;<strong data-start="678" data-end="693">two options</strong>, but only one is&nbsp;<strong data-start="711" data-end="742">safe and fast in production</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="745" data-end="748" />
<h1 data-section-id="cewtbu" data-start="750" data-end="790">✅ Recommended Approach (Best Practice)</h1>
<h2 data-section-id="vwtu4e" data-start="792" data-end="835">👉 YES &mdash; Do Hard Power OFF + Re-add Node</h2>
<p data-start="837" data-end="895">Your suggestion is&nbsp;<strong data-start="856" data-end="894">100% correct and industry-standard</strong>.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="13xs02u" data-start="897" data-end="918">Why this is best:</h3>
<ul data-start="920" data-end="1092">
<li data-section-id="1neamov" data-start="920" data-end="963">
<p data-start="922" data-end="963">Node 1 is&nbsp;<strong data-start="932" data-end="961">healthy and running DR DB</strong>&nbsp;✅</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="wo3ttb" data-start="964" data-end="999">
<p data-start="966" data-end="999">Node 2 is&nbsp;<strong data-start="976" data-end="997">completely broken</strong>&nbsp;❌</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1hi5374" data-start="1000" data-end="1049">
<p data-start="1002" data-end="1049">Fixing CRS manually now =&nbsp;<strong data-start="1028" data-end="1049">time waste + risk</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="3w47vb" data-start="1050" data-end="1092">
<p data-start="1052" data-end="1092">Re-adding node =&nbsp;<strong data-start="1069" data-end="1092">clean + predictable</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1094" data-end="1097" />
<h1 data-section-id="1u5u3yr" data-start="1099" data-end="1121">🚀 Step-by-Step Plan</h1>
<h2 data-section-id="10tcmcp" data-start="1123" data-end="1161">🔴 Step 1 &mdash; Power OFF Node 2 (Safe)</h2>
<p data-start="1163" data-end="1188">From VMware / Hypervisor:</p>
<p data-start="1190" data-end="1227">👉&nbsp;<strong data-start="1193" data-end="1211">Hard power off</strong>&nbsp;<code data-start="1212" data-end="1227">erpproddb2-dr</code></p>
<p data-start="1229" data-end="1244">✔ Safe because:</p>
<ul data-start="1245" data-end="1348">
<li data-section-id="18pflo7" data-start="1245" data-end="1275">
<p data-start="1247" data-end="1275">DB is running only on node 1</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="nu1uhq" data-start="1276" data-end="1304">
<p data-start="1278" data-end="1304">ASM + OCR active on node 1</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="l1ocuh" data-start="1305" data-end="1348">
<p data-start="1307" data-end="1348">No cluster dependency on node 2 right now</p>
</li>
</ul>

<p data-start="1858" data-end="1886">From&nbsp;<strong data-start="1863" data-end="1885">node 1 (grid user)</strong>:</p>

<hr data-start="2205" data-end="2208" />
<h1 data-section-id="1gvdkew" data-start="2210" data-end="2239">⚠️ Why Not Try More Fixing?</h1>
<p data-start="2241" data-end="2249">Because:</p>
<div class="TyagGW_tableContainer">
<div class="group TyagGW_tableWrapper flex flex-col-reverse w-fit" tabindex="-1">
<table class="w-fit min-w-(--thread-content-width)" data-start="2251" data-end="2421">

</tr>
<tr data-start="2325" data-end="2352">

</tr>

<p data-start="2423" data-end="2476">👉 You already crossed the&nbsp;<strong data-start="2450" data-end="2476">safe recovery boundary</strong></p>
<hr data-start="2478" data-end="2481" />
<h1 data-section-id="1tk8hz5" data-start="2483" data-end="2504">💡 Real DBA Insight</h1>
<p data-start="2506" data-end="2526">In production, when:</p>
<ul data-start="2528" data-end="2597">
<li data-section-id="16bvfc7" data-start="2528" data-end="2555">
<p data-start="2530" data-end="2555">CRS hangs even after kill</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1v2t36q" data-start="2556" data-end="2575">
<p data-start="2558" data-end="2575">OHASD won&rsquo;t start</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1lspz3q" data-start="2576" data-end="2597">
<p data-start="2578" data-end="2597">crsctl unresponsive</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="2599" data-end="2640">👉&nbsp;<strong data-start="2602" data-end="2640">We don&rsquo;t fix &mdash; we rebuild the node</strong></p>
<hr data-start="2642" data-end="2645" />
<h1 data-section-id="154fcdi" data-start="2647" data-end="2671">✅ Final Recommendation</h1>
<p data-start="2673" data-end="2688">✔ Proceed with:</p>
<blockquote data-start="2690" data-end="2738">
<p data-start="2692" data-end="2738"><strong data-start="2692" data-end="2738">Hard power off &rarr; Remove node &rarr; Re-add node</strong></p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="2740" data-end="2748">This is:</p>
<ul data-start="2750" data-end="2817">
<li data-section-id="q6f24h" data-start="2750" data-end="2763">
<p data-start="2752" data-end="2763">Faster ⏱️</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="pz2ial" data-start="2764" data-end="2778">

<p data-start="109" data-end="123">👉 This means:</p>
<p data-start="125" data-end="251">✅&nbsp;<strong data-start="127" data-end="172">Node 2 is already NOT part of the cluster</strong><br data-start="172" data-end="175" />👉 It has&nbsp;<strong data-start="185" data-end="223">automatically been evicted/removed</strong>&nbsp;(likely due to CRS failure)</p>
<hr data-start="253" data-end="256" />
<h1 data-section-id="x6surx" data-start="258" data-end="278">🎯 What This Means</h1>
<p data-start="280" data-end="307">You&nbsp;<strong data-start="284" data-end="306">DO NOT need to run</strong>:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">

<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">crsctl delete <span class="ͼd">node</span> <span class="ͼf">-n</span> erpproddb2-dr</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="358" data-end="366">Because:</p>

</li>

<p data-start="434" data-end="482">Node1 is running in&nbsp;<strong data-start="454" data-end="482">single-node cluster mode</strong></p>
</li>

<hr data-start="484" data-end="487" />
<h1 data-section-id="101idux" data-start="489" data-end="511">⚠️ Important Insight</h1>
<p data-start="513" data-end="527">This confirms:</p>
<p data-start="529" data-end="611">👉 Node2 is not just &ldquo;hung&rdquo;<br data-start="556" data-end="559" />👉 It is&nbsp;<strong data-start="568" data-end="611">logically dead from cluster perspective</strong></p>
<p data-start="613" data-end="657">So your path is now&nbsp;<strong data-start="633" data-end="656">simpler and cleaner</strong>.</p>
<hr data-start="659" data-end="662" />
<h1 data-section-id="11y5iho" data-start="664" data-end="701">✅ Correct Next Steps (Updated Plan)</h1>
<h2 data-section-id="17lqe48" data-start="703" data-end="748">🔴 Step 1 &mdash; Power OFF Node 2 (if still ON)</h2>

<p data-start="799" data-end="856">(Even if already off &mdash; just ensure it is cleanly stopped)</p>

<h2 data-section-id="dn30jq" data-start="863" data-end="901">🟡 Step 2 &mdash; Clean Node 2 Completely</h2>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<hr data-start="1807" data-end="1810" />
<h1 data-section-id="sh4ji3" data-start="1812" data-end="1834">🧠 Why This Happened</h1>
<p data-start="1836" data-end="1882">Oracle automatically&nbsp;<strong data-start="1857" data-end="1874">evicted node2</strong>&nbsp;due to:</p>
<ul data-start="1884" data-end="1955">
<li data-section-id="1vqn34e" data-start="1884" data-end="1904">
<p data-start="1886" data-end="1904">CRS not responding</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1rkixnb" data-start="1905" data-end="1929">
<p data-start="1907" data-end="1929">CSSD heartbeat failure</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="xdbs11" data-start="1930" data-end="1955">
<p data-start="1932" data-end="1955">Cluster reconfiguration</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1957" data-end="2003">👉 This is actually a&nbsp;<strong data-start="1979" data-end="2003">protective mechanism</strong></p>
<hr data-start="2005" data-end="2008" />
<h1 data-section-id="xw4f86" data-start="2010" data-end="2024">💡 Good News</h1>
<p data-start="2026" data-end="2038">This is now:</p>
<p data-start="2040" data-end="2134">✔ Easier to fix<br data-start="2055" data-end="2058" />✔ No manual cleanup in OCR needed<br data-start="2091" data-end="2094" />✔ No cluster force operations required</p>
<hr data-start="2136" data-end="2139" />
<h1 data-section-id="8x0wwf" data-start="2141" data-end="2180">🚨 One Important Check Before Addnode</h1>
<p data-start="2182" data-end="2215">On node1, confirm cluster health:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">crsctl check crs</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2247" data-end="2251">AND:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">
<div class="cm-scroller">
<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly">crsctl stat res <span class="ͼf">-t</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2285" data-end="2328">👉 Ensure everything is&nbsp;<strong data-start="2309" data-end="2328">ONLINE on node1</strong></p>
<hr data-start="2330" data-end="2333" />
<h1 data-section-id="lqd4jd" data-start="2335" data-end="2370">📩 Tell Me Before You Run addnode</h1>
<p data-start="2372" data-end="2380">Send me:</p>
<div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1">
<div class="">
<div class="relative">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0">
<div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl">
<div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback">
<div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4">&nbsp;</div>
<div class="w-full overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
<div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full">
<div id="code-block-viewer" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼ5 ͼj" dir="ltr">

<div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼd">cat</span> /etc/hosts</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p data-start="2410" data-end="2422">(from node1)</p>
<p data-start="2424" data-end="2444">I&rsquo;ll quickly verify:</p>
<p data-start="2446" data-end="2499">✔ Public IP<br data-start="2457" data-end="2460" />✔ Private interconnect<br data-start="2482" data-end="2485" />✔ VIP config</p>
<p data-start="2501" data-end="2558">👉 This avoids&nbsp;<strong data-start="2516" data-end="2535">addnode failure</strong>, which is very common.</p>
<hr data-start="2560" data-end="2563" />
<p data-start="2565" data-end="2646" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">You&rsquo;re actually in a&nbsp;<strong data-start="2586" data-end="2616">good recovery position now</strong>&nbsp;&mdash; just need a clean rejoin 👍</p>
